# Questions:
* % forest: is it timber and conservation lands? Exurban LD? 
* How deal with change ratio when zero in denominator? 
* Ws vs. Cat values for future data

# Notes
* Metadata: See "QA_checklist_20240910.xlsx"

* N Surplus = N inputs – N outputs
* N inputs = N Deposition + Fertilizer N + Livestock Manure N + Fixation N + Human Waste N  
* N outputs = N from crop removal	


* NANI = N_dep + N_fert + N_ag_fix + N_crop_prod + N_human + N_livestock - N_exports (N_emissions + N_animal_prod + N_animal_consumption + N_human_cons)

* Depostion: "2055ctl = ; 2055ref = 

# ICLUS LU Categories
* area_00-nat_water_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem = area (m2) of natural water land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_01-reservoir/canal_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem = area (m2) of reservoirs, canals land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_02-wetlands_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem	area = (m2) of wetlands land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_03-rec/conserv_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of recreation, conservation land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_04-timber_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of timber land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_05-grazing_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of grazing land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_06-pasture_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of pasture land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_07-cropland_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of cropland land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_08-mining/barren_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem = area (m2) of mining, barren land land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_09-parks/golf_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of parks, golf courses land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_10-exurbanLD_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of exurban (low density) land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_11-exurbanHD_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of exurban (high density) land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_12-suburban_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of suburban land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_13-urbanLD_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of urban (low density) land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_14-urbanHD_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of urban (high density) land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_15-commercial_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of commercial land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_16-industrial_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem =	area (m2) of industrial land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_17-institutional_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem = area (m2) of institutional land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem
* area_18-transport_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem = area (m2) of transportation land use in catchment in 2050_rcp8.5hadgem

# Function for AUC
```{r}
library(clipr)

#Function for AUC
roc.area<-function(probp,prabs) {
  presnt<-probp[prabs>.5];
  abb<-probp[prabs<.5];
  sumexc <- sapply(presnt, FUN = function(x,cc)(sum(as.numeric(x > cc)) + 0.5 * sum(as.numeric(x == cc))),cc=abb)
  sum(sumexc)/(length(presnt)*length(abb));
}

```

# SDWIS Data
```{r}

library(lubridate)

m_dir = 'C:/Users/mpennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/'

data_dir2 = "C:/Users/MPennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/Data/"
PWS_inventory_gwsw = read.csv(paste0(data_dir2, 'PWS_inventory_gwsw_2023Q4.csv'))

PWS_inventory_gw = PWS_inventory_gwsw[PWS_inventory_gwsw$GW.or.SW == 'Groundwater',]
PWS_inventory_sw = PWS_inventory_gwsw[PWS_inventory_gwsw$GW.or.SW == 'Surface water',]

# Total number of violations per PWSID

all_avg1 = read.csv(paste0(m_dir,'Projects/SDWIS/All_Contaminants/Violations_MCL_ALL_Contaminants_Average_ActiveInactive_2023Q4_regions1to5.csv'))
all_avg2 = read.csv(paste0(m_dir,'Projects/SDWIS/All_Contaminants/Violations_MCL_ALL_Contaminants_Average_ActiveInactive_2023Q4_regions6to8.csv'))  
all_avg3 = read.csv(paste0(m_dir,'Projects/SDWIS/All_Contaminants/Violations_MCL_ALL_Contaminants_Average_ActiveInactive_2023Q4_regions9to10.csv'))  

all_single = read.csv(paste0(m_dir,'Projects/SDWIS/All_Contaminants/Violations_MCL_ALL_Contaminants_Single_ActiveInactive_2023Q4.csv'))  

# Search for These sites with violations
# PA3061260, NY0130000, CO0230001, PA3061260

# The warming is because all_avg$Violation.Measure is a factor, but all_single is numeric, can ignore it or change it with code below, but not necessary. 


SDWIS_all = rbind(all_avg1,all_avg2,all_avg3,all_single)

# Creating date column in the correct format
SDWIS_all$DATE = as.Date(SDWIS_all$Compliance.Period.Begin.Date, format = "%d-%B-%Y")


# i think you can ignore the warning
names(SDWIS_all)[which(colnames(SDWIS_all)=="PWS.ID")] = "PWSID"

SDWIS_all <- SDWIS_all %>%
  dplyr::select(PWSID, everything())


# Subset out just DBP 
# Add YEAR column
SDWIS_all$YEAR = year(SDWIS_all$DATE)

test = SDWIS_all[SDWIS_all$GW.or.SW.Code == 'SW',]
levels(factor(test$YEAR))
#View(test[,c("PWSID","DATE","YEAR")])

SDWIS_all = SDWIS_all[SDWIS_all$YEAR >= 1994,]

# change value so that both "Nitrate"="NO3" & "Nitrate-Nitrite"="NO3"
SDWIS_all$Contaminant = SDWIS_all$Contaminant.Name
SDWIS_all$Contaminant[SDWIS_all$Contaminant.Name=='Nitrate']='NO3'
SDWIS_all$Contaminant[SDWIS_all$Contaminant.Name=='Nitrate-Nitrite']='NO3'

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Summarize by HUC12

SDWIS_no3 = SDWIS_all[SDWIS_all$Contaminant == "NO3",]


```

# Facility Data Q3 2017-21
* Q3 is used for inventories of active systems in a FY
* 1) Select Facilities Report; 2) Submission Year YYYY; 3) Quarter 3; 4) Activity Status: All; 5) EPA Region: Region 1, 2, 3... (for some Regions may need to subset by half the states)
```{r}

fac17 = readRDS(paste0(m_dir,'Projects/SDWIS/Facilities_All_2017Q3/SDWIS_Facilities_ALL_2017.rds')) 
fac18 = readRDS(paste0(m_dir,'Projects/SDWIS/Facilities_All_2018Q3/SDWIS_Facilities_ALL_2018.rds')) 
fac19 = readRDS(paste0(m_dir,'Projects/SDWIS/Facilities_All_2019Q3/SDWIS_Facilities_ALL_2019.rds')) 
fac20 = readRDS(paste0(m_dir,'Projects/SDWIS/Facilities_All_2020Q3/SDWIS_Facilities_ALL_2020.rds')) 
fac21 = readRDS(paste0(m_dir,'Projects/SDWIS/Facilities_All_2021Q3/SDWIS_Facilities_ALL_2021.rds')) 

names(fac17)[which(colnames(fac17)=="PWS.ID")] = "PWSID"
names(fac18)[which(colnames(fac18)=="PWS.ID")] = "PWSID"
names(fac19)[which(colnames(fac19)=="PWS.ID")] = "PWSID"
names(fac20)[which(colnames(fac20)=="PWS.ID")] = "PWSID"
names(fac21)[which(colnames(fac21)=="PWS.ID")] = "PWSID"

fac_columns = c('PWSID','Facility.Type.Code','Facility.Type.Description','Activity.Status','Facility.Id')

fac17. = fac17[,fac_columns]
fac18. = fac18[,fac_columns]
fac19. = fac19[,fac_columns]
fac20. = fac20[,fac_columns]
fac21. = fac21[,fac_columns]

facs_all_years = rbind(fac17.,fac18.,fac19.,fac20.,fac21.)


```

```{r}
gc()
library(readtext)

cdc = cdc[cdc$Primary.Source != "Ground water purchased",]

cdc_sw = cdc[cdc$GW.or.SW =='Surface water',]
cdc_gw = cdc[cdc$GW.or.SW =='Groundwater',]



```

# Non-Consecutive Systems
* I’ve come up with a method to filter for just systems without consecutive connections (non-consecutive systems).  

*  1.	Identify any PWS that are listed with the field “Primary.Source” as just “Surface water” (so not “Surface water purchased,” or “Purchased ground water under influence of surface water source,” or “Groundwater under influence of surface water”)
*  2.	Of these PWS, I would then identify which have one or more facilities with a “CC” for the field “Facility.Type.Code” 
*  3.	Method 1: I would then only keep the PWS that do not have any facilities with a “CC”
*  4a. Method 2: A slight modification of this approach to deal with the overly conservativeness of this (described below) is to not just get ride of a PWS if it has a CC facility, but only if all its facilities are CC - But if it has other non-CC facilities, then I would keep it.  
*  4b. This means using the CC == 0 in the code instead of the select approach.  
* This seems like a way to ensure I am only looking at violations from systems where the surface water come from only one of its own facilities.  However, this method likely is overly conservative because, there may be a system that has 99% of its water coming from its own intake, and 1% is purchased, but I am removing that system from my analysis due to it having one facility labeled as a consecutive connection [THIS NO LONGER APPLIES B/C OF STEPS 4 & 5 above] 
*!!! I'm using the less convervative approach an only removing PWS if all facilities are "CC" (as of July 2022)
*!!! Also including the "Groundwater under the influence of surface water" as part of the surface water violations group (As of July 2022)
```{r}

# levels(factor(SDWIS_all$Primary.Source))
# levels(factor(SDWIS_all$GW.or.SW.Code))
# levels(factor(SDWIS_all$GW.or.SW))

SW_all = SDWIS_all[SDWIS_all$GW.or.SW == 'Surface water',]
GW_all = SDWIS_all[SDWIS_all$GW.or.SW == 'Groundwater',]

# test = SDWIS_all[SDWIS_all$Contaminant == 'NO3',]
# test = test[test$GW.or.SW.Code == 'SW',]
# levels(factor(test[test$YEAR >=2020,]$Primacy.Agency))
# test = test[test$Primary.Source == 'Surface water',]
# levels(factor(test[test$YEAR >=2020,]$Primacy.Agency))
# 
# levels(factor(test$YEAR))
# levels(factor(SW_all$YEAR))

nonpurchaseSW = SW_all[SW_all$Primary.Source == 'Surface water' | 
                       SW_all$Primary.Source == 
                         'Groundwater under influence of surface water',]
nonpurchaseGW = GW_all[GW_all$Primary.Source == 'Ground water',]

# test = SW_all[SW_all$Contaminant == 'NO3',]
# levels(factor(test[test$YEAR >=2020,]$Primacy.Agency))
# test = nonpurchaseSW[nonpurchaseSW$Contaminant == 'NO3',]
# levels(factor(test[test$YEAR >=2020,]$Primacy.Agency))
# 
# test = nonpurchaseSW
# levels(factor(test$YEAR))

nrow(SW_all) # 41893
nrow(nonpurchaseSW) # 22216

nrow(GW_all) # 100860
nrow(nonpurchaseGW) # 96066

temp_fac = facs_all_years[,c("PWSID","Facility.Type.Code")]
temp_fac = temp_fac[temp_fac$Facility.Type.Code == "CC",]


# merge with facility information
nonpurchaseSW2 = merge(nonpurchaseSW,temp_fac,by='PWSID',all.x=T)
nonpurchaseGW2 = merge(nonpurchaseGW,temp_fac,by='PWSID',all.x=T)


#!!! UPDATED TO NOT REMOVAL PWS IF SOME FACILITIES ARE NOT CC (July 2022)
#nonconsecSW = nonpurchaseSW2[nonpurchaseSW2$CC == 0,]
#nonconsecGW = nonpurchaseGW2[nonpurchaseGW2$CC == 0,]

# Keep only non CC (NAs from the above merge) 
nonconsecSW = nonpurchaseSW2[!complete.cases(nonpurchaseSW2[,c("Facility.Type.Code")]),] 
nonconsecGW = nonpurchaseGW2[!complete.cases(nonpurchaseGW2[,c("Facility.Type.Code")]),] 


nrow(nonpurchaseSW2) # 476990
nrow(nonpurchaseGW2) # 1238395

# nonpurchaseSW2$CC = ifelse(nonpurchaseSW2$Facility.Type.Code == 'CC',1,0)
# nonpurchaseGW2$CC = ifelse(nonpurchaseGW2$Facility.Type.Code == 'CC',1,0)


#levels(factor(consecSW$YEAR))
#levels(factor(consecSW[consecSW$YEAR >=2020,]$Primacy.Agency))

#nrow(as.data.frame(unique(consecSW$PWSID))) # 459
#nrow(as.data.frame(unique(nonpurchaseSW$PWSID))) # 2060

#nrow(as.data.frame(unique(consecGW$PWSID))) # 706
nrow(as.data.frame(unique(nonpurchaseGW$PWSID))) # 14347

# Subset out non-consecutive systems (want to select from systems that don't purchase, not from the systems that are both purchasers and sellers)
# selectedRows  = (!nonpurchaseSW$PWSID %in% consecSW$PWSID) # rows not matching
# nonconsecSW = nonpurchaseSW[selectedRows,] # 
# 
# selectedRows  = (!nonpurchaseGW$PWSID %in% consecGW$PWSID) # rows not matching
# nonconsecGW = nonpurchaseGW[selectedRows,] # 



levels(factor(nonconsecSW[nonconsecSW$YEAR >=2020,]$Primacy.Agency))

# Combine 
names(nonconsecSW)
nonconsec_SW_GW = rbind(nonconsecSW,nonconsecGW)

test = nonconsecSW[nonconsecSW$Contaminant == 'NO3',]
levels(factor(test$YEAR))
levels(factor(test[test$YEAR >=2020,]$Primacy.Agency))


```


# Facilities in HUC12
* See "QA_4_Facility_in_HUC12.R" for how these were calculated
```{r}

spa_dir = "D:/ArcGIS/SDWIS_Model/SDWIS/Spatial/catchment_analysis/"

one_dir = "C:/Users/MPennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/Projects/Data/"
t_dir = 'C:/Users/MPennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/Data/'

fac_95inHUC12 = read.csv(paste0(one_dir,"SDWIS/Facilities_95correct_1HUC12.csv"))
fac_Over0inHUC12 = read.csv(paste0(t_dir,"Facilities_Over0in_1HUC12.csv"))

length(unique(fac_95inHUC12$PWSID)) # 187426
length(unique(fac_Over0inHUC12$PWSID)) # 198394

#fac_95inHUC12_s = st_read(paste0(spa_dir, "SDWIS_Facilities_95in_1HUC12.shp"))

fac_95inHUC12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(fac_95inHUC12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) # add zero in front of any 
fac_Over0inHUC12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(fac_Over0inHUC12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) # add zero in front of any 

PWS_95in1HUC12. = unique(fac_95inHUC12[,c('PWSID','HUC12')])
PWS_Over0inHUC12. = unique(fac_Over0inHUC12[,c('PWSID','HUC12')])

#write.csv(PWS_95in1HUC12,file = paste0(one_dir, 'PWS_95in1_HUC12.csv'),row.names=F)

length(unique(PWS_95in1HUC12.$PWSID)) # 187426
length(unique(PWS_Over0inHUC12.$PWSID)) # 198394

PWS_95in1HUC12 =PWS_95in1HUC12.
PWS_Over0inHUC12 = PWS_Over0inHUC12.
```

# Converter PWS-HUC12 & PWS COMID
* Need to remove duplicates: PWSIDs found in multiple HUC12s (keeping HUC12 with most PWSIDs)
```{r}
library(dplyr)
# Remove duplicates. 
# 1a. Select HUC12 that has more intake facilities (Surface water) 
# 1b. Select HUC12 that has more well facilities (groundwater) 
# 2. Select HUC12 that has most PWS facilities

sdwis_dir = "C:/Users/MPennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/Projects/Data/SDWIS/"


PWS_COMID = read.csv(paste0(sdwis_dir,"PWS_FAC_Locations_to_COMID.csv")) # created in SDWIS_Location_Data.Rmd file


PWS_HUC12. = read.csv(paste0(sdwis_dir,"PWS_FAC_Locations_to_HUC12.csv")) # created in SDWIS_Location_Data.Rmd file

test = read.csv(paste0(sdwis_dir,"PWS_Locations_to_HUC12.csv")) # created in SDWIS_Location_Data.Rmd file


PWS_HUC12.$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(PWS_HUC12.$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) # add zero in front of any 

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SURFACE WATER
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PWS_HUC12_sw = merge(unique(PWS_HUC12.[,c('PWSID','HUC12','FACILITY_TYPE')]),
                     PWS_inventory_gwsw[,c('PWSID','GW.or.SW')],by='PWSID')
PWS_HUC12_sw =unique(PWS_HUC12_sw[PWS_HUC12_sw$GW.or.SW == 'Surface water',])

# Remove well facility types
PWS_HUC12_sw = PWS_HUC12_sw[PWS_HUC12_sw$FACILITY_TYPE != 'WL',]
PWS_HUC12_sw = unique(PWS_HUC12_sw[,c('PWSID','HUC12','FACILITY_TYPE')])
PWS_HUC12_sw$flag  = duplicated(PWS_HUC12_sw[,c('PWSID')])
PWS_HUC12_sw.f = PWS_HUC12_sw[PWS_HUC12_sw$flag == TRUE,]

# subsetting out non-duplicated
selectedRows  = (!PWS_HUC12_sw$PWSID %in% PWS_HUC12_sw.f$PWSID)
PWS_HUC12_sw1 = PWS_HUC12_sw[selectedRows,] 

# subset out duplicated
selectedRows  = (PWS_HUC12_sw$PWSID %in% PWS_HUC12_sw.f$PWSID)
PWS_HUC12_sw.f1 = PWS_HUC12_sw[selectedRows,]

# Get frequency of each PWS per HUC12
PWS_HUC12_sw.f2 = PWS_HUC12_sw.f1 %>% group_by(PWSID,HUC12) %>% summarize(freq = n()) # ,n_dist = n_distinct(HUC12)

PWS_HUC12_sw.f3 = PWS_HUC12_sw.f2 %>% group_by(PWSID) %>% summarize_at(vars(freq), max) # get PWS with most freq

# add back on HUC12 that is most frequent
PWS_HUC12_sw.f4 = merge(PWS_HUC12_sw.f3,PWS_HUC12_sw.f2[,c('PWSID','HUC12','freq')],by=c('PWSID','freq'))

# For those with the same frequency, randomly select one of the HUC12s
PWS_HUC12_sw.f5 <- PWS_HUC12_sw.f4 %>% group_by(PWSID) %>% sample_n(1) %>% ungroup()

# merge non-dups with the duplicated ones
PWS_HUC12_sw2 = rbind(unique(PWS_HUC12_sw1[,c('PWSID','HUC12')]),
                        unique(PWS_HUC12_sw.f5[,c('PWSID','HUC12')]))

nrow(PWS_HUC12_sw2) # 25922
length(unique(PWS_HUC12_sw2$PWSID)) # 25922 (same as nrow so no duplicates)
length(unique(PWS_HUC12_sw2$HUC12))



#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# GROUNDWATER
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PWS_HUC12_gw = merge(PWS_HUC12.,PWS_inventory_gwsw[,c('PWSID','GW.or.SW')],by='PWSID')
PWS_HUC12_gw =PWS_HUC12_gw[PWS_HUC12_gw$GW.or.SW == 'Groundwater',]
levels(factor(PWS_HUC12_gw$FACILITY_TYPE))

# Remove well facility types
PWS_HUC12_gw = unique(PWS_HUC12_gw[,c('PWSID','HUC12','FACILITY_TYPE')])
PWS_HUC12_gw$flag  = duplicated(PWS_HUC12_gw[,c('PWSID')])
PWS_HUC12_gw.f = PWS_HUC12_gw[PWS_HUC12_gw$flag == TRUE,]

# subsetting out non-duplicated
selectedRows  = (!PWS_HUC12_gw$PWSID %in% PWS_HUC12_gw.f$PWSID)
PWS_HUC12_gw1 = PWS_HUC12_gw[selectedRows,] 

# subset out duplicated
selectedRows  = (PWS_HUC12_gw$PWSID %in% PWS_HUC12_gw.f$PWSID)
PWS_HUC12_gw.f1 = PWS_HUC12_gw[selectedRows,]

# Get frequency of each PWS per HUC12
PWS_HUC12_gw.f2 = PWS_HUC12_gw.f1 %>% group_by(PWSID,HUC12) %>% summarize(freq = n()) # ,n_dist = n_distinct(HUC12)

PWS_HUC12_gw.f3 = PWS_HUC12_gw.f2 %>% group_by(PWSID) %>% summarize_at(vars(freq), max) # get PWS with most freq

# add back on HUC12 that is most frequent
PWS_HUC12_gw.f4 = merge(PWS_HUC12_gw.f3,PWS_HUC12_gw.f2[,c('PWSID','HUC12','freq')],by=c('PWSID','freq'))

# For those with the same frequency, randomly select one of the HUC12s
PWS_HUC12_gw.f5 <- PWS_HUC12_gw.f4 %>% group_by(PWSID) %>% sample_n(1) %>% ungroup()

# merge non-dups with the duplicated ones
PWS_HUC12_gw2 = rbind(unique(PWS_HUC12_gw1[,c('PWSID','HUC12')]),
                        unique(PWS_HUC12_gw.f5[,c('PWSID','HUC12')]))

nrow(PWS_HUC12_gw2) # 355790
length(unique(PWS_HUC12_gw2$PWSID)) # 355790 (same as nrow so no duplicates)
length(unique(PWS_HUC12_gw2$HUC12))

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# MERGE SURFACE & GROUNDWATER
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PWS_HUC12 = rbind(PWS_HUC12_sw2,PWS_HUC12_gw2)

nrow(PWS_HUC12) # 381712
length(unique(PWS_HUC12$PWSID)) # 381712 (same as nrow so no duplicates)
length(unique(PWS_HUC12$HUC12)) # 39740


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Add on missing PWSIDs from PWS_95in1HUC12 or PWS_Over0inHUC12
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

selectedRows  = (!PWS_Over0inHUC12$PWSID %in% PWS_HUC12$PWSID) # rows not matching
temp = unique(as.data.frame(PWS_Over0inHUC12[selectedRows,]))
nrow(temp) # 16797
length(unique(temp$PWSID)) # 16012 
# remove duplicates
temp = temp %>% distinct(PWSID, .keep_all = TRUE)
nrow(temp) # 16012
length(unique(temp$PWSID)) # 16012 (same as nrow so no duplicates)

PWS_HUC12 = unique(rbind(PWS_HUC12,temp))

selectedRows  = (!PWS_95in1HUC12$PWSID %in% PWS_HUC12$PWSID) # rows not matching
temp = unique(as.data.frame(PWS_95in1HUC12[selectedRows,]))
nrow(temp) # 15338
length(unique(temp$PWSID)) # 15338 (same as nrow so no duplicates)


PWS_HUC12 = unique(rbind(PWS_HUC12,temp))
nrow(PWS_HUC12) # 397765
length(unique(PWS_HUC12$PWSID)) # 397765 (same as nrow so no duplicates)




# nrow(temp[temp$PWSID == 'NY3230127',])
# nrow(temp[temp$PWSID == 'NY4130302',])
# nrow(temp[temp$PWSID == 'PA4550013',])
# nrow(temp[temp$PWSID == 'TX0270047',])
# nrow(temp[temp$PWSID == 'CO0147090',])






```


# Summarize SDWIS HUC12 & Catchment
```{r}

library(dplyr)
viols = SDWIS_no3[SDWIS_no3$YEAR >= 2013,]

viols = unique(subset(viols,select=c(PWSID,DATE,YEAR,Submission.Year.Quarter,Contaminant)))

viols2 = viols %>% group_by(PWSID) %>% summarize(viol_freq = n())

# Separate SW and GW
viol_gwsw = merge(viols2,PWS_inventory_gwsw,by='PWSID')
viol_gw = viol_gwsw[viol_gwsw$GW.or.SW == "Groundwater",]
viol_sw = viol_gwsw[viol_gwsw$GW.or.SW == "Surface water",]


# Sites without violations
selectedRows  = (!PWS_inventory_gw$PWSID %in% viol_gw$PWSID) # gives rows where not matching
noviols_gw = as.data.frame(PWS_inventory_gw[selectedRows,])

selectedRows  = (!PWS_inventory_sw$PWSID %in% viol_sw$PWSID) # gives rows where not matching
noviols_sw = as.data.frame(PWS_inventory_sw[selectedRows,])


# Add on converters
viol_gw. = merge(viol_gw,PWS_HUC12,by='PWSID')
viol_sw. = merge(viol_sw,PWS_HUC12,by='PWSID')

viol_gw_ = merge(viol_gw,PWS_COMID,by='PWSID')
viol_sw_ = merge(viol_sw,PWS_COMID,by='PWSID')

noviol_gw. = merge(noviols_gw,PWS_HUC12,by='PWSID')
noviol_sw. = merge(noviols_sw,PWS_HUC12,by='PWSID')

noviol_gw_ = merge(noviols_gw,PWS_COMID,by='PWSID')
noviol_sw_ = merge(noviols_sw,PWS_COMID,by='PWSID')

# Summarize
viol_gw_hu12_ = viol_gw. %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize(viol_freq = sum(viol_freq))
viol_sw_hu12_ = viol_sw. %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize(viol_freq = sum(viol_freq))

viol_gw_cat_ = viol_gw_ %>% group_by(COMID) %>% summarize(viol_freq = sum(viol_freq))
viol_sw_cat_ = viol_sw_ %>% group_by(COMID) %>% summarize(viol_freq = sum(viol_freq))

noviol_gw_hu12 = noviol_gw. %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize(viol_freq = 0)
noviol_sw_hu12 = noviol_sw. %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize(viol_freq = 0)

noviol_gw_cat = noviol_gw_ %>% group_by(COMID) %>% summarize(viol_freq = 0)
noviol_sw_cat = noviol_sw_ %>% group_by(COMID) %>% summarize(viol_freq = 0)


# Merge viol and non viol
viol_gw_hu12 = as.data.frame(rbind(viol_gw_hu12_,noviol_gw_hu12))
viol_sw_hu12 = as.data.frame(rbind(viol_sw_hu12_,noviol_sw_hu12))
viol_gw_cat = as.data.frame(rbind(viol_gw_cat_,noviol_gw_cat))
viol_sw_cat = as.data.frame(rbind(viol_sw_cat_,noviol_sw_cat))

length(unique(viol_gw_hu12$HUC12)) # 1512
length(unique(viol_sw_hu12$HUC12)) # 28

length(unique(viol_gw_cat$COMID)) # 1754
length(unique(viol_sw_cat$COMID)) # 70

```

# Summarize CDC Conc. HUC12 & Catchment
```{r}

library(dplyr)
cdc_sw = cdc_sw[cdc_sw$YEAR >= 2013,]
cdc_gw = cdc_gw[cdc_gw$YEAR >= 2013,]

#viols = unique(subset(viols,select=c(PWSID,DATE,YEAR,Submission.Year.Quarter,Contaminant)))

#viols2 = viols %>% group_by(PWSID) %>% summarize(viol_freq = n())

# Separate SW and GW
#viol_gwsw = merge(viols2,PWS_inventory_gwsw,by='PWSID')
#viol_gw = viol_gwsw[viol_gwsw$GW.or.SW == "Groundwater",]
#viol_sw = viol_gwsw[viol_gwsw$GW.or.SW == "Surface water",]




# Add on converters
cdc_gw. = merge(cdc_gw,PWS_HUC12,by='PWSID')
cdc_sw. = merge(cdc_sw,PWS_HUC12,by='PWSID')

cdc_gw_ = merge(cdc_gw,PWS_COMID,by='PWSID')
cdc_sw_ = merge(cdc_sw,PWS_COMID,by='PWSID')


# Summarize
cdc_gw_hu12 = cdc_gw. %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize(mean_conc = mean(Value))
cdc_sw_hu12 = cdc_sw. %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize(mean_conc = mean(Value))

cdc_gw_cat = cdc_gw_ %>% group_by(COMID) %>% summarize(mean_conc = mean(Value))
cdc_sw_cat = cdc_sw_ %>% group_by(COMID) %>% summarize(mean_conc = mean(Value))


length(unique(cdc_gw_hu12$HUC12)) # 8971
length(unique(cdc_sw_hu12$HUC12)) # 1699

length(unique(cdc_gw_cat$COMID)) # 14813
length(unique(cdc_sw_cat$COMID)) # 1936

```

# Upload Temp/Precip Data
```{r}

library(dplyr)
T4f_dir = "C:/Users/mpennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/Contracts/StRAP4_contracts/Future_DW_NO3/Deliverables/Task_4_Temp_Precip/Final_deliverables/"

prec_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T4f_dir,"climate_precip_HUC_final.csv"))
temp_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T4f_dir,"climate_temp_HUC_final.csv"))

#prec_Cat = read.csv(paste0(T4f_dir,"climate_precip_cat_final.csv"))
#temp_Cat = read.csv(paste0(T4f_dir,"climate_temp_cat_final.csv"))

# Add leading zeros
prec_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(prec_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) # add zero in front of any

temp_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(temp_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) # add zero in front of any

#names(temp_Cat)[which(colnames(temp_Cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Remove -99999
prec_hu12$precip_2010_mm[prec_hu12$precip_2010_mm == -99999] = NA
prec_hu12$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS[prec_hu12$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS == -99999] = NA

temp_hu12$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS[temp_hu12$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS == -99999] = NA

temp_hu12$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem[temp_hu12$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem == -99999] = NA

#--------------------------
prec_hu12$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS[prec_hu12$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS == -99999] = NA
```

# Upload ICLUS Data
```{r}

T3_dir = "C:/Users/mpennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/Contracts/StRAP4_contracts/Future_DW_NO3/Deliverables/Task_3_ICLUS/Final/"
T3_dir2 = "C:/Users/mpennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/Contracts/StRAP4_contracts/Future_DW_NO3/Deliverables/Task_3_ICLUS/Draft/"

# Impervious
#imprv_cat = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"iclus_impervious_cat_final.csv"))
imprv_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"iclus_impervious_HUC_final.csv"))

# Population Data
#popden_cat_ = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir2,"iclus_population_cat_draft.csv"))
popden_hu12_ = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir2,"iclus_population_HUC_draft.csv"))


# Land Use HUC12
LU_2010_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"HUC12/iclus_landuse_2010_HUC_final.csv"))
LU_2050_4.5G_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"HUC12/iclus_landuse_2050_RCP4.5GISS_HUC_final.csv"))
LU_2050_4.5H_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"HUC12/iclus_landuse_2050_RCP4.5Hadgem_HUC_final.csv"))
LU_2050_8.5G_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"HUC12/iclus_landuse_2050_RCP8.5GISS_HUC_final.csv"))
LU_2050_8.5H_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"HUC12/iclus_landuse_2050_RCP8.5Hadgem_HUC_final.csv"))
LU_chg_4.5G_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"HUC12/iclus_landuse_change_RCP4.5GISS_HUC_final.csv"))
LU_chg_4.5H_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"HUC12/iclus_landuse_change_RCP4.5Hadgem_HUC_final.csv"))
LU_chg_8.5G_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"HUC12/iclus_landuse_change_RCP8.5GISS_HUC_final.csv"))
LU_chg_8.5H_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"HUC12/iclus_landuse_change_RCP8.5Hadgem_HUC_final.csv"))

# Land USe Catchment
# LU_2010_cat = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"Catchment/iclus_landuse_2010_cat_final.csv"))
# LU_2050_4.5G_cat = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"Catchment/iclus_landuse_2050_RCP4.5GISS_cat_final.csv"))
# LU_2050_4.5H_cat = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"Catchment/iclus_landuse_2050_RCP4.5Hadgem_cat_final.csv"))
# LU_2050_8.5G_cat = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"Catchment/iclus_landuse_2050_RCP8.5GISS_cat_final.csv"))
# LU_2050_8.5H_cat = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"Catchment/iclus_landuse_2050_RCP8.5Hadgem_cat_final.csv"))
# LU_chg_4.5G_cat = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"Catchment/iclus_landuse_change_RCP4.5GISS_cat_final.csv"))
# LU_chg_4.5H_cat = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"Catchment/iclus_landuse_change_RCP4.5Hadgem_cat_final.csv"))
# LU_chg_8.5G_cat = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"Catchment/iclus_landuse_change_RCP8.5GISS_cat_final.csv"))
# LU_chg_8.5H_cat = read.csv(paste0(T3_dir,"Catchment/iclus_landuse_change_RCP8.5Hadgem_cat_final.csv"))

# Add leading zeros
imprv_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(imprv_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 
popden_hu12_$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(popden_hu12_$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 


LU_2010_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(LU_2010_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 
LU_2050_4.5G_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(LU_2050_4.5G_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 
LU_2050_4.5H_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(LU_2050_4.5H_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 
LU_2050_8.5G_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(LU_2050_8.5G_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 
LU_2050_8.5H_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(LU_2050_8.5H_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 

LU_chg_4.5G_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(LU_chg_4.5G_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 
LU_chg_4.5H_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(LU_chg_4.5H_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 
LU_chg_8.5G_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(LU_chg_8.5G_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 
LU_chg_8.5H_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(LU_chg_8.5H_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 

# Change units of change in pop density (from #/m2 to #/km2)
popden_hu12_$change_pop_den_RCP4.5GISS = popden_hu12_$change_population_RCP4.5GISS *10^6
popden_hu12_$change_pop_den_RCP4.5Hadgem = popden_hu12_$change_population_RCP4.5Hadgem *10^6
popden_hu12_$change_pop_den_RCP8.5Hadgem = popden_hu12_$change_population_RCP8.5Hadgem *10^6

# names(imprv_cat)[which(colnames(imprv_cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"
# 
# names(LU_2010_cat)[which(colnames(LU_2010_cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"
# names(LU_2050_4.5G_cat)[which(colnames(LU_2050_4.5G_cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"
# names(LU_2050_4.5H_cat)[which(colnames(LU_2050_4.5H_cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"
# names(LU_2050_8.5G_cat)[which(colnames(LU_2050_8.5G_cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"
# names(LU_2050_8.5H_cat)[which(colnames(LU_2050_8.5H_cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"
# names(LU_chg_4.5G_cat)[which(colnames(LU_chg_4.5G_cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"
# names(LU_chg_4.5H_cat)[which(colnames(LU_chg_4.5H_cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"
# names(LU_chg_8.5G_cat)[which(colnames(LU_chg_8.5G_cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"
# names(LU_chg_8.5H_cat)[which(colnames(LU_chg_8.5H_cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"

# Merge
lu_hu12 = merge(LU_2010_hu12,subset(LU_2050_4.5G_hu12,select=-c(cells_in_HUC_12,total_cell_count,NA_cell_count)),by='HUC12')
lu_hu12 = merge(lu_hu12,subset(LU_2050_4.5H_hu12,select=-c(cells_in_HUC_12,total_cell_count,NA_cell_count)),by='HUC12')
lu_hu12 = merge(lu_hu12,subset(LU_2050_8.5G_hu12,select=-c(cells_in_HUC_12,total_cell_count,NA_cell_count)),by='HUC12')
lu_hu12 = merge(lu_hu12,subset(LU_2050_8.5H_hu12,select=-c(cells_in_HUC_12,total_cell_count,NA_cell_count)),by='HUC12')
lu_hu12 = merge(lu_hu12,LU_chg_4.5G_hu12,by='HUC12')
lu_hu12 = merge(lu_hu12,LU_chg_4.5H_hu12,by='HUC12')
lu_hu12 = merge(lu_hu12,LU_chg_8.5G_hu12,by='HUC12')
lu_hu12 = merge(lu_hu12,LU_chg_8.5H_hu12,by='HUC12')

#lu_cat = merge(LU_2010_cat,subset(LU_2050_4.5G_cat,select=-c(cells_in_FEATUREID,total_cell_count,NA_cell_count)),by='COMID')
#lu_cat = merge(lu_cat,subset(LU_2050_4.5H_cat,select=-c(cells_in_FEATUREID,total_cell_count,NA_cell_count)),by='COMID')
#lu_cat = merge(lu_cat,subset(LU_2050_8.5G_cat,select=-c(cells_in_FEATUREID,total_cell_count,NA_cell_count)),by='COMID')
#lu_cat = merge(lu_cat,subset(LU_2050_8.5H_cat,select=-c(cells_in_FEATUREID,total_cell_count,NA_cell_count)),by='COMID')
#lu_cat = merge(lu_cat,LU_chg_4.5G_cat,by='COMID')
#lu_cat = merge(lu_cat,LU_chg_4.5H_cat,by='COMID')
#lu_cat = merge(lu_cat,LU_chg_8.5G_cat,by='COMID')
#lu_cat = merge(lu_cat,LU_chg_8.5H_cat,by='COMID')



```


# Upload TDEP Data
```{r}
T5f_dir = "C:/Users/mpennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/Contracts/StRAP4_contracts/Future_DW_NO3/Deliverables/Task_5_Deposition/Final_deliverables/"


dep_N_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T5f_dir,"dep_N_HUC_final.csv"))
dep_S_hu12 = read.csv(paste0(T5f_dir,"dep_S_HUC_final.csv"))

#dep_N_Cat = read.csv(paste0(T5f_dir,"dep_N_cat_final.csv"))
#dep_S_Cat = read.csv(paste0(T5f_dir,"dep_S_cat_final.csv"))

# Add leading zeros
dep_N_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(dep_N_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 

dep_S_hu12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(dep_S_hu12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 


#names(dep_N_Cat)[which(colnames(dep_N_Cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"

#names(dep_S_Cat)[which(colnames(dep_S_Cat)=="Catchment.ID")] = "COMID"


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Remove -99999

# Current
dep_N_hu12$totalN_2010_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$totalN_2010_kgNha == -99999] = NA
dep_N_hu12$wetN_2010_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$wetN_2010_kgNha == -99999] = NA
dep_N_hu12$dryN_2010_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$dryN_2010_kgNha == -99999] = NA
dep_N_hu12$oxiN_2010_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$oxiN_2010_kgNha == -99999] = NA
dep_N_hu12$redN_2010_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$redN_2010_kgNha == -99999] = NA

dep_N_hu12$totalN_2016_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$totalN_2016_kgNha == -99999] = NA
dep_N_hu12$wetN_2016_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$wetN_2016_kgNha == -99999] = NA
dep_N_hu12$dryN_2016_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$dryN_2016_kgNha == -99999] = NA
dep_N_hu12$oxiN_2016_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$oxiN_2016_kgNha == -99999] = NA
dep_N_hu12$redN_2016_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$redN_2016_kgNha == -99999] = NA

# Future
dep_N_hu12$totalN_2050ctl_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$totalN_2050ctl_kgNha == -99999] = NA
dep_N_hu12$wetN_2050ctl_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$wetN_2050ctl_kgNha == -99999] = NA
dep_N_hu12$dryN_2050ctl_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$dryN_2050ctl_kgNha == -99999] = NA
dep_N_hu12$oxiN_2050ctl_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$oxiN_2050ctl_kgNha == -99999] = NA

dep_N_hu12$totalN_2055ctl_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$totalN_2055ctl_kgNha == -99999] = NA

dep_N_hu12$dryN_2055ctl_kgNha[dep_N_hu12$dryN_2055ctl_kgNha == -99999] = NA

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
dep_N_hu12$pct_change_totalN_ctl[dep_N_hu12$pct_change_totalN_ctl == -99999] = NA
dep_N_hu12$pct_change_wetN_ctl[dep_N_hu12$pct_change_wetN_ctl == -99999] = NA
```

# Upload NNI Data

```{r}
library(dplyr)
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# N Surplus
NNI_surp = read.csv(paste0(data_dir,'N_Surp_kgskm_0217_HUC12.csv'))

# Add leading zeros
NNI_surp$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(NNI_surp$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0)  

NNI_Avg = NNI_surp %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize(Avg_N_Surp_02_17_kgskm = mean(N_Surp_kgskm,na.rm=T))


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# All NNI Data
m_dir = 'C:/Users/mpennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/'
m2_dir = paste0(m_dir,"Projects/StRAPs/StRAP4/SSWR.405.1_NO3_Trend_Causes/Data/")
```

# N Surp Calc
```{r}

NNI17$n_surplus_kgsqkm = 
  NNI17$n_atm_dep_kgsqkm + 
  NNI17$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm +
  NNI17$n_manure_kgsqkm + 
  NNI17$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm +
  NNI17$n_human_food_waste - 
  NNI17$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm


```

# StreamCat Data
```{r}

library(fst)

# Converter
Cat_HUC12 = read.csv("D:/Data/Spatial/COMID_HUC12_st_join_cat_centroids.csv") # new

# Add leading zeros
Cat_HUC12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(Cat_HUC12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) # add zero in front of any 


catcals = c('COMID','AgKffactCat','AgKffactWs','BFICat','BFIWs',
            'ElevCat','ElevWs','Precip8110Cat','Precip8110Ws',
            'PctAlluvCoastCat','PctAlluvCoastWs','OmCat','OmWs',
            'Precip_Minus_EVTCat','Precip_Minus_EVTWs','PermCat','PermWs',
            'Tmean8110Cat','Tmean8110Ws','PctDecid2019Cat','PctDecid2019Ws',
            'PctConif2019Cat','PctConif2019Ws','PctMxFst2019Cat','PctMxFst2019Ws',
            'PctCrop2019Cat','PctCrop2019Ws','PopDen2010Cat','PopDen2010Ws',
            'WaterInputCat','WaterInputWs','wdrw_LDCat','wdrw_LDWs',
            'PctHay2019Cat','PctHay2019Ws','PctShrb2019Cat','PctShrb2019Ws',
            'PctGrs2019Cat','PctGrs2019Ws','FertCat','FertWs',
            'Fe2O3Cat','Fe2O3Ws','N_TW2010Cat','N_TW2010Ws',
            'NOXI_TW2010Cat','NOXI_TW2010Ws','NRED_TW2010Cat','NRED_TW2010Ws',
            'PctCarbResidCat','PctCarbResidWs',"PctSSACat",'PctSSAWs',
            'PctNonCarbResidCat','PctNonCarbResidWs',
            "HydrlCondCat",'HydrlCondWs',"PctImp2016Cat",'PctImp2016Ws',
            'WtDepCat','WtDepWs','CBNFCat','CBNFWs','SandCat','SandWs',
            'RockNCat','RockNWs','ManureCat','ManureWs')

StreamCat_sub <- read_fst("D:/Data/All_StreamCat_Vars_2022.fst",
                columns =  catcals)

streamcat.vars.v2 <- read_fst("D:/Data/Cat.All.Vars2_All_Cats.fst",
                              columns =  c('COMID','AgDrain_pctCat','AgDrain_pctWs',
                                           "Hillslope_PctCat",'Hillslope_PctWs',
                                           "NHDslope_Pct_Cat",'NHDslope_Pct_Ws',
                                        'N_TW2012Cat','N_TW2012Ws','S_TW2012Cat','S_TW2012Ws',
                                           'NANI_kgkm2_Cat','NANI_kgkm2_Ws','CatAreaSqKm','WsAreaSqKm'))

sc_data <- read_fst("D:/Data/StreamCat_temp_precip_9120.fst",
                              columns =  c('COMID','precip9120cat','precip9120ws',"tmean9120cat",'tmean9120ws'))

sc_data2 <- read_fst("D:/Data/StreamCat_rckdep_wetindex_perm_nani.fst")
sc_data3 <- read_fst("D:/Data/StreamCat_wetlands2011.fst"#,
                              #columns =  c('COMID','pctwdwet2011cat',"pcthbwet2011cat")
                     )

#sc_p_surp <- read_fst("D:/Data/StreamCat_NNI_P_Surp_2017.fst")
sc_n_surp <- read_fst("D:/Data/StreamCat_NNI_N_Surp_2017.fst")
sc_runoff <- read_fst("D:/Data/StreamCat_runoff.fst")
#sc_p_dep <- read_fst("D:/Data/StreamCat_P_deposition_2012.fst")

StreamCat_wetland = read_fst("D:/Data/All_StreamCat_Vars_2022.fst",
                columns =  c('COMID','PctHbWet2011Cat','PctWdWet2011Cat',
                             'PctHbWet2019Cat','PctWdWet2019Cat',
                             'PctHbWet2011Ws','PctWdWet2011Ws',
                             'PctHbWet2019Ws','PctWdWet2019Ws')) 
StreamCat_wetland$Pct_Wetland_2011Cat = 
  StreamCat_wetland$PctHbWet2011Cat + StreamCat_wetland$PctWdWet2011Cat 
StreamCat_wetland$Pct_Wetland_2019Cat = 
  StreamCat_wetland$PctHbWet2019Cat + StreamCat_wetland$PctWdWet2019Cat
StreamCat_wetland$Pct_Wetland_2011Ws = 
  StreamCat_wetland$PctHbWet2011Ws + StreamCat_wetland$PctWdWet2011Ws 
StreamCat_wetland$Pct_Wetland_2019Ws = 
  StreamCat_wetland$PctHbWet2019Ws + StreamCat_wetland$PctWdWet2019Ws

StreamCat_wetland = 
  subset(StreamCat_wetland,
         select = c(COMID,Pct_Wetland_2011Cat,Pct_Wetland_2019Cat,
                    Pct_Wetland_2011Ws,Pct_Wetland_2019Ws))



StreamCat_sub = merge(StreamCat_sub,streamcat.vars.v2,by='COMID')
StreamCat_sub = merge(StreamCat_sub,sc_data,by='COMID')
StreamCat_sub = merge(StreamCat_sub,sc_data2,by='COMID')
StreamCat_sub = merge(StreamCat_sub,sc_data3,by='COMID')
StreamCat_sub = merge(StreamCat_sub,sc_n_surp,by='COMID')
StreamCat_sub = merge(StreamCat_sub,sc_runoff,by='COMID')
StreamCat_sub = merge(StreamCat_sub,StreamCat_wetland,by='COMID')

# Get Percent Forest
StreamCat_sub$PctForest2019Cat = StreamCat_sub$PctDecid2019Cat + 
  StreamCat_sub$PctConif2019Cat + StreamCat_sub$PctMxFst2019Cat 
StreamCat_sub$PctForest2019Ws = StreamCat_sub$PctDecid2019Ws + 
  StreamCat_sub$PctConif2019Ws + StreamCat_sub$PctMxFst2019Ws 




# Convert StreamCat N Surplus to area waited value
StreamCat_sub$N_Surp_kgsqkm_2017ws = StreamCat_sub$N_Surp_2017ws / StreamCat_sub$WsAreaSqKm
StreamCat_sub$N_Surp_kgsqkm_2017cat = StreamCat_sub$N_Surp_2017cat / StreamCat_sub$CatAreaSqKm

StreamCat_sub = 
  subset(StreamCat_sub, 
         select= -c(PctDecid2019Cat,PctConif2019Cat,PctMxFst2019Cat,
                    Tmean8110Cat,Precip8110Cat,N_Surp_2017ws,N_Surp_2017cat))


# Summarize by HUC12
StreamCat_HU12_ = merge(StreamCat_sub,Cat_HUC12,by='COMID')

StreamCat_HU12 = StreamCat_HU12_ %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize_all(mean)





```

# HUC12 Poly Shapefile
```{r}


# fgd = "C:/Users/mpennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/ArcGIS/Boundaries/HUC/wbdhu12_a_us_september2020.gdb"
# huc12_s <- sf::st_read(dsn = fgd, layer = "WBDHU12")
# dim(huc12_s)

# fgd = "D:/EnviroAtlas/NHDPlusV2_WBDSnapshot_EnviroAtlas_CONUS.gdb"
# huc12_s <- sf::st_read(dsn = fgd, layer = "NHDPlusV2_WBDSnapshot_EnviroAtlas_CONUS")
# dim(huc12_s) # 82915     
# 
# huc12_s <- st_transform(huc12_s, CRS("+init=epsg:26978"))
# 
# names(huc12_s)[which(colnames(huc12_s)=="Shape")] = "geometry"
# huc12_s = st_as_sf(huc12_s)
# st_geometry(huc12_s) <- "geometry"

fgd = "D:/EnviroAtlas/NHDPlusV2_WBDSnapshot_EnviroAtlas_CONUS.gdb"
huc12_s <- sf::st_read(dsn = fgd, layer = "NHDPlusV2_WBDSnapshot_EnviroAtlas_CONUS")
huc12_Atlas = as.data.frame(huc12_s$HUC_12); names(huc12_Atlas)[1] = 'HUC12'

names(huc12_s)[which(colnames(huc12_s)=="Shape")] = "geometry"
huc12_s = st_as_sf(huc12_s)
st_geometry(huc12_s) <- "geometry"
huc12_s <- st_transform(huc12_s, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

# Add on area in m2
huc12_s$area = st_area(huc12_s)
huc12_s$huc12_area_m2 = as.numeric(huc12_s$area)
huc12_s = subset(huc12_s, select= -c(area))
#huc12_df = st_drop_geometry(huc12_s)
#huc12_s$HUC12 = huc12_s$

huc12_s$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(huc12_s$HUC_12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) # add zero in front of any 

huc12_df = as.data.frame(huc12_s)

```

```{r}
sp_dir = "D:/Data/Spatial/NHDPlusV2_Centroids/"
Cat01_p = st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat01_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat02_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat02_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat03N_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat03N_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat03S_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat03S_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat03W_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat03W_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat04_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat04_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat05_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat05_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat06_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat06_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat07_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat07_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat08_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat08_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat09_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat09_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat10L_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat10L_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat10U_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat10U_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat11_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat11_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat12_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat12_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat13_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat13_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat14_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat14_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat15_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat15_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat16_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat16_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat17_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat17_centroid_point.shp'))
Cat18_p=st_read(paste0(sp_dir,'NHDPlusV2_Cat18_centroid_point.shp'))

cats_p = rbind(Cat01_p,Cat02_p,Cat03N_p,Cat03S_p,Cat03W_p,
               Cat04_p,Cat05_p,Cat06_p,Cat07_p,Cat08_p,Cat09_p,
               Cat10L_p,Cat10U_p,Cat11_p,Cat12_p,Cat13_p,Cat14_p,
               Cat15_p,Cat16_p,Cat17_p,Cat18_p)


projection(cats_p)
projection(states_conus)

```


# * N Treatment by PWSID 05-2021
* Comes from the "Treatment_All_PWSID.Rmd" file in the Paper 7 Trends Causes Folder
```{r}

m_dir = 'C:/Users/mpennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/'

PWS_N_Treat_All = read.csv(paste0(m_dir, 'Projects/Data/NO3_Treatment05to21_byPWSID.csv'))


# Look at treatment numbers for GW vs. SW

treat_gwsw = merge(PWS_N_Treat_All,PWS_inventory_gwsw,by='PWSID')

treat_gwsw = unique(treat_gwsw[,c("PWSID","Nitrate.Treatment","GW.or.SW")])
treat_gwsw = treat_gwsw[treat_gwsw$Nitrate.Treatment == 'Nitrate Removal',]

treat_gw = treat_gwsw[treat_gwsw$GW.or.SW == 'Groundwater',]
treat_sw = treat_gwsw[treat_gwsw$GW.or.SW == 'Surface water',]

# This gives proportion off PWS with NO3 Treatment that are GW or SW
100*nrow(treat_gw)/(nrow(treat_gw)+nrow(treat_sw)) # 94.95192
100*nrow(treat_sw)/(nrow(treat_gw)+nrow(treat_sw)) # 5.048077

# This gives proportion of all SW PWS that have NO3 Treatment


# This gives proportion of all GW PWS that have NO3 Treatment

treat_gwsw2 = merge(PWS_inventory_gwsw, unique(PWS_N_Treat_All[,c("PWSID","Nitrate.Treatment")]),by='PWSID',all.x=T)

treat_gw2 = treat_gwsw2[treat_gwsw2$GW.or.SW == 'Groundwater',]
treat_sw2 = treat_gwsw2[treat_gwsw2$GW.or.SW == 'Surface water',]

treat_gw3 = treat_gw2[complete.cases(treat_gw2[,c("Nitrate.Treatment")]),] 
treat_sw3 = treat_sw2[complete.cases(treat_sw2[,c("Nitrate.Treatment")]),] 

100*nrow(treat_gw3)/nrow(treat_gw2) # 8.32821
100*nrow(treat_sw3)/nrow(treat_sw2) # 5.273668


```

# Summarize Treatment by Catchment
```{r}

temp_N_treat = merge(PWS_inventory_gwsw,
                     unique(PWS_N_Treat_All[,c('PWSID','Nitrate.Treatment')]),
                            by='PWSID',all.x=T)

temp_N_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_yn =
  ifelse(temp_N_treat$Nitrate.Treatment == "Nitrate Removal",1,0)
temp_N_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_yn[is.na(temp_N_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_yn)] <- 0
temp_N_treat2 = unique(subset(temp_N_treat,select=c(PWSID,GW.or.SW,Nitrate_Treatment_yn)))

N_treat_gw. = temp_N_treat2[temp_N_treat2$GW.or.SW == 'Groundwater',]
N_treat_sw. = temp_N_treat2[temp_N_treat2$GW.or.SW == 'Surface water',]

N_treat_gw. = merge(N_treat_gw.,PWS_COMID,by="PWSID")
N_treat_sw. = merge(N_treat_sw.,PWS_COMID,by="PWSID")
N_treat_gwsw. = merge(temp_N_treat2,PWS_COMID,by="PWSID")

N_treat_cat_gw = N_treat_gw. %>% group_by(COMID) %>% summarize(Nitrate_Treatment_freq = sum(Nitrate_Treatment_yn))
N_treat_cat_sw = N_treat_sw. %>% group_by(COMID) %>% summarize(Nitrate_Treatment_freq = sum(Nitrate_Treatment_yn))
N_treat_cat_gwsw = N_treat_gwsw. %>% group_by(COMID) %>% summarize(Nitrate_Treatment_freq = sum(Nitrate_Treatment_yn))

N_treat_cat_gw$Nitrate_Treatment_yn = ifelse(N_treat_cat_gw$Nitrate_Treatment_freq > 0,1,0)
N_treat_cat_sw$Nitrate_Treatment_yn = ifelse(N_treat_cat_sw$Nitrate_Treatment_freq > 0,1,0)
N_treat_cat_gwsw$Nitrate_Treatment_yn = ifelse(N_treat_cat_gwsw$Nitrate_Treatment_freq > 0,1,0)

length(unique(N_treat_cat_gw$COMID)) # 116541
length(unique(N_treat_cat_sw$COMID)) # 15241

```

# Summarize Treatment by HUC12
```{r}

temp_N_treat = merge(PWS_inventory_gwsw,
                     unique(PWS_N_Treat_All[,c('PWSID','Nitrate.Treatment')]),
                            by='PWSID',all.x=T)

temp_N_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_yn =
  ifelse(temp_N_treat$Nitrate.Treatment == "Nitrate Removal",1,0)
temp_N_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_yn[is.na(temp_N_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_yn)] <- 0
temp_N_treat2 = unique(subset(temp_N_treat,select=c(PWSID,GW.or.SW,Nitrate_Treatment_yn)))

N_treat_gw = temp_N_treat2[temp_N_treat2$GW.or.SW == 'Groundwater',]
N_treat_sw = temp_N_treat2[temp_N_treat2$GW.or.SW == 'Surface water',]

N_treat_gw = merge(N_treat_gw,PWS_HUC12,by="PWSID")
N_treat_sw = merge(N_treat_sw,PWS_HUC12,by="PWSID")
N_treat_gwsw = merge(temp_N_treat2,PWS_HUC12,by="PWSID")

N_treat_huc12_gw = N_treat_gw %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize(Nitrate_Treatment_freq = sum(Nitrate_Treatment_yn))
N_treat_huc12_sw = N_treat_sw %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize(Nitrate_Treatment_freq = sum(Nitrate_Treatment_yn))
N_treat_huc12_gwsw = N_treat_gwsw %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize(Nitrate_Treatment_freq = sum(Nitrate_Treatment_yn))

N_treat_huc12_gw$Nitrate_Treatment_yn = ifelse(N_treat_huc12_gw$Nitrate_Treatment_freq > 0,1,0)
N_treat_huc12_sw$Nitrate_Treatment_yn = ifelse(N_treat_huc12_sw$Nitrate_Treatment_freq > 0,1,0)
N_treat_huc12_gwsw$Nitrate_Treatment_yn = ifelse(N_treat_huc12_gwsw$Nitrate_Treatment_freq > 0,1,0)

summary(N_treat_huc12_gw$Nitrate_Treatment_freq)
summary(N_treat_huc12_sw$Nitrate_Treatment_freq)
summary(N_treat_huc12_gwsw$Nitrate_Treatment_freq)

length(unique(N_treat_huc12_gw$HUC12))
length(unique(N_treat_huc12_sw$HUC12))
length(unique(N_treat_huc12_gwsw$HUC12))

```


# Load Treatment by HUC
* This came from "Treatment_HUCs.Rmd"
```{r}

Ntreat_HU12 = read.csv(paste0(m_dir, 'Projects/Data/NO3_Treatment05to21_HUC12.csv'))
Ntreat_HU12_yrs = read.csv(paste0(m_dir, 'Projects/Data/NO3_Treatment05to21_HUC12_yrs.csv'))

summary(Ntreat_HU12$Nitrate.Treatment)

Ntreat_HU12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(Ntreat_HU12$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) # add zero in front of any 
Ntreat_HU12_yrs$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(Ntreat_HU12_yrs$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) # add zero in front of any 

Ntreat_HU12 = unique(Ntreat_HU12)
Ntreat_HU12_yrs = unique(Ntreat_HU12_yrs)

length(unique(Ntreat_HU12$HUC12))


```


#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Merge DEP & NNI
```{r}

nni_dep = NNI[,c("HUC12","YEAR","area_sqkm",
                 'n_total_emis_kgsqkm','n_atm_dep_kgsqkm',
                 'nox_total_emis_kgsqkm','nox_total_emis_kgsqkm',
                 'nhx_total_emis_kgsqkm')]

levels(factor(nni_dep$YEAR))

dep_N_hu12_nni_ = merge(dep_N_hu12,nni_dep,by='HUC12')

dep_N_hu12_nni = dep_N_hu12_nni_[,c('HUC12','totalN_2010_kgNha','totalN_2055ctl_kgNha','totalN_2055ref_kgNha')]


```

# Merge ICLUS & NNI
```{r}


nni_n_LU = NNI[,c("HUC12","YEAR","area_sqkm",
                 'n_total_fert_kgsqkm','n_farm_fert_kgsqkm',
                 'n_nonfarm_fert_kgsqkm','n_manure_kgsqkm',
                 'n_livestock_prod_kgsqkm',
                 'n_crop_rem_kgsqkm','n_livestock_dem_kgsqkm','n_livestock_rec_kgsqkm',
                 'n_pasture_rem_kgsqkm','n_crop_fix_kgsqkm',
                 'n_human_food_dem_kgsqkm','n_human_food_waste_kgsqkm',
                 'n_point_source_kgsqkm')]

temp = noquote(c('cells_in_HUC_12','total_cell_count','NA_cell_count'))

LU_2050_4.5G_hu12. = 
  subset(LU_2050_4.5G_hu12, select=-c(cells_in_HUC_12,total_cell_count,NA_cell_count))
LU_2050_8.5G_hu12. = 
  subset(LU_2050_8.5G_hu12, select=-c(cells_in_HUC_12,total_cell_count,NA_cell_count))
LU_2050_4.5H_hu12. = 
  subset(LU_2050_4.5H_hu12, select=-c(cells_in_HUC_12,total_cell_count,NA_cell_count))
LU_2050_8.5H_hu12. = 
  subset(LU_2050_8.5H_hu12, select=-c(cells_in_HUC_12,total_cell_count,NA_cell_count))


LU_nni_hu12 = merge(nni_n_LU,LU_2010_hu12,by='HUC12')
LU_nni_hu12 = merge(LU_nni_hu12,LU_2050_4.5G_hu12.,by='HUC12')
LU_nni_hu12 = merge(LU_nni_hu12,LU_chg_4.5G_hu12,by='HUC12')
LU_nni_hu12 = merge(LU_nni_hu12,LU_2050_8.5G_hu12.,by='HUC12')
LU_nni_hu12 = merge(LU_nni_hu12,LU_chg_8.5G_hu12,by='HUC12')

LU_nni_hu12 = merge(LU_nni_hu12,LU_2050_4.5H_hu12.,by='HUC12')
LU_nni_hu12 = merge(LU_nni_hu12,LU_chg_4.5H_hu12,by='HUC12')
LU_nni_hu12 = merge(LU_nni_hu12,LU_2050_8.5H_hu12.,by='HUC12')
LU_nni_hu12 = merge(LU_nni_hu12,LU_chg_8.5H_hu12,by='HUC12')

LU_nni_hu12 = merge(LU_nni_hu12,imprv_hu12,by='HUC12')

```

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Change Ratio - Ag Land
```{r}

# Get the Land Use grouped together
LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_2010= 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_2010 + 
  #LU_nni_hu12$area_05.grazing_landuse_2010 +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_06.pasture_landuse_2010

LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_RCP4.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS+ 
  #LU_nni_hu12$area_05.grazing_landuse_RCP4.5GISS +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP4.5GISS
LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_RCP8.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP8.5GISS+ 
  #LU_nni_hu12$area_05.grazing_landuse_RCP8.5GISS +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP8.5GISS
LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_RCP4.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem+ 
  #LU_nni_hu12$area_05.grazing_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem
LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_RCP8.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem+ 
  #LU_nni_hu12$area_05.grazing_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem

# Calculate Change Ratio (the multiplier for calculating how much mass of N changed)
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_RCP4.5G / LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_RCP8.5G / LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_RCP4.5H / LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_RCP8.5H / LU_nni_hu12$area_ag_2010
summary(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5G)

# Change Ratio for Crop Land only
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS / LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP8.5GISS / LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem / LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem / LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_2010
summary(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G)

# Convert change ratio to NA if zero value in 2010

LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5G[is.infinite(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5G)] = NA
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5G[is.infinite(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5G)] = NA
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5H[is.infinite(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5H)] = NA
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5H[is.infinite(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5H)] = NA

LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G[is.infinite(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G)] = NA
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G[is.infinite(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G)] = NA
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H[is.infinite(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H)] = NA
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H[is.infinite(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H)] = NA

nrow(LU_nni_hu12)
nrow(LU_nni_hu12[complete.cases(LU_nni_hu12[,c("change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5G")]),]) 

nrow(LU_nni_hu12[complete.cases(LU_nni_hu12[,c("change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G")]),]) 

# If change ratio is NA, but there is cropland in future scenario, replace change ratio with average change ratio

# mean(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G,na.rm=T)
# 
# LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G = 
#   ifelse(LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS >0 & 
#            is.na(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G),
#          mean(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G,na.rm=T),
#          LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G )
# nrow(LU_nni_hu12[complete.cases(LU_nni_hu12[,c("change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G")]),]) 
# 
# LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G = 
#   ifelse(LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP8.5GISS >0 & 
#            is.na(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G),
#          mean(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G,na.rm=T),
#          LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G )
# 
# LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H = 
#   ifelse(LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem >0 & 
#            is.na(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H),
#          mean(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H,na.rm=T),
#          LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H )
# 
# LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H = 
#   ifelse(LU_nni_hu12$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem >0 & 
#            is.na(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H),
#          mean(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H,na.rm=T),
#          LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H )

# If Change ratio is NA (meaning 0% ag/crop in 2010) convert to 1 (meaning no change)
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5G = 
  ifelse(is.na(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5G),1,LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5G)
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5G = 
  ifelse(is.na(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5G),1,LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5G)
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5H = 
  ifelse(is.na(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5H),1,LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5H)
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5H = 
  ifelse(is.na(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5H),1,LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5H)

LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G = 
  ifelse(is.na(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G),1,LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G)
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G = 
  ifelse(is.na(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G),1,LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G)
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H = 
  ifelse(is.na(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H),1,LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H)
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H = 
  ifelse(is.na(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H),1,LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H)

# LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G = 
#   ifelse(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G==0,1,LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G)
# LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G = 
#   ifelse(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G==0,1,LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G)
# LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H = 
#   ifelse(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H==0,1,LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H)
# LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H = 
#   ifelse(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H==0,1,LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H)



summary(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H)



```

# Change Ratio - Livestock Land
```{r}

# Get the Land Use grouped together
LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_2010 = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_05.grazing_landuse_2010 +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_06.pasture_landuse_2010

LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_RCP4.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_05.grazing_landuse_RCP4.5GISS +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP4.5GISS
LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_RCP8.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_05.grazing_landuse_RCP8.5GISS +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP8.5GISS
LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_RCP4.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_05.grazing_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem
LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_RCP8.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_05.grazing_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem

# Calculate Change Ratio (the multiplier for calculating how much mass of N changed)
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_livestock_RCP4.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_RCP4.5G / LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_livestock_RCP8.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_RCP8.5G / LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_livestock_RCP4.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_RCP4.5H / LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_livestock_RCP8.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_RCP8.5H / LU_nni_hu12$area_livestock_2010

summary(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_livestock_RCP4.5G)

```


# Farm Fert
```{r}

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Calculations (change_area units = m2)

summary(LU_nni_hu12$change_area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS )



# Get mass of N 2010
LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010 = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm * LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm

# Get mass of N in 2050
# LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP4.5G = 
#   LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5G * LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010
# LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP8.5G = 
#   LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5G * LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010
# LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP4.5H = 
#   LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5H * LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010
# LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP8.5H = 
#   LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5H * LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010

LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP4.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G * LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP8.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G * LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP4.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H * LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP8.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H * LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010

# Get area weighted N
LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP4.5G / LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm
LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP8.5G / LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm
LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP4.5H / LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm
LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP8.5H / LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm

# Change
LU_nni_hu12$change_n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G = LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G - LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G = LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G - LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H = LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H - LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H = LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H - LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010


summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_2010)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP4.5G)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP8.5G)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP4.5H)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kg_RCP8.5H)

summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H)




```

# Manure N
```{r}
# 

# Get mass of N 2010
LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010 = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kgsqkm * LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm

# Get mass of N in 2050
# LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP4.5G = 
#   LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5G * LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010
# LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP8.5G = 
#   LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5G * LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010
# LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP4.5H = 
#   LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5H * LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010
# LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP8.5H = 
#   LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_ag_RCP8.5H * LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010

LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP4.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G * LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP8.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5G * LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP4.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5H * LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP8.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_crop_RCP8.5H * LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010

# Get area weighted N
LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP4.5G / LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm
LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP8.5G / LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm
LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP4.5H / LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm
LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP8.5H / LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm

# Change
LU_nni_hu12$change_n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G = LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G - LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G = LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G - LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H = LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H - LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$change_n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H = LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H - LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010


summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_2010)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP4.5G)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP8.5G)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP4.5H)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kg_RCP8.5H)

summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G)
```

# Livestock? (Same as manure?)
*Q? should change ratio be based on ag land or just pasture land? 
```{r}

  
# Get mass of N 2010
LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_dem_kg_2010 = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_dem_kgsqkm * LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm
LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_prod_kg_2010 = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_prod_kgsqkm * LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm
LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_rec_kg_2010 = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_rec_kgsqkm * LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm

# Get mass of N in 2050
LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_dem_kg_RCP4.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_livestock_RCP4.5G * LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_dem_kg_2010
LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_dem_kg_RCP8.5G =

LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_dem_kg_RCP4.5H =

LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_dem_kg_RCP8.5H =

  LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_livestock_RCP8.5G * LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_prod_kg_2010

LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_rec_kg_RCP8.5H =

LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_dem_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_dem_kg_RCP8.5G / LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm
LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_dem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H =

LU_nni_hu12$n_livestock_dem_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H =
```

# Human (demand & Waste)
* Need to fix issue of zero pop density where StreamCat has Pop Value and NNI has human demand value
* From QA Checklist metadata tab, "popdens_2010_nm2" = population density (#/m2) in 2010
* There is no population_2010 listed in the metadata, so this field must be the pop density (same with "population_RCP4.5GISS", etc.)
```{r}


popden_hu12 = merge(popden_hu12_[,c('HUC12','population_2010','population_RCP4.5GISS',
                                    'population_RCP4.5Hadgem','population_RCP8.5Hadgem',
                                    'change_population_RCP4.5GISS',
                                    'change_population_RCP4.5Hadgem',
                                    'change_population_RCP8.5Hadgem')],
                    unique(NNI[,c("HUC12","area_sqkm","n_human_food_waste_kgsqkm",
                                  "n_human_food_dem_kgsqkm")]),by='HUC12')

popden_hu12 = merge(popden_hu12,StreamCat_HU12[,c('HUC12','PopDen2010Cat')],by='HUC12') 

#popden_hu12$Pop2010Cat = popden_hu12$PopDen2010Cat * popden_hu12$area_sqkm

popden_hu12$pop_den_2010 = popden_hu12$population_2010 * 10^6 #converts the current untis of #/m2 to #/km2)
popden_hu12$pop_den_RCP4.5G = popden_hu12$population_RCP4.5GISS * 10^6 #converts the current untis of #/m2 to #/km2 
#popden_hu12$pop_den_RCP8.5G = popden_hu12$population_RCP8.5GISS * 10^6 #converts the current untis of #/m2 to #/km2  this data isn't available
popden_hu12$pop_den_RCP4.5H = popden_hu12$population_RCP4.5Hadgem * 10^6 #converts the current untis of #/m2 to #/km2 
popden_hu12$pop_den_RCP8.5H = popden_hu12$population_RCP8.5Hadgem  * 10^6 #converts the current untis of #/m2 to #/km2 

# Calculate Change Ratio (the multiplier for calculating how much mass of food changed)
popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5G = 
  popden_hu12$pop_den_RCP4.5G / popden_hu12$pop_den_2010 #popden_hu12$population_2010
popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5H = 
  popden_hu12$pop_den_RCP4.5H / popden_hu12$pop_den_2010 #popden_hu12$population_2010
popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP8.5H = 
  popden_hu12$pop_den_RCP8.5H / popden_hu12$pop_den_2010 # popden_hu12$population_2010

# If Change in Pop is zero, convert change ratio to zero
popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5G = 
  ifelse(popden_hu12$change_population_RCP4.5GISS==0,0,popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5G)
popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5H = 
  ifelse(popden_hu12$change_population_RCP4.5Hadgem==0,0,popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5H)
popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP8.5H = 
  ifelse(popden_hu12$change_population_RCP8.5Hadgem==0,0,popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP8.5H)


# Verify if change ratio is same when use pop density (yes it does)
# popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5G_ = 
#   popden_hu12$pop_den_RCP4.5G / popden_hu12$pop_den_2010
# summary(popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5G) 
# summary(popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5G_) 

# Get mass of N 2010
popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_2010 = 
  popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kgsqkm * popden_hu12$area_sqkm
popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_2010 = 
  popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kgsqkm * popden_hu12$area_sqkm

# Get mass of N in 2050
popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_RCP4.5G = 
  popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5G * popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_2010
popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_RCP4.5H = 
  popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5H * popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_2010
popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_RCP8.5H = 
  popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP8.5H * popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_2010

popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_RCP4.5G = 
  popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5G * popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_2010
popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_RCP4.5H = 
  popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP4.5H * popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_2010
popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_RCP8.5H = 
  popden_hu12$change_ratio_pop_RCP8.5H * popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_2010

# Get area normalized value
popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G = 
  popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_RCP4.5G / popden_hu12$area_sqkm
popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H = 
  popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_RCP4.5H / popden_hu12$area_sqkm
popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H = 
  popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_RCP8.5H / popden_hu12$area_sqkm

popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G = 
  popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_RCP4.5G / popden_hu12$area_sqkm
popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H = 
  popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_RCP4.5H / popden_hu12$area_sqkm
popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H = 
  popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_RCP8.5H / popden_hu12$area_sqkm


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_RCP4.5G[is.infinite(popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_RCP4.5G)] = NA
popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_RCP4.5H[is.infinite(popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_RCP4.5H)] = NA
popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_RCP8.5H[is.infinite(popden_hu12$n_human_food_dem_kg_RCP8.5H)] = NA

summary(popden_hu12$n_human_food_waste_kg_RCP4.5G)


#popden_hu12 = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 

```

# % Land Use
* Area is in units of m2 originally
```{r}


# merge on area
temp. = LU_nni_hu12

temp = merge(temp.,huc12_df[,c('HUC12','huc12_area_m2')],by='HUC12')


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# % Wetlands
temp$Pct_wetlands_2010 = 
  100*temp$area_02.wetlands_landuse_2010 / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_wetlands_RCP4.5G = 
  100*temp$area_02.wetlands_landuse_RCP4.5GISS / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_wetlands_RCP8.5G = 
  100*temp$area_02.wetlands_landuse_RCP8.5GISS / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_wetlands_RCP4.5H = 
  100*temp$area_02.wetlands_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_wetlands_RCP8.5H = 
  100*temp$area_02.wetlands_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem / temp$huc12_area_m2

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# % Forest
temp$area_forest_2010 = 
  temp$area_03.rec.conserv_landuse_2010 +
  temp$area_04.timber_landuse_2010 
temp$area_forest_RCP4.5G = 
  temp$area_03.rec.conserv_landuse_RCP4.5GISS +
  temp$area_04.timber_landuse_RCP4.5GISS
temp$area_forest_RCP8.5G = 
  temp$area_03.rec.conserv_landuse_RCP8.5GISS +
  temp$area_04.timber_landuse_RCP8.5GISS
temp$area_forest_RCP4.5H = 
  temp$area_03.rec.conserv_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem +
  temp$area_04.timber_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem
temp$area_forest_RCP8.5H = 
  temp$area_03.rec.conserv_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem +
  temp$area_04.timber_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem

temp$Pct_forest_2010 = 
  100*temp$area_forest_2010 / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_forest_RCP4.5G = 
  100*temp$area_forest_RCP4.5G / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_forest_RCP8.5G = 
  100*temp$area_forest_RCP8.5G / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_forest_RCP4.5H = 
  100*temp$area_forest_RCP4.5H / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_forest_RCP8.5H = 
  100*temp$area_forest_RCP8.5H / temp$huc12_area_m2

# % Timber
temp$Pct_timber_2010 = 
    100*temp$area_04.timber_landuse_2010 / temp$huc12_area_m2

# % Exurban
temp$Pct_exurbanLD_2010 = 
    100*temp$area_10.exurbanLD_landuse_2010/ temp$huc12_area_m2


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# % Cropland
temp$Pct_crop_land_2010 = 
  100*temp$area_07.cropland_landuse_2010 / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_crop_land_RCP4.5G = 
  100*temp$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_crop_land_RCP8.5G = 
  100*temp$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP8.5GISS / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_crop_land_RCP4.5H = 
  100*temp$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_crop_land_RCP8.5H = 
  100*temp$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem / temp$huc12_area_m2

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# % Crop + Pasture Land
temp$Pct_crop_pasture_land_2010 = 
  100*(temp$area_07.cropland_landuse_2010 + temp$area_06.pasture_landuse_2010) / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP4.5G = 
  100*(temp$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS + temp$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP4.5GISS) / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP8.5G = 
  100*(temp$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP8.5GISS + temp$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP8.5GISS) / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP4.5H = 
  100*(temp$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem + temp$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem) / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP8.5H = 
  100*(temp$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem + temp$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem) / temp$huc12_area_m2

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# % Pasture
temp$Pct_pasture_land_2010 = 
  100*temp$area_06.pasture_landuse_2010 / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_pasture_land_RCP4.5G = 
  100*temp$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP4.5GISS/ temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_pasture_land_RCP8.5G = 
  100*temp$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP8.5GISS / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_pasture_land_RCP4.5H = 
  100*temp$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_pasture_land_RCP8.5H = 
  100*temp$area_06.pasture_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem / temp$huc12_area_m2


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# % Grazing
temp$Pct_grazing_land_2010 = 
  100*temp$area_05.grazing_landuse_2010/ temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_grazing_land_RCP4.5G = 
  100*temp$area_05.grazing_landuse_RCP4.5GISS/ temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_grazing_land_RCP8.5G = 
  100*temp$area_05.grazing_landuse_RCP8.5GISS / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_grazing_land_RCP4.5H = 
  100*temp$area_05.grazing_landuse_RCP4.5Hadgem / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_grazing_land_RCP8.5H = 
  100*temp$area_05.grazing_landuse_RCP8.5Hadgem / temp$huc12_area_m2



#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# % Ag
temp$Pct_ag_land_2010 = 
  100*temp$area_ag_2010 / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_ag_land_RCP4.5G = 
  100*temp$area_ag_RCP4.5G / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_ag_land_RCP8.5G = 
  100*temp$area_ag_RCP8.5G / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_ag_land_RCP4.5H = 
  100*temp$area_ag_RCP4.5H / temp$huc12_area_m2
temp$Pct_ag_land_RCP8.5H = 
  100*temp$area_ag_RCP8.5H / temp$huc12_area_m2


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Change Calculations
temp$Change_ag_land_pct_RCP4.5G = temp$Pct_ag_land_RCP4.5G - temp$Pct_ag_land_2010
temp$Change_ag_land_pct_RCP8.5G = temp$Pct_ag_land_RCP8.5G - temp$Pct_ag_land_2010
temp$Change_ag_land_pct_RCP4.5H = temp$Pct_ag_land_RCP4.5H - temp$Pct_ag_land_2010
temp$Change_ag_land_pct_RCP8.5H = temp$Pct_ag_land_RCP8.5H - temp$Pct_ag_land_2010

temp$Change_grazing_land_pct_RCP4.5G = temp$Pct_grazing_land_RCP4.5G - temp$Pct_grazing_land_2010
temp$Change_grazing_land_pct_RCP8.5G = temp$Pct_grazing_land_RCP8.5G - temp$Pct_grazing_land_2010
temp$Change_grazing_land_pct_RCP4.5H = temp$Pct_grazing_land_RCP4.5H - temp$Pct_grazing_land_2010
temp$Change_grazing_land_pct_RCP8.5H = temp$Pct_grazing_land_RCP8.5H - temp$Pct_grazing_land_2010

temp$Change_pasture_land_pct_RCP4.5G = temp$Pct_pasture_land_RCP4.5G - temp$Pct_pasture_land_2010
temp$Change_pasture_land_pct_RCP8.5G = temp$Pct_pasture_land_RCP8.5G - temp$Pct_pasture_land_2010
temp$Change_pasture_land_pct_RCP4.5H = temp$Pct_pasture_land_RCP4.5H - temp$Pct_pasture_land_2010
temp$Change_pasture_land_pct_RCP8.5H = temp$Pct_pasture_land_RCP8.5H - temp$Pct_pasture_land_2010

temp$Change_crop_land_pct_RCP4.5G = temp$Pct_crop_land_RCP4.5G - temp$Pct_crop_land_2010
temp$Change_crop_land_pct_RCP8.5G = temp$Pct_crop_land_RCP8.5G - temp$Pct_crop_land_2010
temp$Change_crop_land_pct_RCP4.5H = temp$Pct_crop_land_RCP4.5H - temp$Pct_crop_land_2010
temp$Change_crop_land_pct_RCP8.5H = temp$Pct_crop_land_RCP8.5H - temp$Pct_crop_land_2010

temp$Change_forest_pct_RCP4.5G = temp$Pct_forest_RCP4.5G - temp$Pct_forest_2010
temp$Change_forest_pct_RCP8.5G = temp$Pct_forest_RCP8.5G - temp$Pct_forest_2010
temp$Change_forest_pct_RCP4.5H = temp$Pct_forest_RCP4.5H - temp$Pct_forest_2010
temp$Change_forest_pct_RCP8.5H = temp$Pct_forest_RCP8.5H - temp$Pct_forest_2010

temp$Change_wetlands_pct_RCP4.5G = temp$Pct_wetlands_RCP4.5G - temp$Pct_wetlands_2010
temp$Change_wetlands_pct_RCP8.5G = temp$Pct_wetlands_RCP8.5G - temp$Pct_wetlands_2010
temp$Change_wetlands_pct_RCP4.5H = temp$Pct_wetlands_RCP4.5H - temp$Pct_wetlands_2010
temp$Change_wetlands_pct_RCP8.5H = temp$Pct_wetlands_RCP8.5H - temp$Pct_wetlands_2010


LU_nni_hu12 = temp

```

# ? n_total_fert_kgsqkm vs. n_farm_fert_kgsqkm


# ?Urban N (n_nonfarm_fert_kgsqkm)
```{r}

#!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Need to decide on method for dealing with zero areas in 2010 because get 

# Get the Land Use grouped together
LU_nni_hu12$area_urb_2010= 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_10.exurbanLD_landuse_2010 + 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_11.exurbanHD_landuse_2010 +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_12.suburban_landuse_2010 +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_13.urbanLD_landuse_2010 +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_14.urbanHD_landuse_2010 +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_15.commercial_landuse_2010 +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_16.industrial_landuse_2010 +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_17.institutional_landuse_2010 +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_18.transport_landuse_2010

LU_nni_hu12$area_urb_RCP4.5G = 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_10.exurbanLD_landuse_RCP4.5GISS + 
  LU_nni_hu12$area_11.exurbanHD_landuse_RCP4.5GISS +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_12.suburban_landuse_RCP4.5GISS +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_13.urbanLD_landuse_RCP4.5GISS +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_14.urbanHD_landuse_RCP4.5GISS +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_15.commercial_landuse_RCP4.5GISS +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_16.industrial_landuse_RCP4.5GISS +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_17.institutional_landuse_RCP4.5GISS +
  LU_nni_hu12$area_18.transport_landuse_RCP4.5GISS


# Calculate Change Ratio (the multiplier for calculating how much mass of N changed)
LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_urb = LU_nni_hu12$area_urb_RCP4.5G / LU_nni_hu12$area_urb_2010
summary(LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_urb)

# Get mass of N
LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kg_2010 = LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kgsqkm * LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm

# Get mass of N in 2050
LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kg_RCP4.5G = LU_nni_hu12$change_ratio_urb * LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kg_2010


# Fix Hu12s with Inf (zero areas in 2010): base future kg N based on future area and 2010 N rate
LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kg_RCP4.5G = 
  ifelse(LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kg_RCP4.5G == "Inf",
         LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kgsqkm * LU_nni_hu12$area_urb_RCP4.5G,
         LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kg_RCP4.5G)

# Get area weighted N
LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G = LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kg_RCP4.5G / LU_nni_hu12$area_sqkm


summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kg_2010)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kg_RCP4.5G)

summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kgsqkm)
summary(LU_nni_hu12$n_nonfarm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G)


```
