# Checks
```{r}

test = merge(LU_2010_hu12,LU_2050_4.5G_hu12,by='HUC12')
test = merge(test,LU_chg_4.5G_hu12,by='HUC12')

test2 = test %>% dplyr::select(contains("_07"))

# This shows the method for calculating change_area_*
test2$chg_area = test2$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS - test2$area_07.cropland_landuse_2010
test2$chg_area_diff = 100*(test2$chg_area - test2$change_area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS)/test2$chg_area
summary(test2$chg_area_diff)

# This shows the method for calculating change_count_*
test2$chg_count = test2$count_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS - test2$count_07.cropland_landuse_2010
test2$chg_count_diff = 100*(test2$chg_count - test2$change_count_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS)/test2$chg_count
summary(test2$chg_count_diff)

# This shows the method for calculating change_pctcov_* (% cover)
test2$chg_pctcov = test2$pctcov_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS - test2$pctcov_07.cropland_landuse_2010
test2$chg_pctcov_diff = 100*(test2$chg_pctcov - test2$change_pctcov_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS)/test2$chg_pctcov
summary(test2$chg_pctcov_diff)

# This shows the method for calculating % change in area, which is not same as change_pctcov
test2$prc_chg_area = 100*(test2$area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS - test2$area_07.cropland_landuse_2010)/test2$area_07.cropland_landuse_2010
test2$prc_chg_area_diff = 100*(test2$prc_chg_area - test2$change_pctcov_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS)/test2$prc_chg_area
summary(test2$prc_chg_area_diff)


```

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# xy plot pasture/hay vs. ICLUS 
```{r}
library(hexbin)

XYplot = merge(StreamCat_HU12,LU_nni_hu12,by='HUC12')  

XYplot$crop_hay_past_streamcat = XYplot$PctHay2019Cat + XYplot$PctCrop2019Cat
XYplot$Pct_crop_land_2010_iclus = XYplot$Pct_crop_land_2010
XYplot$Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus = XYplot$Pct_crop_pasture_land_2010
#XYplot$Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus = XYplot$Pct_crop_land_2010 + XYplot$Pct_pasture_land_2010

plot(XYplot$Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus ~ XYplot$crop_hay_past_streamcat)

# remove the (0,0)

#XYplot$flag0 = ifelse(XYplot$Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus ==0 | XYplot$crop_hay_past_streamcat == 0,0,1)
XYplot$flag0 = ifelse(XYplot$Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus < 1 | XYplot$crop_hay_past_streamcat <1,0,1)

XYplot2 = XYplot[XYplot$flag0 !=0,]

XYplot2 = XYplot2[,c('HUC12','Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus','crop_hay_past_streamcat')]


# Hexplot 
ggplot(XYplot2, aes(crop_hay_past_streamcat,Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus)) +
  geom_hex()

# Density Plot
# ggplot(XYplot, aes(Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus, crop_hay_past_streamcat)) +
#   stat_density2d(geom="tile", aes(fill = ..density..), contour = FALSE) + 
#   geom_point(colour = "white")


# Calculate what % of sites have > 20% difference, etc.
XYplot$pct_diff = abs(100*(XYplot$Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus - XYplot$crop_hay_past_streamcat)/XYplot$crop_hay_past_streamcat)
XYplot$diff = abs(XYplot$Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus - XYplot$crop_hay_past_streamcat)
XYplot$diff2 = XYplot$Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus - XYplot$crop_hay_past_streamcat

summary(XYplot$pct_diff)

100*nrow(XYplot[XYplot$pct_diff > 50,])/nrow(XYplot)

# What percent of sites have values within 20% of each other
100*nrow(XYplot[XYplot$diff < 20,])/nrow(XYplot) # 86.98633

# What percent of sites have values within 10% of each other
100*nrow(XYplot[XYplot$diff < 10,])/nrow(XYplot) # 68.186

# What percent of sites have values within 5% of each other
100*nrow(XYplot[XYplot$diff > 5,])/nrow(XYplot) # 47.03043


```

# Map Current % Diff between ICLUS and StreamCt Land (ICLUS 2010)
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Current Difference btwn ICLUS & StreamCat Ag Land"

MapData = XYplot 
MapData$Variable = MapData$diff2
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  scale_fill_viridis(option="cividis",name="Diff=ICLUS-StreamCat",na.value = "white" 
                      #limits = c(0, 1)
                      )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time



```


# Spatial Model Correction for Ag land
* Goal:
*** 1. develop relationship between 2010 Iclus and Current NLCD/StreamCat with spmodel
*** 2. Use the fitted spmodel to predict 2050 StreamCat/NLCD Ag (Crop+Pasture)
*** 3. Calculate change ratio based on StreamCat Values 2050 StreamCat / 2020 StreamCat
*** 4. Use change ratio as multiplier to convert current NNI N inputs to future 2050 NNI N inputs
```{r}

library(spmodel)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(tictoc)



# Add on spatial information
ag_sp = merge(XYplot[,c('HUC12','crop_hay_past_streamcat','Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus')],
              huc12_p[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by='HUC12')
ag_sp <- st_as_sf(ag_sp) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry

# remove missing values
ag_sp = unique(na.omit(ag_sp))

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Model calibration and prediction

start_time <- Sys.time()
m0 <- splm(crop_hay_past_streamcat ~ poly(Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus, 3), data=ag_sp,
           spcov_type = "none",  # linear model, no accounty for spatial covariance
           local = list(parallel = TRUE, ncores = 12))
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 50.90884 secs
gc()

start_time <- Sys.time()
spmod0 <- splm(crop_hay_past_streamcat ~ poly(Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus, 3), data=ag_sp,
              spcov_type = "exponential",
              local = list(size = 50, method = "kmeans", parallel = TRUE, ncores = 12, var_adjust = "none"))
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 2.61594 mins
gc()


#saveRDS(spmod0, './tdep-tn-spatial-model-huc12.rds')
ns.obs.prd <- data.frame(observed = m0$obdata$Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus,
                      predicted = fitted(m0))

obs.prd <- data.frame(observed = spmod0$obdata$Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus,
                      predicted = fitted(spmod0) + fitted(spmod0, type = "spcov")$de)

error <- ns.obs.prd$observed - ns.obs.prd$predicted
ns.obs.prd_stats <- data.frame(Model = 'Non-spatial', bias = mean(error), MSPE = mean(error^2),
                             RMSPE = sqrt(mean(error^2)), cor2 = cor(ns.obs.prd$observed, ns.obs.prd$predicted)^2)

error <- obs.prd$observed - obs.prd$predicted
obs.prd_stats <- data.frame(Model = 'Spatial', bias = mean(error), MSPE = mean(error^2),
                             RMSPE = sqrt(mean(error^2)), cor2 = cor(obs.prd$observed, obs.prd$predicted)^2)

kable(rbind(ns.obs.prd_stats, 
            obs.prd_stats))
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# x-y scatter for non-spatial model
ggplot(data=ns.obs.prd, aes(x=predicted, y=observed)) + 
  geom_hex(bins = 100) + ggtitle("Non-Spatial Model - Ag Land") +
  xlim(0, max(ns.obs.prd)) + ylim(0, max(ns.obs.prd)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey", high = "red") +
  geom_abline(color='black') + theme_bw()

# x-y scatter for spatial model
ggplot(data=obs.prd, aes(x=predicted, y=observed)) + 
  geom_hex(bins = 100) + ggtitle("Spatial Model - Ag Land") +
  xlim(0, max(ns.obs.prd)) + ylim(0, max(ns.obs.prd)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey", high = "red") +
  geom_abline(color='black') + theme_bw()


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Create Future Dataset
# create dataframe with ag_data for 2050
ag2050 = LU_nni_hu12[,c('HUC12',#'Pct_crop_pasture_land_2010',
                        'Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP4.5G',
                        'Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP8.5G',
                        'Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP4.5H','Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP8.5H'
                        )]

# remove missing values
ag2050 = unique(na.omit(ag2050))

# Add on spatial information
ag2050_sp = merge(ag2050,
              huc12_p[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by='HUC12')
ag2050_sp <- st_as_sf(ag2050_sp) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Use this model to Predict 2050 NCLD (StreamCat) Ag % 

tictoc::tic()
ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G <- predict(spmod0, 
                       newdata = ag2050_sp %>% 
                         rename(Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus=Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP4.5G),# %>% slice(1:1),
                       se.fit = FALSE,
                       local = list(parallel = TRUE, 
                                    ncores = 20))
tictoc::toc()
# 134.48 sec elapsed

start_time <- Sys.time()
ag_nlcd_2050_rcp8.5G <- predict(spmod0, 
                       newdata = ag2050_sp %>% 
                         rename(Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus=Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP8.5G),# %>% slice(1:1),
                       se.fit = FALSE,
                       local = list(parallel = TRUE, 
                                    ncores = 20))
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 2.142908 mins

# Merge back on HUC12s
ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G = cbind(ag2050_sp$HUC12 ,ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G)
ag_nlcd_2050_rcp8.5G = cbind(ag2050_sp$HUC12 ,ag_nlcd_2050_rcp8.5G)


ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G = as.data.frame(ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G)
ag_nlcd_2050_rcp8.5G = as.data.frame(ag_nlcd_2050_rcp8.5G)

names(ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G)[1] = 'HUC12'
names(ag_nlcd_2050_rcp8.5G)[1] = 'HUC12'

ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G$ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G = as.numeric(ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G$ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G)
ag_nlcd_2050_rcp8.5G$ag_nlcd_2050_rcp8.5G = as.numeric(ag_nlcd_2050_rcp8.5G$ag_nlcd_2050_rcp8.5G)


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

fwrite(tdep.spmod0, './Predicted_TDEP_N_total_wet_dry_huc12.csv', row.names = F)


```

# Test Scatter
```{r}

XYplot = merge(StreamCat_HU12,LU_nni_hu12,by='HUC12')  

XYplot$crop_hay_past_2019streamcat = XYplot$PctHay2019Cat + XYplot$PctCrop2019Cat
XYplot$Pct_crop_land_2010_iclus = XYplot$Pct_crop_land_2010
XYplot$Pct_crop_pasture_2010_iclus = XYplot$Pct_crop_pasture_land_2010

test = merge(ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G,ag_nlcd_2050_rcp8.5G,by='HUC12')
test = merge(test,ag2050,by='HUC12')
test = merge(test,XYplot[,c('HUC12','Pct_crop_land_2010_iclus','crop_hay_past_2019streamcat')],by='HUC12')

test$diff2 = test$Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP4.5G - test$ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G


plot(test$ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G ~ test$Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP4.5G)

ggplot(data=test, aes(x=Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP4.5G, y=ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G)) + 
  geom_hex(bins = 100) + ggtitle("Prediced Future StreamCat") +
  xlim(0, max(ns.obs.prd)) + ylim(0, max(ns.obs.prd)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey", high = "red") +
  geom_abline(color='black') + theme_bw()

ggplot(data=test, aes(x=crop_hay_past_2019streamcat, y=ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G)) + 
  geom_hex(bins = 100) + ggtitle("Prediced Future StreamCat") +
  xlim(0, max(ns.obs.prd)) + ylim(0, max(ns.obs.prd)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey", high = "red") +
  geom_abline(color='black') + theme_bw()


# Hexplot 
# remove the (0,0)
test$flag0 = ifelse(test$Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP4.5G < 1 | test$ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G <1,0,1)
test2 = test[test$flag0 !=0,]
ggplot(test2, aes(Pct_crop_pasture_land_RCP4.5G,ag_nlcd_2050_rcp4.5G)) +
  geom_hex()



```

# Map Current % Diff between ICLUS and StreamCt Land (ICLUS 2010)
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Future Difference btwn ICLUS 2050 & StreamCat Ag Land 2050"

MapData = test 
MapData$Variable = MapData$diff2
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  scale_fill_viridis(option="cividis",name="Diff=ICLUS-StreamCat",na.value = "white" 
                      #limits = c(0, 1)
                      )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time



```

#----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# N Surplus Calc HUC12
* N Surplus = N inputs – N outputs
* N inputs = N Deposition + Fertilizer N + Livestock Manure N + Fixation N + Human Waste N  
* N outputs = N from crop removal	
```{r}


n_cols = c('HUC12'
           ,'n_farm_fert_kg_2010','n_manure_kg_2010'
           ,'n_crop_fix_kg_2010','n_crop_rem_kg_2010'
           
           ,'n_farm_fert_kgsqkm','n_manure_kgsqkm'
           ,'n_crop_fix_kgsqkm','n_crop_rem_kgsqkm'
           
           ,'n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G','n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G'
           ,'n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G','n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G'
           ,'Pct_ag_land_RCP4.5G','Pct_forest_RCP4.5G'
           
           ,'n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G','n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G'
           ,'n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G','n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G'
           ,'Pct_ag_land_RCP8.5G','Pct_forest_RCP8.5G'
           
           ,'n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H','n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H'
           ,'n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H','n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H'
           ,'Pct_ag_land_RCP4.5H','Pct_forest_RCP4.5H'
           
           ,'n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H','n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H'
           ,'n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H','n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H'
           ,'Pct_ag_land_RCP8.5H','Pct_forest_RCP8.5H')

setdiff(n_cols,colnames(LU_nni_hu12)) # gives not matching


NDATA_huc12 = LU_nni_hu12[,n_cols]




NDATA_huc12 = merge(NDATA_huc12,dep_N_hu12,by='HUC12')
NDATA_huc12 = merge(NDATA_huc12,popden_hu12,by='HUC12')



#-------------------------------------------
NDATA_huc12$N_surp_kgsqkm = 
  NDATA_huc12$totalN_2016_kgNha *100 + # convert from ha to km2 
  NDATA_huc12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_manure_kgsqkm + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm +
  NDATA_huc12$n_human_food_waste_kgsqkm - 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm

NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_kgsqkm = 
  NDATA_huc12$totalN_2016_kgNha *100 + # convert from ha to km2 
  NDATA_huc12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_manure_kgsqkm + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm +
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm


#-------------------------------------------
NDATA_huc12$N_surp_RCP4.5G = 
  NDATA_huc12$totalN_2055ctl_kgNha *100 + # convert from ha to km2 
  NDATA_huc12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G +
  NDATA_huc12$n_human_food_waste_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G - 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G

summary(NDATA_huc12$N_surp_RCP4.5G)
summary(NDATA_huc12$totalN_2055ctl_kgNha)
summary(NDATA_huc12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G)
summary(NDATA_huc12$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G)
summary(NDATA_huc12$n_human_food_waste_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G)
summary(NDATA_huc12$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G)


NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_RCP4.5G = 
  NDATA_huc12$totalN_2055ctl_kgNha *100 + # convert from ha to km2
  NDATA_huc12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G +
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G

#-------------------------------------------
NDATA_huc12$N_surp_RCP8.5G = 
  NDATA_huc12$totalN_2055ctl_kgNha *100 + # convert from ha to km2
  NDATA_huc12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G +
  NDATA_huc12$n_human_food_waste_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G - #!!! 8.5G isn't available
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G
  
NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_RCP8.5G = 
  NDATA_huc12$totalN_2055ctl_kgNha *100 + # convert from ha to km2
  NDATA_huc12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G +
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP8.5G

#-------------------------------------------
NDATA_huc12$N_surp_RCP4.5H = 
  NDATA_huc12$totalN_2055ctl_kgNha *100 + # convert from ha to km2 
  NDATA_huc12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H +
  NDATA_huc12$n_human_food_waste_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H - 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H
  
NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_RCP4.5H = 
  NDATA_huc12$totalN_2055ctl_kgNha *100 + # convert from ha to km2 
  NDATA_huc12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H +
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5H

#-------------------------------------------
NDATA_huc12$N_surp_RCP8.5H = 
  NDATA_huc12$totalN_2055ctl_kgNha *100 + # convert from ha to km2 
  NDATA_huc12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H +
  NDATA_huc12$n_human_food_waste_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H - 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H
  
NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_RCP8.5H = 
  NDATA_huc12$totalN_2055ctl_kgNha *100 + # convert from ha to km2
  NDATA_huc12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H + 
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H +
  NDATA_huc12$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP8.5H

summary(NDATA_huc12$N_surp_RCP4.5G)

# Change in Surplus
NDATA_huc12$change_N_surp_RCP4.5G = NDATA_huc12$N_surp_RCP4.5G - NDATA_huc12$N_surp_kgsqkm
NDATA_huc12$change_N_surp_RCP8.5G = NDATA_huc12$N_surp_RCP8.5G - NDATA_huc12$N_surp_kgsqkm
NDATA_huc12$change_N_surp_RCP4.5H = NDATA_huc12$N_surp_RCP4.5H - NDATA_huc12$N_surp_kgsqkm
NDATA_huc12$change_N_surp_RCP8.5H = NDATA_huc12$N_surp_RCP8.5H - NDATA_huc12$N_surp_kgsqkm

NDATA_huc12$change_N_ag_surp_RCP4.5G = NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_RCP4.5G - NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_kgsqkm
NDATA_huc12$change_N_ag_surp_RCP8.5G = NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_RCP8.5G - NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_kgsqkm
NDATA_huc12$change_N_ag_surp_RCP4.5H = NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_RCP4.5H - NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_kgsqkm
NDATA_huc12$change_N_ag_surp_RCP8.5H = NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_RCP8.5H - NDATA_huc12$N_ag_surp_kgsqkm

```

# NANI Calc
* NANI = N_dep + N_fert + N_ag_fix + N_crop_prod + N_human + N_livestock - N_exports (N_emissions + N_animal_prod + N_animal_consumption + N_human_cons)
```{r}

NANI_huc12 = LU_nni_hu12[,c('HUC12','n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G','n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G',
                             'n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G','n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G',
                            'n_livestock_rec_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G','n_livestock_dem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G',
                            'n_livestock_prod_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G')]

NANI_huc12 = merge(NANI_huc12,dep_N_hu12_nni,by='HUC12')
NANI_huc12 = merge(NANI_huc12,popden_hu12,by='HUC12')



NANI_huc12$NANI_RCP4.5G = 
  NANI_huc12$totalN_2055ctl_kgNha +  # Input
  NANI_huc12$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G + # Input 
  NANI_huc12$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G + # Input
  NANI_huc12$n_livestock_prod_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G + # Input
  NANI_huc12$n_human_food_waste_kg_RCP4.5G - # Input
  
  NANI_huc12$n_crop_rem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G - # Loss
  NANI_huc12$n_human_food_dem_kg_RCP4.5G -  # Loss 
  NANI_huc12$n_livestock_dem_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G -  # Loss
  NANI_huc12$n_livestock_rec_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G  # Loss



```

#----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@
# RF Modeling



# Violations Data
# Prep SW Dataset - HUC12
```{r}

rf_sw = merge(viol_sw_hu12,subset(NDATA_huc12,select=-c(PopDen2010Cat)),by='HUC12')
rf_sw = merge(rf_sw,StreamCat_HU12,by='HUC12')
rf_sw = merge(rf_sw,NNI17,by='HUC12')
#rf_sw = merge(rf_sw,N_treat_huc12_sw,by='HUC12')




# Original
keeps = c("HUC12","viol_freq"

          # Land Use
          ,"PopDen2010Ws","PctForest2019Ws"#,"PctCrop2019Ws"
          ,"AgKffactWs","AgDrain_pctWs"#,"PctImp2016Ws"

          # Weather/Hydro
          ,"precip9120ws","tmean9120ws","BFIWs","Precip_Minus_EVTWs"
          ,"WaterInputWs","wdrw_LDWs"#,"HydrlCondWs"
          ,"permws"#,"runoffWs"

          # N Inputs
          ,"N_TW2012Ws","FertWs","ManureWs","RockNWs","CBNFWs"
          ,"n_surplus_kgsqkm"#,"n_ag_surplus_kgsqkm"#,"N_Surp_2017ws","NANI_kgkm2_Ws"

          # Other
          ,"Fe2O3Ws","ElevWs"#,"WtDepWs","SandWs"
          ,"NHDslope_Pct_Ws"#,"Hillslope_PctWs"#,"S_TW2012Ws","rckdepWs"
          #,'Nitrate_Treatment_freq'
  
          )

rf_sw2 = unique(na.omit(rf_sw[,keeps]))

setdiff(keeps,colnames(rf_sw)) # gives not matching


rf_sw2$Viol_Class = ifelse(rf_sw2$viol_freq >0,1,0)
levels(factor(rf_sw2$Viol_Class))

rf_sw3 = subset(rf_sw2,select=-c(HUC12,viol_freq))
nrow(rf_sw3) # 7279

write.csv(rf_sw2, file = paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_SW_HUC12.csv'), row.names=F)

data_sw_huc_ = rf_sw2
data_sw_huc = rf_sw3

```

```{r}

rf_gw = merge(viol_gw_hu12,subset(NDATA_huc12,select=-c(PopDen2010Cat)),by='HUC12')
rf_gw = merge(rf_gw,StreamCat_HU12,by='HUC12')

# Me


keeps = c("HUC12","viol_freq"
          # Land Use
          ,"PopDen2010Cat","PctForest2019Cat"#,"PctCrop2019Cat",
          ,"AgKffactCat","AgDrain_pctCat"
          
          # Weather/Hydro
          ,"precip9120ws","tmean9120cat","BFICat","Precip_Minus_EVTCat"
          ,"WaterInputCat","wdrw_LDCat"#,"PctImp2016Cat"#
          ,"permcat","HydrlCondCat"#,"runoffcat"
          
          # N Inputs
          ,"RockNCat","N_TW2012Cat","FertCat"#,"CBNFCat","ManureCat"
          ,"n_surplus_kgsqkm"#,"n_ag_surplus_kgsqkm","N_Surp_2017ws" #,"NANI_kgkm2_Ws"
          
          # Other
          ,"Fe2O3Cat","WtDepCat","Hillslope_PctCat","ElevCat"#,"SandCat"
          #,"rckdepcat" #,"S_TW2012Cat"##,"NHDslope_Pct_Cat"
          ,'Nitrate_Treatment_freq'

          )

rf_gw2 = unique(na.omit(rf_gw[,keeps]))

setdiff(keeps,colnames(rf_gw)) # gives not matching


rf_gw2$Viol_Class = ifelse(rf_gw2$viol_freq >0,1,0)
levels(factor(rf_gw2$Viol_Class))

rf_gw3 = subset(rf_gw2,select=-c(HUC12,viol_freq))
nrow(rf_gw3) # 32253

write.csv(rf_gw2, file = paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_GW_HUC12.csv'), row.names=F)
```

```{r}
rfr_sw = merge(cdc_sw_hu12,subset(NDATA_huc12,select=-c(PopDen2010Cat)),by='HUC12')
rfr_sw = merge(rfr_sw,StreamCat_HU12,by='HUC12')
rfr_sw = merge(rfr_sw,NNI17,by='HUC12')

# Just management variables
# keeps = c("HUC12","viol_freq"
#           
#           # Land Use
#           ,"PopDen2010Cat"#,"PctForest2019Cat"#,"PctCrop2019Cat"
#           ,"AgDrain_pctCat"#,"PctImp2016Cat","AgKffactCat"
#           
#           # Weather/Hydro
#           ,"precip9120ws","tmean9120cat","BFICat","Precip_Minus_EVTCat"
#           ,"WaterInputCat","wdrw_LDCat"#,"HydrlCondCat"
#           ,"permcat"#,"runoffcat"
#           
#           # N Inputs
#           ,"N_TW2012Cat","FertCat","ManureCat"#,"CBNFCat","RockNCat"
#           ,"n_surplus_kgsqkm"#,"n_ag_surplus_kgsqkm"#,"N_Surp_2017ws","NANI_kgkm2_Ws"

#           #,"Fe2O3Cat"#,"ElevCat"#,"WtDepCat","Hillslope_PctCat","SandCat"
#           ,"NHDslope_Pct_Cat"#,"S_TW2012Cat","rckdepcat" 
#           
#           )

# Original
keeps = c("HUC12","mean_conc"

          # Land Use
          ,"PopDen2010Cat","PctForest2019Cat"#,"PctCrop2019Cat"
          ,"AgKffactCat","AgDrain_pctCat"#,"PctImp2016Cat"

          # Weather/Hydro
          ,"precip9120ws","tmean9120cat","BFICat","Precip_Minus_EVTCat"
          ,"WaterInputCat","wdrw_LDCat"#,"HydrlCondCat"
          ,"permcat"#,"runoffcat"

          # N Inputs
          ,"RockNCat","N_TW2012Cat","FertCat","ManureCat","CBNFCat"
          ,"n_surplus_kgsqkm"#,"n_ag_surplus_kgsqkm"#,"N_Surp_2017ws","NANI_kgkm2_Ws"

          # Other
          ,"Fe2O3Cat","ElevCat"#,"WtDepCat","Hillslope_PctCat","SandCat"
          ,"NHDslope_Pct_Cat"#,"S_TW2012Cat","rckdepcat"

          )

rfr_sw2 = unique(na.omit(rfr_sw[,keeps]))

#setdiff(keeps,colnames(rf_sw)) # gives not matching



rfr_sw3 = subset(rfr_sw2,select=-c(HUC12))
nrow(rfr_sw3) # 7279

#write.csv(rfr_sw2, file = paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_SW_HUC12.csv'), row.names=F)

dataR_sw_huc_ = rfr_sw2
```

```{r}
# Me

          # Land Use
          ,"PopDen2010Cat","PctForest2019Cat"#,"PctCrop2019Cat",
          ,"AgKffactCat","AgDrain_pctCat"
          
          # Weather/Hydro

          # N Inputs
```

# Correlation Matrix table
* for SW, correlated variables are (>0.7): 
*** PctCrop2019Cat & FertCat, CBNFCat, AgKffactCat, AgDrain_pctCat
*** PctImp2016Cat & PopDen2010Cat; 
*** precip9120ws & Precip_Minus_EVTCat, runoffcat
*** permcat & SandCat

* for GW, correlated variables are (>0.7): 
*** PctCrop2019Cat & FertCat, CBNFCat, AgKffactCat, AgDrain_pctCat, n_surplus_kgsqkm
*** PctImp2016Cat & PopDen2010Cat 
*** precip9120ws & Precip_Minus_EVTCat, runoffcat
*** permcat & SandCat
*** HydrlCondCat & permcat, Fe2O3Cat
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

DATA = subset(data_sw_huc_,select=-c(HUC12,Viol_Class))
DATA = subset(data_gw_huc_,select=-c(HUC12,Viol_Class))

DATA = subset(data_sw_cat_,select=-c(COMID,Viol_Class))
DATA = subset(data_gw_cat_,select=-c(COMID,Viol_Class))

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()


# Generate correlation matrix (Pearson is default)
cor_matrix <- cor(DATA)
#print(cor_matrix)

cor_matrix2 = as.data.frame(cor_matrix)

```

#--


# Fit  SW model HU12
```{r}

set.seed(10) # 10 HUC12

library(ranger)
#library(mlr)
#library(smotefamily)
library(ROSE)

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
RFDATA = data_sw_huc  
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()


ntree = 500
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Train Test split
ind_test <- sample(nrow(RFDATA), round(nrow(RFDATA)*0.2))
rf_test= RFDATA[ind_test, ]
rf_train = RFDATA[-ind_test,]

rf_train_sw = rf_train
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Upsampling with SMOTE
# rf_train2 = SMOTE(X=subset(rf_train,select=-c(Viol_Class)),
#                 target=subset(rf_train,select=c(Viol_Class)), 
#                 K=5,dup_size=10)

data_balanced <- ovun.sample(Viol_Class ~ ., data = rf_train, method = "over", p = 0.5, seed = 123)$data # 0.5 give even classes

nrow(data_balanced[data_balanced$Viol_Class==1,]) # 5755
nrow(rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class==1,]) # 5755

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


# Undersampling from majority class (class = 0)
rf_train0 = rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class == 0,]
rf_train1 = rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class == 1,]
frac1 = nrow(rf_train1)/nrow(rf_train)

# Balance Dataset (due to zero inflation)
sample.frac = c(frac1,1.0) #c(0.1, 0.5) will draw 10% from the first class and 50% 
case_weights <- ifelse(rf_train$Viol_Class == 1,  1000, 1) # weighting where class = 1 higher than when class equals 0
m.try = 5
min.node = 10

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fit Model: 
rfc_sw = ranger(as.factor(Viol_Class) ~ .,
             data=rf_train, # data_balanced, rf_train
             num.trees=ntree,
             #mtry=m.try,
             #case.weights = case_weights,
             sample.fraction=sample.frac,
             #min.node.size=min.node,
             #probability = TRUE, # if want predicted probabilities in output
             importance='impurity')

rfc_sw_p = ranger(as.factor(Viol_Class) ~ .,
             data=rf_train, # data_balanced, rf_train
             num.trees=ntree,
             #mtry=m.try,
             #case.weights = case_weights,
             sample.fraction=sample.frac,
             #min.node.size=min.node,
             probability = TRUE, # if want predicted probabilities in output
             importance='impurity')



#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Evaluate
rfc_ranger= rfc_sw
rfc_ranger_p= rfc_sw_p

yobs <- as.factor(rf_test$Viol_Class)
ypred. = predict(rfc_ranger_p, data = rf_test)#,type='prob')
ypred.. = ypred.$predictions[,2] # if using predicted probability model

# ypred. = predict(rfc_ranger, data = rf_test)#,type='prob') # use if not using probability model
# ypred.. = as.numeric(as.character(ypred.$predictions)) # use if not using probability model

ypred = as.character(ifelse(ypred.. >=0.5,1,0))

n <- nrow(rf_test)
pcc  <- 100*sum(yobs == ypred) / n
sens <- 100*sum(yobs == '1' & ypred == '1') / sum(yobs=='1')
spec <- 100*sum(yobs == '0' & ypred == '0') / sum(yobs=='0')
gmean = sqrt(sens*spec) # metric used if have an unbalanced dataset


AUC = roc.area(as.numeric(as.character(ypred)), 
               as.numeric(as.character(yobs))) 


result_df = data.frame(N=nrow(RFDATA),PCC=round(pcc,1),
                       sens=round(sens,1),spec=round(spec,1),
                       gmean=round(gmean,1),AUC=round(AUC,2)
                       )


write_clip(result_df) 
result_df

saveRDS(rfc_sw, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_bi_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))
saveRDS(rfc_sw_p, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))


```

# Fit  GW model HU12
```{r}

set.seed(12)

library(ranger)

#()()()()()()()()()()
RFDATA = data_gw_huc # # data_gw_huc , data_gw_cat

ntree = 500
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Train Test split
ind_test <- sample(nrow(RFDATA), round(nrow(RFDATA)*0.2))
rf_test= RFDATA[ind_test, ]
rf_train = RFDATA[-ind_test,]

rf_train_gw = rf_train
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


# Undersampling from majority class (class = 0)
rf_train0 = rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class == 0,]
rf_train1 = rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class == 1,]
frac1 = nrow(rf_train1)/nrow(rf_train)

# Balance Dataset (due to zero inflation)
sample.frac = c(frac1,1.0) #c(0.1, 0.5) will draw 10% from the first class and 50% 
case_weights <- ifelse(rf_train$Viol_Class == 1,  500, 1) # weighting where class = 1 higher than when class equals 0
m.try = 5
min.node = 10

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fit Model: 
rfc_gw = ranger(as.factor(Viol_Class) ~ .,
             data=rf_train,
             num.trees=ntree,
             #mtry=m.try,
             #case.weights = case_weights,
             sample.fraction=sample.frac,
             #min.node.size=min.node,
             #probability = TRUE, # if want predicted probabilities in output
             importance='impurity')

rfc_gw_p = ranger(as.factor(Viol_Class) ~ .,
             data=rf_train,
             num.trees=ntree,
             #mtry=m.try,
             sample.fraction=sample.frac,
             #min.node.size=min.node,
             probability = TRUE, # if want predicted probabilities in output
             importance='impurity')



#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Evaluate
rfc_ranger= rfc_gw
rfc_ranger_p= rfc_gw_p

yobs <- as.factor(rf_test$Viol_Class)

ypred. = predict(rfc_ranger_p, data = rf_test)#,type='prob')
ypred.. = ypred.$predictions[,2] # if using predicted probability model

# ypred. = predict(rfc_ranger, data = rf_test)#,type='prob') # use if not using probability model
# ypred.. = as.numeric(as.character(ypred.$predictions)) # use if not using probability model

ypred = as.character(ifelse(ypred.. >=0.5,1,0))

n <- nrow(rf_test)
pcc  <- 100*sum(yobs == ypred) / n
sens <- 100*sum(yobs == '1' & ypred == '1') / sum(yobs=='1')
spec <- 100*sum(yobs == '0' & ypred == '0') / sum(yobs=='0')
gmean = sqrt(sens*spec) # metric used if have an unbalanced dataset

test = data.frame(obs = as.numeric(as.character(yobs)),pred = as.numeric(as.character(ypred)))
test$match = ifelse(test$obs == test$pred, 1,0)
sum(test$match)/nrow(test)                  
                  
AUC = roc.area(as.numeric(as.character(ypred)), 
               as.numeric(as.character(yobs))) 


result_df = data.frame(N=nrow(RFDATA),PCC=round(pcc,1),
                       sens=round(sens,1),spec=round(spec,1),
                       gmean=round(gmean,1),AUC=round(AUC,2)
                       )


#lake_haz_data_comid = haz_m_
#lake_haz_data = haz_m


write_clip(result_df) 
result_df

# saveRDS(rfc_gw, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_bi_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_HU12.rds'))
# saveRDS(rfc_gw_p, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_HU12.rds'))


```

# Fit  SW model Cat
```{r}

set.seed(11) # 10 HUC12

library(ranger)
#library(mlr)
#library(smotefamily)
library(ROSE)

#()()()()()()()()()()
RFDATA = data_sw_cat # data_sw_huc , data_sw_cat


ntree = 500
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Train Test split
ind_test <- sample(nrow(RFDATA), round(nrow(RFDATA)*0.2))
rf_test= RFDATA[ind_test, ]
rf_train = RFDATA[-ind_test,]

rf_train_sw = rf_train
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Upsampling with SMOTE
# rf_train2 = SMOTE(X=subset(rf_train,select=-c(Viol_Class)),
#                 target=subset(rf_train,select=c(Viol_Class)), 
#                 K=5,dup_size=10)

data_balanced <- ovun.sample(Viol_Class ~ ., data = rf_train, method = "over", p = 0.5, seed = 123)$data # 0.5 give even classes

nrow(data_balanced[data_balanced$Viol_Class==1,]) # 5755
nrow(rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class==1,]) # 5755

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


# Undersampling from majority class (class = 0)
rf_train0 = rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class == 0,]
rf_train1 = rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class == 1,]
frac1 = nrow(rf_train1)/nrow(rf_train)

# Balance Dataset (due to zero inflation)
sample.frac = c(frac1,1.0) #c(0.1, 0.5) will draw 10% from the first class and 50% 
case_weights <- ifelse(rf_train$Viol_Class == 1,  1000, 1) # weighting where class = 1 higher than when class equals 0
m.try = 5
min.node = 10

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fit Model: 
rfc_sw = ranger(as.factor(Viol_Class) ~ .,
             data=rf_train, # data_balanced, rf_train
             num.trees=ntree,
             #mtry=m.try,
             #case.weights = case_weights,
             sample.fraction=sample.frac,
             #min.node.size=min.node,
             #probability = TRUE, # if want predicted probabilities in output
             importance='impurity')

rfc_sw_p = ranger(as.factor(Viol_Class) ~ .,
             data=rf_train, # data_balanced, rf_train
             num.trees=ntree,
             #mtry=m.try,
             #case.weights = case_weights,
             sample.fraction=sample.frac,
             #min.node.size=min.node,
             probability = TRUE, # if want predicted probabilities in output
             importance='impurity')



#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Evaluate
rfc_ranger= rfc_sw
rfc_ranger_p= rfc_sw_p

yobs <- as.factor(rf_test$Viol_Class)
ypred. = predict(rfc_ranger_p, data = rf_test)#,type='prob')
ypred.. = ypred.$predictions[,2] # if using predicted probability model

# ypred. = predict(rfc_ranger, data = rf_test)#,type='prob') # use if not using probability model
# ypred.. = as.numeric(as.character(ypred.$predictions)) # use if not using probability model

ypred = as.character(ifelse(ypred.. >=0.5,1,0))

n <- nrow(rf_test)
pcc  <- 100*sum(yobs == ypred) / n
sens <- 100*sum(yobs == '1' & ypred == '1') / sum(yobs=='1')
spec <- 100*sum(yobs == '0' & ypred == '0') / sum(yobs=='0')
gmean = sqrt(sens*spec) # metric used if have an unbalanced dataset


AUC = roc.area(as.numeric(as.character(ypred)), 
               as.numeric(as.character(yobs))) 


result_df = data.frame(N=nrow(RFDATA),PCC=round(pcc,1),
                       sens=round(sens,1),spec=round(spec,1),
                       gmean=round(gmean,1),AUC=round(AUC,2)
                       )


write_clip(result_df) 
result_df

saveRDS(rfc_sw, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_bi_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_Cat.rds'))
saveRDS(rfc_sw_p, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_Cat.rds'))


```

# Fit  GW model Cat
```{r}

set.seed(12)

library(ranger)

#()()()()()()()()()()
RFDATA = data_gw_cat # # data_gw_huc , data_gw_cat

ntree = 500
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Train Test split
ind_test <- sample(nrow(RFDATA), round(nrow(RFDATA)*0.2))
rf_test= RFDATA[ind_test, ]
rf_train = RFDATA[-ind_test,]

rf_train_gw = rf_train
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


# Undersampling from majority class (class = 0)
rf_train0 = rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class == 0,]
rf_train1 = rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class == 1,]
frac1 = nrow(rf_train1)/nrow(rf_train)

# Balance Dataset (due to zero inflation)
sample.frac = c(frac1,1.0) #c(0.1, 0.5) will draw 10% from the first class and 50% 
case_weights <- ifelse(rf_train$Viol_Class == 1,  500, 1) # weighting where class = 1 higher than when class equals 0
m.try = 5
min.node = 10

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fit Model: 
rfc_gw = ranger(as.factor(Viol_Class) ~ .,
             data=rf_train,
             num.trees=ntree,
             #mtry=m.try,
             #case.weights = case_weights,
             sample.fraction=sample.frac,
             #min.node.size=min.node,
             #probability = TRUE, # if want predicted probabilities in output
             importance='impurity')

rfc_gw_p = ranger(as.factor(Viol_Class) ~ .,
             data=rf_train,
             num.trees=ntree,
             #mtry=m.try,
             sample.fraction=sample.frac,
             #min.node.size=min.node,
             probability = TRUE, # if want predicted probabilities in output
             importance='impurity')



#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Evaluate
rfc_ranger= rfc_gw
rfc_ranger_p= rfc_gw_p

yobs <- as.factor(rf_test$Viol_Class)

ypred. = predict(rfc_ranger_p, data = rf_test)#,type='prob')
ypred.. = ypred.$predictions[,2] # if using predicted probability model

# ypred. = predict(rfc_ranger, data = rf_test)#,type='prob') # use if not using probability model
# ypred.. = as.numeric(as.character(ypred.$predictions)) # use if not using probability model

ypred = as.character(ifelse(ypred.. >=0.5,1,0))

n <- nrow(rf_test)
pcc  <- 100*sum(yobs == ypred) / n
sens <- 100*sum(yobs == '1' & ypred == '1') / sum(yobs=='1')
spec <- 100*sum(yobs == '0' & ypred == '0') / sum(yobs=='0')
gmean = sqrt(sens*spec) # metric used if have an unbalanced dataset

test = data.frame(obs = as.numeric(as.character(yobs)),pred = as.numeric(as.character(ypred)))
test$match = ifelse(test$obs == test$pred, 1,0)
sum(test$match)/nrow(test)                  
                  
AUC = roc.area(as.numeric(as.character(ypred)), 
               as.numeric(as.character(yobs))) 


result_df = data.frame(N=nrow(RFDATA),PCC=round(pcc,1),
                       sens=round(sens,1),spec=round(spec,1),
                       gmean=round(gmean,1),AUC=round(AUC,2)
                       )


#lake_haz_data_comid = haz_m_
#lake_haz_data = haz_m


write_clip(result_df) 
result_df

saveRDS(rfc_gw, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_bi_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_Cat.rds'))
saveRDS(rfc_gw_p, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_Cat.rds'))


```

# **Var Ranking Class
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)


#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
rfc_ranger = rfc_sw_p # rfc_sw_p, rfc_gw_p
#rfc_ranger = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))
#rfc_ranger = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_HU12.rds'))

#rfc_ranger = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_Cat.rds'))
#rfc_ranger = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_Cat.rds'))

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

rf_title = "Variable Importance"

#rfc_ranger = rfc_lakeHAZ # rfc_lakeHAZ, rfc_riverHAZ

imprtnce = as.data.frame(rfc_ranger$variable.importance)
names(imprtnce)[1] = "PercIncMSE" 
setDT(imprtnce, keep.rownames = TRUE)[]
imprtnce = imprtnce[,1:2]
names(imprtnce)[1] = "Variable.Name"
imprtnce2 = imprtnce[order(-imprtnce$PercIncMSE),]
all_imprtnce2 = imprtnce2
nrow_important = min(nrow(imprtnce2),40)
imprtnce2 = imprtnce2[1:nrow_important,] # Select top 10
imprtnce2 = imprtnce2[order(imprtnce2$PercIncMSE),] # sort again

#VarImpDF = imprtnce2
#imprtnce2$Variable.Short = imprtnce2$Variable.Name
imprtnce2$Relative_Importance = imprtnce2$PercIncMSE
# imprtnce3 = merge(imprtnce2,pred_color,
#                   by.x="Variable.Name",by.y="variable",all.x=T)
# VarImpDF = as.data.frame(imprtnce3[,c('Variable.Name','Relative_Importance',
#                                      'Variable.Short','category','color')])

VarImpDF = imprtnce2
# set order for labels (prevent default alphabetical order)
#VarImpDF = VarImpDF[order(VarImpDF$Relative_Importance),]
# VarImpDF$Variable.Short <-
#   factor(VarImpDF$Variable.Short, levels = as.character(VarImpDF$Variable.Short))
# 
# VarImpDF$Variable.Name <-
#   factor(VarImpDF$Variable.Name, levels = as.character(VarImpDF$Variable.Name))

VarImpDF = VarImpDF[order(VarImpDF$Relative_Importance),]
VarImpDF$Variable.Name <-
  factor(VarImpDF$Variable.Name, levels = as.character(VarImpDF$Variable.Name))



# classification of variable type
#mypal = VarImpDF$color

ggplot(data=VarImpDF, 
       aes(x=Variable.Name,y=Relative_Importance,fill=Variable.Name))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity")+
  ggtitle( rf_title)+
  labs(x=" ", y="Mean Decrease Accuracy")+
  #scale_fill_manual(values = mypal)+
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=13))+
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=13))+
  #scale_y_continuous(breaks= seq(0, 20, by=5),limits = c(0,20))+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"))+ #+# add axis lines
  guides(fill="none") + # removes legend
  #theme(plot.margin = margin(.2,.2,.2,.2, "cm"))+
  coord_flip()

# View(importance_all)# View(importance_all)Variable.Short


```

# **PDP - class
```{r}

library(pdp)
library(gridExtra)

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

partialvars <- as.data.frame(VarImpDF[order(-VarImpDF$PercIncMSE),])

rf_train = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_SW_HUC12.csv'))
rf_train = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_SW_COMIDS.csv'))
rf_train = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_GW_COMIDS.csv'))

rfc_ranger_p = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))
rfc_ranger_p = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_Cat.rds'))
rfc_ranger_p = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_Cat.rds'))

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()


#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# Partial Dependence Plots
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

# DF = dataframe with response variable and all predictor variables (which was used when training the RF model)

ylabel = "Response"

# Code for partial dependence plots (4 separate plots in this example)

par.p1 <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,which.class=2,
                    pred.var=paste0(partialvars[1,1]), chull= T)
p1 <- autoplot(par.p1, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab=paste0(partialvars[1,1]))+theme_bw()

par.p2 <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train, 
                    pred.var=paste0(partialvars[2,1]), chull= T)
p2 <- autoplot(par.p2, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab=paste0(partialvars[2,1]))+theme_bw()

par.p3 <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var=paste0(partialvars[3,1]), chull= T)
p3 <- autoplot(par.p3, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab=paste0(partialvars[3,1]))+theme_bw()

par.p4 <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var=paste0(partialvars[4,1]), chull= T)
p4 <- autoplot(par.p4, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab=paste0(partialvars[4,1]))+theme_bw()

par.p5 <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var=paste0(partialvars[5,1]), chull= T)
p5 <- autoplot(par.p5, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab=paste0(partialvars[5,1]))+theme_bw()

par.p6 <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var=paste0(partialvars[6,1]), chull= T)
p6 <- autoplot(par.p6, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab=paste0(partialvars[6,1]))+theme_bw()

par.p7 <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var=paste0(partialvars[7,1]), chull= T)
p7 <- autoplot(par.p7, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab=paste0(partialvars[7,1]))+theme_bw()

par.p8 <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var=paste0(partialvars[8,1]), chull= T)
p8 <- autoplot(par.p8, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab=paste0(partialvars[8,1]))+theme_bw()

precip_surp <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var='Precip_Minus_EVTWs', chull= T)
precip_surp2 <- autoplot(precip_surp, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab='Precip_Minus_EVTWs')+theme_bw()

parNsurp <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var='N_Surp_2017ws', chull= T)
parNsurp2 <- autoplot(parNsurp, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab='N_Surp_2017ws')+theme_bw()

agsurp <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var='n_ag_surplus_kgsqkm', chull= T)
agsurp2 <- autoplot(agsurp, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab='n_ag_surplus_kgsqkm')+theme_bw()

Nsurp <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var='n_surplus_kgsqkm', chull= T)
Nsurp2 <- autoplot(Nsurp, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab='n_surplus_kgsqkm')+theme_bw()

Nsurp <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var='N_Surp_kgsqkm_2017ws', chull= T)
Nsurp2 <- autoplot(Nsurp, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab='N_Surp_kgsqkm_2017ws')+theme_bw()
Nsurp <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var='N_Surp_kgsqkm_2017cat', chull= T)
Nsurp2 <- autoplot(Nsurp, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab='N_Surp_kgsqkm_2017cat')+theme_bw()

fert <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var='FertCat', chull= T)
fert2 <- autoplot(fert, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab='FertCat')+theme_bw()

treat1 <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var='Nitrate_Treatment_yn', chull= T)
treat2 <- autoplot(treat1, contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab='Nitrate_Treatment_yn')+theme_bw()

treat1. <- pdp::partial(rfc_ranger_p, train = rf_train,
                    pred.var='Nitrate_Treatment_freq', chull= T)
treat2. <- autoplot(treat1., contour = TRUE, 
              ylab=ylabel, xlab='Nitrate_Treatment_freq')+theme_bw()


# Puts all the plots together
#grid.arrange(p1,p2,p3,p4, nrow=2,ncol=2)
#grid.arrange(p1,p2, nrow=1,ncol=2)
#grid.arrange(p1,p2,p3,p4,p5,p6, nrow=1,ncol=6)
#grid.arrange(p1,p2,p3,p4,p5,p6,p7,p8, nrow=2,ncol=4)
grid.arrange(p1,p2,p3,p4,p5,p6,p7,p8, nrow=4,ncol=2)

grid.arrange(p1,p2,Nsurp2,p5,p8, precip_surp2,nrow=3,ncol=2)
grid.arrange(p1,p2,Nsurp2,fert2,nrow=2,ncol=2)


```

```{r}
test = rf_sw2[,c('HUC12','Viol_Class','viol_freq','ElevCat','permcat','PctForest2019Cat')]


plot(test$viol_freq~ test$ElevCat)

plot(test$viol_freq~ test$permcat)
abline(lm(test$viol_freq~ test$permcat),col='red')

# 2. Hexbin Plot for a cleaner view of density
ggplot(test, aes(x = ElevCat, y = Viol_Class)) +
  geom_hex(bins = 30) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "lightblue", high = "red") +
  labs(title = "Hexbin Density Plot")

ggplot(test, aes(x = permcat, y = Viol_Class)) +
  geom_hex(bins = 30) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "lightblue", high = "red") +
  labs(title = "Hexbin Density Plot")

ggplot(test, aes(x = PctForest2019Cat, y = Viol_Class)) +
  geom_hex(bins = 30) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "lightblue", high = "red") +
  labs(title = "Hexbin Density Plot")
```

# Correlation matrix Plot
* Select top 10 variables
```{r}

library(GGally)
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(psych)

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
fit = rfc_sw

DATA = data_sw_huc_

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()





# subset out to most important variabes
names(fit$variable.importance)

imprtnce = as.data.frame(fit$variable.importance)
names(imprtnce)[1] = "PercIncMSE" 
setDT(imprtnce, keep.rownames = TRUE)[]
imprtnce = imprtnce[,1:2]
names(imprtnce)[1] = "Variable.Name"
imprtnce2 = imprtnce[order(-imprtnce$PercIncMSE),]
top_imprtnce = imprtnce2[1:10,]
all_imprtnce = imprtnce2

keeps10 = top_imprtnce$Variable.Name
keepsAll = all_imprtnce$Variable.Name

keeps10 = c("viol_freq",keeps10)
keepsAll = c("viol_freq",keepsAll)

DATA10 = subset(DATA,select=keeps10)
DATAALL = subset(DATA,select=keepsAll)

#setdiff(names(DATA),keepsAll) # gives not matching
#setdiff(keepsAll,names(DATA)) # gives not matching

# Create the scatterplot matrix
# ggpairs(DATA2) + 
#   theme_bw() # Apply a clean theme

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
pairs.panels(DATA10,
             cex.cor = 1.5, # increases corr text size
             cex = 1.5, # General increase in text and point size
             method = "pearson", # Correlation method (e.g., "pearson", "spearman")
             hist.col = "#00AFBB", # Color for histograms
             density = TRUE,  # Add density plots and fitted lines
             ellipses = TRUE, # Add correlation ellipses
             pch = 21)#,        # Point character type
             #main = "Correlation Matrix with Scatter Plots")

pairs.panels(DATAALL,
             cex.cor = 1.5, # increases corr text size
             cex = 1.5, # General increase in text and point size
             method = "pearson", # Correlation method (e.g., "pearson", "spearman")
             hist.col = "#00AFBB", # Color for histograms
             density = TRUE,  # Add density plots and fitted lines
             ellipses = TRUE, # Add correlation ellipses
             pch = 21)#,        # Point character type
             #main = "Correlation Matrix with Scatter Plots")
```

#---

# Fit Conc SW model HU12
```{r}

set.seed(10) # 10 HUC12

library(ranger)
#library(mlr)
#library(smotefamily)
library(ROSE)

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
RFDATA = dataR_sw_huc  
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()


ntree = 500
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Train Test split
ind_test <- sample(nrow(RFDATA), round(nrow(RFDATA)*0.2))
rfr_test= RFDATA[ind_test, ]
rfr_train = RFDATA[-ind_test,]

rfr_train_sw = rf_train
#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Upsampling with SMOTE
# rf_train2 = SMOTE(X=subset(rf_train,select=-c(Viol_Class)),
#                 target=subset(rf_train,select=c(Viol_Class)), 
#                 K=5,dup_size=10)

#data_balanced <- ovun.sample(Viol_Class ~ ., data = rf_train, method = "over", p = 0.5, seed = 123)$data # 0.5 give even classes

#nrow(data_balanced[data_balanced$Viol_Class==1,]) # 5755
#nrow(rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class==1,]) # 5755

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


# Undersampling from majority class (class = 0)
#rf_train0 = rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class == 0,]
#rf_train1 = rf_train[rf_train$Viol_Class == 1,]
#frac1 = nrow(rf_train1)/nrow(rf_train)

# Balance Dataset (due to zero inflation)
#sample.frac = c(frac1,1.0) #c(0.1, 0.5) will draw 10% from the first class and 50% 
#case_weights <- ifelse(rf_train$Viol_Class == 1,  1000, 1) # weighting where class = 1 higher than when class equals 0
m.try = 5
min.node = 10

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fit Model: 
rfr_model_sw = ranger(mean_conc ~ .,
                      data=rfr_train, # data_balanced, rf_train
                      num.trees=ntree,
                      #mtry=m.try,
                      #min.node.size=min.node,
                      importance='impurity')


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# Model Uncertainty & Bias v1 (using Ranger functions)
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

rfr_ranger = rfr_model_sw

# R-squared
rfr_ranger$r.squared # 0.9923619

# Prediction Error
rfr_ranger$prediction.error # 1.038087


#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
# Model Uncertainty & Bias (with cross-validation)
#%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

# function to get r-squared
r2 <- function(y, pred) {
  1 - var(y - pred) / var(y)  
}

#*****************************
# R2 Testing Set
yobs <- rfr_test$mean_conc  # Viol.Conc for other dataset
ypred = predict(rfr_ranger, data =rfr_test)
test = cbind(data.frame(yobs=yobs),data.frame(ypreds=ypred$predictions))
# remove Inf
test <- test[is.finite(rowSums(test)),]

r2_test = r2(test$yobs,test$ypreds) 
r2_test # 0.9997797



#*****************************
# Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) Training Dataset
yobs <- rfr_test$mean_conc # Viol.Conc for other dataset
ypred = predict(rfr_ranger,data = rfr_test)
rmse = sqrt(mean((ypred$predictions - yobs)^2))
rmse # 0.5552267

#*****************************
# Mean Bias
yobs <- rfr_test$mean_conc # Viol.Conc for other dataset
ypred = predict(rfr_ranger,data = rfr_test )
bias = ( sum(ypred$predictions) - sum(yobs)) / length(yobs) 
bias # 0.00627016

#*****************************
# Variance (standard deviation of the error (which is pred-obs))
yobs <- rfr_test$mean_conc # Viol.Conc for other dataset
ypred = predict(rfr_ranger,data = rfr_test)
var = sd(ypred$predictions - yobs)
var # 0.5579883

#*****************************
# Observed vs. Predicted

yobs <- rfr_test$mean_conc # Viol.Conc for other dataset
ypred = predict(rfr_ranger,data = rfr_test)
tempDF = data.frame(yobs, ypred$predictions)

plot(tempDF$yobs, tempDF$ypred, main='RF')
abline(lm(tempDF$ypred~tempDF$yobs))
abline(1,1,col='red')

r2_test


# result_df = data.frame(N=nrow(RFDATA),PCC=round(pcc,1),
#                        sens=round(sens,1),spec=round(spec,1),
#                        gmean=round(gmean,1),AUC=round(AUC,2)
#                        )
# write_clip(result_df) 
# result_df

# saveRDS(rfc_sw, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_bi_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))
# saveRDS(rfc_sw_p, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))


```


# **Var Ranking 
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)


#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
rfr_ranger = rfr_model_sw
#rfc_ranger = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

rf_title = "Variable Importance"


imprtnce = as.data.frame(rfr_ranger$variable.importance)
names(imprtnce)[1] = "PercIncMSE" 
setDT(imprtnce, keep.rownames = TRUE)[]
imprtnce = imprtnce[,1:2]
names(imprtnce)[1] = "Variable.Name"
imprtnce2 = imprtnce[order(-imprtnce$PercIncMSE),]
all_imprtnce2 = imprtnce2
nrow_important = min(nrow(imprtnce2),40)
imprtnce2 = imprtnce2[1:nrow_important,] # Select top 10
imprtnce2 = imprtnce2[order(imprtnce2$PercIncMSE),] # sort again

#VarImpDF = imprtnce2
#imprtnce2$Variable.Short = imprtnce2$Variable.Name
imprtnce2$Relative_Importance = imprtnce2$PercIncMSE
# imprtnce3 = merge(imprtnce2,pred_color,
#                   by.x="Variable.Name",by.y="variable",all.x=T)
# VarImpDF = as.data.frame(imprtnce3[,c('Variable.Name','Relative_Importance',
#                                      'Variable.Short','category','color')])

VarImpDF = imprtnce2
# set order for labels (prevent default alphabetical order)
#VarImpDF = VarImpDF[order(VarImpDF$Relative_Importance),]
# VarImpDF$Variable.Short <-
#   factor(VarImpDF$Variable.Short, levels = as.character(VarImpDF$Variable.Short))
# 
# VarImpDF$Variable.Name <-
#   factor(VarImpDF$Variable.Name, levels = as.character(VarImpDF$Variable.Name))

VarImpDF = VarImpDF[order(VarImpDF$Relative_Importance),]
VarImpDF$Variable.Name <-
  factor(VarImpDF$Variable.Name, levels = as.character(VarImpDF$Variable.Name))



# classification of variable type
#mypal = VarImpDF$color

ggplot(data=VarImpDF, 
       aes(x=Variable.Name,y=Relative_Importance,fill=Variable.Name))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity")+
  ggtitle( rf_title)+
  labs(x=" ", y="Mean Decrease Accuracy")+
  #scale_fill_manual(values = mypal)+
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=13))+
  theme(axis.text=element_text(size=13))+
  #scale_y_continuous(breaks= seq(0, 20, by=5),limits = c(0,20))+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"))+ #+# add axis lines
  guides(fill="none") + # removes legend
  #theme(plot.margin = margin(.2,.2,.2,.2, "cm"))+
  coord_flip()

# View(importance_all)# View(importance_all)Variable.Short


```


#----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
s
# Current Prediction Dataset
```{r}

predCat_cur = StreamCat_sub
predHUC_cur = merge(StreamCat_HU12,NNI17[,c("HUC12","n_surplus_kgsqkm")],by='HUC12')

# Add on Treatment & assign zero treatment to locations without PWS
predHUC_cur_treat = merge(predHUC_cur,N_treat_huc12_gwsw,by='HUC12',all.x=T)
predHUC_cur_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_freq[is.na(predHUC_cur_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_freq)] <- 0
predHUC_cur_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_yn[is.na(predHUC_cur_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_yn)] <- 0

predCat_cur_treat = merge(predCat_cur,N_treat_cat_gwsw,by='COMID',all.x=T)
predCat_cur_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_freq[is.na(predCat_cur_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_freq)] <- 0
predCat_cur_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_yn[is.na(predCat_cur_treat$Nitrate_Treatment_yn)] <- 0

# Add on Treatment & assign Yes (one) treatment to locations without PWS
predHUC_cur_treat1 = merge(predHUC_cur,N_treat_huc12_gwsw,by='HUC12',all.x=T)
predHUC_cur_treat1$Nitrate_Treatment_freq[is.na(predHUC_cur_treat1$Nitrate_Treatment_freq)]<-1
predHUC_cur_treat1$Nitrate_Treatment_yn[is.na(predHUC_cur_treat1$Nitrate_Treatment_yn)]<-1

predCat_cur_treat1 = merge(predCat_cur,N_treat_cat_gwsw,by='COMID',all.x=T)
predCat_cur_treat1$Nitrate_Treatment_freq[is.na(predCat_cur_treat1$Nitrate_Treatment_freq)]<-1
predCat_cur_treat1$Nitrate_Treatment_yn[is.na(predCat_cur_treat1$Nitrate_Treatment_yn)]<-1



dim(predCat_cur_treat)


```

# Future-4.5G HUC12 Prediction Dataset
```{r}


predHUC_fut = NDATA_huc12
#predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,dep_N_hu12,by='HUC12')
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,prec_hu12,by='HUC12')
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,temp_hu12,by='HUC12')
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,imprv_hu12,by='HUC12')
#predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,popden_hu12,by='HUC12')


predHUC_fut$N_Surp_kgsqkm_2017ws = predHUC_fut$N_surp_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$N_Surp_kgsqkm_2017cat = predHUC_fut$N_surp_RCP4.5G

predHUC_fut$PctCrop2019Ws = predHUC_fut$Pct_ag_land_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$PctCrop2019Cat = predHUC_fut$Pct_ag_land_RCP4.5G

predHUC_fut$FertWs = predHUC_fut$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$FertCat = predHUC_fut$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G

predHUC_fut$PopDen2010Ws = predHUC_fut$pop_den_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$PopDen2010Cat = predHUC_fut$pop_den_RCP4.5G

predHUC_fut$PctImp2016Ws = predHUC_fut$impervious_2050_RCP4.5GISS
predHUC_fut$PctImp2016Cat = predHUC_fut$impervious_2050_RCP4.5GISS

predHUC_fut$N_TW2012Ws = predHUC_fut$totalN_2050ctl_kgNha
predHUC_fut$N_TW2012Cat = predHUC_fut$totalN_2050ctl_kgNha

predHUC_fut$CBNFWs = predHUC_fut$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$CBNFCat = predHUC_fut$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G

predHUC_fut$ManureWs = predHUC_fut$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$ManureCat = predHUC_fut$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G

predHUC_fut$PctForest2019Ws = predHUC_fut$Pct_forest_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$PctForest2019Cat = predHUC_fut$Pct_forest_RCP4.5G

predHUC_fut$tmean9120ws = predHUC_fut$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS
predHUC_fut$tmean9120cat = predHUC_fut$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS

predHUC_fut$precip9120ws = predHUC_fut$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS
predHUC_fut$precip9120cat = predHUC_fut$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS

#predHUC_fut$n_ags_2017ws = predHUC_fut$N_ag_surp_RCP4.5G
#predHUC_fut$n_surplus_kgsqkm = predHUC_fut$N_surp_RCP4.5G


#"N_Surp_2017ws" "n_ags_2017ws" 

# Merge on static variables
statkeeps = c('HUC12','ElevCat','AgKffactCat','AgDrain_pctCat','BFICat',
              'Precip_Minus_EVTCat','WaterInputCat','wdrw_LDCat',
              'permcat','runoffcat','RockNCat','Fe2O3Cat','SandCat',
              'NHDslope_Pct_Cat','WtDepCat','Hillslope_PctCat','HydrlCondCat',
              'ElevWs','AgKffactWs','AgDrain_pctWs','BFIWs',
              'Precip_Minus_EVTWs','WaterInputWs','wdrw_LDWs',
              'permws','runoffws','RockNWs','Fe2O3Ws','SandWs',
              'NHDslope_Pct_Ws','WtDepWs','Hillslope_PctWs','HydrlCondWs')
predHUC_4.5G = merge(predHUC_fut,StreamCat_HU12[,statkeeps],by='HUC12')



```

```{r}
predHUC_fut$PctForest2019Cat = predHUC_fut$Pct_forest_RCP8.5G

              'Precip_Minus_EVTCat','WaterInputCat','wdrw_LDCat',
              'permcat','runoffcat','RockNCat','Fe2O3Cat','SandCat',
```

#--

# * MAP PWS Points
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
#map_title = "Predicted Probability of SWDW Nitrate Violation"
map_title = "Predicted Probability of GWDW Nitrate Violation"
predictData = rf_gw # rf_gw, rf_sw
rfr_pred = rfc_ranger_p  

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

predictData2 = as.data.frame(subset(predictData,select=-c(HUC12)))
dim(predictData2)

setdiff(names(rfr_pred$variable.importance),colnames(predictData)) # gives not matching


predict1 = predict(rfr_pred,data = predictData2)

preds = as.data.frame(predict1$predictions[,2])
names(preds)[1] = "Prediction"

# Merge back on HUC12s
pred_all = cbind(predictData$HUC12 ,preds)
names(pred_all)[1] = 'HUC12'

nrow(pred_all)  # 8963 

# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(pred_all,huc12_p[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 = map1[complete.cases(map1[,c("Prediction")]),] 
map2 <- st_as_sf(map2) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Prediction),]

# Get the range back to 0 to 1
# map3$Prediction = map3$Prediction/max(map3$Prediction)
summary(map3$Prediction)

start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = subset(map3,!is.na(Prediction)),
          mapping = aes(color=Prediction)) +
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  scale_color_viridis(option="viridis",name="Risk Score",
                      limits = c(0, 1))+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time

```

# Raster Map
```{r}



#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

predictData = subset(rf_gw,select=-c(viol_freq)) # rf_gw, rf_sw
rfr_pred = rfc_ranger_p  

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

predictData2 = as.data.frame(subset(predictData,select=-c(HUC12)))
dim(predictData2)

setdiff(names(rfr_pred$variable.importance),colnames(predictData)) # gives not matching


predict1 = predict(rfr_pred,data = predictData2)

preds = as.data.frame(predict1$predictions[,2])
names(preds)[1] = "Prediction"

# Merge back on HUC12s
pred_all = cbind(predictData$HUC12 ,preds)
names(pred_all)[1] = 'HUC12'

nrow(pred_all)  # 36252 

nrow(pred_all[pred_all$Prediction > 0.5,])
summary(pred_all$Prediction)

# Merge on Spatial Data

map1 = merge(pred_all,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)

map2 = map1[complete.cases(map1[,c("Prediction")]),] 
map2 <- st_as_sf(map2) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Prediction),]
map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Prediction"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


## Plot Nitrogen Maps
start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot()+
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Prediction))+
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  # scale_color_viridis(option="magma",name="Risk Score" 
  #                     ,limits = c(0, 1)
  #                     )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
               palette=function(x) c("#5E4FA2","#3288BD","#66C2A5","#ABDDA4","#E6F598",
                                     "#FEE08B","#FDAE61","#F46D43","#D53E4F","#9E0142"),
               breaks=c(.1, .2, .3, .4, .5, 0.6, .7, 0.8, 0.9)) +
  theme (axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank(), 
         panel.background = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), 
         legend.text = element_text(size = 14), legend.title = element_text(size = 14))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  labs(fill="Risk Value")
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 33.21989 secs



```

# Raster Map Current GW HUC12
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Current Probability of Violations 2020"

predictData = predHUC_cur # predHUC_cur, predHUC_cur_treat 
#rfr_pred = rfc_sw_p # rfc_gw_p, rfc_sw_p
#rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))
#rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_Cat.rds'))

rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_HU12.rds'))

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

predictData2 = as.data.frame(subset(predictData,select=-c(HUC12)))
dim(predictData2)

setdiff(names(rfr_pred$variable.importance),colnames(predictData)) # gives not matching


predict1 = predict(rfr_pred,data = predictData2)

preds = as.data.frame(predict1$predictions[,2])
names(preds)[1] = "Prediction"

# Merge back on HUC12s
pred_all = cbind(predictData$HUC12 ,preds)
names(pred_all)[1] = 'HUC12'

nrow(pred_all)  # 82127 

nrow(pred_all[pred_all$Prediction > 0.5,]) # 19244
summary(pred_all$Prediction)

# Merge on Spatial Data

map1 = merge(pred_all,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)

map2 = map1[complete.cases(map1[,c("Prediction")]),] 
map2 <- st_as_sf(map2) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Prediction),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

nrow(map3[map3$Prediction>0.5,]) # 19244
summary(map3$Prediction)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Prediction"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 3000, dy = 3000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


## Plot Nitrogen Maps
start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot()+
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Prediction))+
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  # scale_color_viridis(option="magma",name="Risk Score" 
  #                     ,limits = c(0, 1)
  #                     )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
               palette=function(x) c("#5E4FA2","#3288BD","#66C2A5","#ABDDA4","#E6F598",
                                     "#FEE08B","#FDAE61","#F46D43","#D53E4F","#9E0142"),
               breaks=c(.1, .2, .3, .4, .5, 0.6, .7, 0.8, 0.9)) +
  theme (axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank(), 
         panel.background = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), 
         legend.text = element_text(size = 14), legend.title = element_text(size = 14))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  labs(fill="Risk Value")
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 33.21989 secs

pred_gw_HU12 = pred_all


```

# Raster Map Current SW COMID
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Current SWDW Probability of Violations 2020"

predictData = predCat_cur_treat1   # predCat_cur, predCat_cur_treat, predCat_cur_treat1
#rfr_pred = rfc_sw_p # rfc_gw_p, rfc_sw_p
rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_Cat.rds'))

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

predictData2 = as.data.frame(subset(predictData,select=-c(COMID)))
dim(predictData2)

setdiff(names(rfr_pred$variable.importance),colnames(predictData)) # gives not matching


predict1 = predict(rfr_pred,data = predictData2)

preds = as.data.frame(predict1$predictions[,2])
names(preds)[1] = "Prediction"

# Merge back on HUC12s
pred_all = cbind(predictData$COMID ,preds)
names(pred_all)[1] = 'COMID'

nrow(pred_all)  # 2643994 

nrow(pred_all[pred_all$Prediction > 0.5,]) # 598450
100*nrow(pred_all[pred_all$Prediction > 0.5,]) /nrow(pred_all) # 22.63432
summary(pred_all$Prediction)


# Summarize by HUC12
pred_all2. = merge(pred_all,Cat_HUC12,by='COMID')
pred_all2 = pred_all2. %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize(Prediction = mean(Prediction,na.rm=T))
# Merge on Spatial Data

map1 = merge(pred_all2,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)

map2 = map1[complete.cases(map1[,c("Prediction")]),] 
map2 <- st_as_sf(map2) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Prediction),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

nrow(map3[map3$Prediction>0.5,]) # 19244
summary(map3$Prediction)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Prediction"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 3000, dy = 3000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


## Plot Nitrogen Maps
start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot()+
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Prediction))+
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  # scale_color_viridis(option="magma",name="Risk Score" 
  #                     ,limits = c(0, 1)
  #                     )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
               palette=function(x) c("#5E4FA2","#3288BD","#66C2A5","#ABDDA4","#E6F598",
                                     "#FEE08B","#FDAE61","#F46D43","#D53E4F","#9E0142"),
               breaks=c(.1, .2, .3, .4, .5, 0.6, .7, 0.8, 0.9)) +
  theme (axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank(), 
         panel.background = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), 
         legend.text = element_text(size = 14), legend.title = element_text(size = 14))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  labs(fill="Risk Value")
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 33.21989 secs

pred_sw_Cat = pred_all
pred_sw_HU12 = pred_all2


```

# Raster Map Current GW COMID
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Current GWDW Probability of Violations 2020"

predictData = predCat_cur_treat1   # predCat_cur, predCat_cur_treat,predCat_cur_treat1
#rfr_pred = rfc_sw_p # rfc_gw_p, rfc_sw_p
rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_Cat.rds'))

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

predictData2 = as.data.frame(subset(predictData,select=-c(COMID)))
dim(predictData2)

setdiff(names(rfr_pred$variable.importance),colnames(predictData)) # gives not matching


predict1 = predict(rfr_pred,data = predictData2)

preds = as.data.frame(predict1$predictions[,2])
names(preds)[1] = "Prediction"

# Merge back on HUC12s
pred_all = cbind(predictData$COMID ,preds)
names(pred_all)[1] = 'COMID'

nrow(pred_all)  # 2643994 

nrow(pred_all[pred_all$Prediction > 0.5,]) # 598450
100*nrow(pred_all[pred_all$Prediction > 0.5,]) /nrow(pred_all) # 22.63432
summary(pred_all$Prediction)


# Summarize by HUC12
pred_all2. = merge(pred_all,Cat_HUC12,by='COMID')
pred_all2 = pred_all2. %>% group_by(HUC12) %>% summarize(Prediction = mean(Prediction,na.rm=T))
# Merge on Spatial Data

map1 = merge(pred_all2,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)

map2 = map1[complete.cases(map1[,c("Prediction")]),] 
map2 <- st_as_sf(map2) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Prediction),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

nrow(map3[map3$Prediction>0.5,]) # 19244
summary(map3$Prediction)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Prediction"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 3000, dy = 3000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


## Plot Nitrogen Maps
start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot()+
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Prediction))+
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  # scale_color_viridis(option="magma",name="Risk Score" 
  #                     ,limits = c(0, 1)
  #                     )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
               palette=function(x) c("#5E4FA2","#3288BD","#66C2A5","#ABDDA4","#E6F598",
                                     "#FEE08B","#FDAE61","#F46D43","#D53E4F","#9E0142"),
               breaks=c(.1, .2, .3, .4, .5, 0.6, .7, 0.8, 0.9)) +
  theme (axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank(), 
         panel.background = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), 
         legend.text = element_text(size = 14), legend.title = element_text(size = 14))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  labs(fill="Risk Value")
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 33.21989 secs

pred_gw_Cat = pred_all
pred_gw_HU12 = pred_all2
```

```{r}
predictData = predHUC_4.5G

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

preds = as.data.frame(predict1$predictions[,2])
names(preds)[1] = "Prediction"
```

```{r}
nrow(pred_all[pred_all$Prediction > 0.5,]) # 598450
100*nrow(pred_all[pred_all$Prediction > 0.5,]) /nrow(pred_all) # 22.63432

# Summarize by HUC12

# Merge on Spatial Data

map2 = map1[complete.cases(map1[,c("Prediction")]),]

# Format rasters

                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),

  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Prediction))+
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  # scale_color_viridis(option="magma",name="Risk Score"

  #                     )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
               palette=function(x) c("#5E4FA2","#3288BD","#66C2A5","#ABDDA4","#E6F598",
                                     "#FEE08B","#FDAE61","#F46D43","#D53E4F","#9E0142"),
               breaks=c(.1, .2, .3, .4, .5, 0.6, .7, 0.8, 0.9)) +
  theme (axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank(), 
         panel.background = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), 
         legend.text = element_text(size = 14), legend.title = element_text(size = 14))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+

  labs(fill="Risk Value")
```
