

#--
# Change Map 4.5G
```{r}


#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Change in Probability of Violations (RCP4.5 GIS)"

predictData1 = predHUC_cur 
predictData2 = predHUC_4.5G 

#rfr_pred = rfc_gw_p # rfc_gw_p, rfc_sw_p
#rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))
#rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_HU12.rds'))

rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_Cat.rds'))
rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_Cat.rds'))

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

predictData1.2 = as.data.frame(subset(predictData1,select=-c(HUC12)))
predictData2.2 = as.data.frame(subset(predictData2,select=-c(HUC12)))


setdiff(names(rfr_pred$variable.importance),colnames(predictData2.2))

predict1 = predict(rfr_pred,data = predictData1.2)
predict2 = predict(rfr_pred,data = predictData2.2)

preds1 = as.data.frame(predict1$predictions[,2])
preds2 = as.data.frame(predict2$predictions[,2])
names(preds1)[1] = "Prediction1"
names(preds2)[1] = "Prediction2"

# Merge back on HUC12s
pred_all1 = cbind(predictData1$HUC12 ,preds1)
pred_all2 = cbind(predictData2$HUC12 ,preds2)

names(pred_all1)[1] = 'HUC12'
names(pred_all2)[1] = 'HUC12'

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

pred_chg = merge(pred_all1,pred_all2,by='HUC12')

pred_chg$chg_pred_prob = pred_chg$Prediction2 - pred_chg$Prediction1

summary(pred_chg$chg_pred_prob)

# If change goes from below to above 0.5 and vice versa
pred_chg$chg_over = ifelse(pred_chg$Prediction1 < 0.5 & pred_chg$Prediction2 >=0.5,1,0)
pred_chg$chg_under = ifelse(pred_chg$Prediction1 >= 0.5 & pred_chg$Prediction2 <0.5,1,0)
pred_chg$maintainRisk = ifelse(pred_chg$Prediction1 >= 0.5 & pred_chg$Prediction2 >=0.5,1,0)

pred_chg$chg_over_under = 0
pred_chg$chg_over_under[pred_chg$chg_under == 1]=1
pred_chg$chg_over_under[pred_chg$chg_over == 1]=2
pred_chg$chg_over_under[pred_chg$maintainRisk == 1]=3
levels(factor(pred_chg$chg_over_under))

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
map1 = merge(pred_chg,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)

map2 = map1[complete.cases(map1[,c("chg_pred_prob")]),] 
map2 <- st_as_sf(map2) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$chg_pred_prob),]

#nrow(map3[map3$chg_pred_prob>0.5,])
summary(map3$chg_pred_prob)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"chg_pred_prob"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 3000, dy = 3000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


## Plot Nitrogen Maps
start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot()+
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=chg_pred_prob))+
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  # scale_fill_viridis_b(option="turbo",#name="Change in Prob.", 
  #                    breaks = c(-.8, -.6, -.4, -.2, 0, 0.2, .4, 0.6, 0.8))+
  binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
               palette=function(x) c("#276419","#4D9221","#7FBC41","#B8E186","#E6F5D0",
                                     "#FDE0EF","#F1B6DA","#DE77AE","#C51B7D","#8E0152"),
               breaks=c(-.8, -.6, -.4, -.2, 0, 0.2, .4, 0.6, 0.8)) +
  theme (axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank(), 
         panel.background = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), 
         legend.text = element_text(size = 14), legend.title = element_text(size = 14))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  labs(fill="Change in Probability")
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
```

# Change Over Under
```{r}

#-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
map1 = merge(pred_chg,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)

map2 = map1[complete.cases(map1[,c("chg_over_under")]),] 
map2 <- st_as_sf(map2) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$chg_over_under),]

#nrow(map3[map3$chg_pred_prob>0.5,])
summary(map3$chg_over_under)
levels(factor(map3$chg_over_under))

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map5<-st_rasterize(map3[,"chg_over_under"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 3000, dy = 3000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


map5[is.na(map5)] <- 4

mypal = c("0" = "grey","1" = "#2c7bb6","2" ="#d7191c","3" ="yellow2","4"= "white")

## Plot Nitrogen Maps
start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot()+
  geom_stars(data=map5, aes(fill=as.factor(chg_over_under)))+
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  scale_fill_manual(values = mypal,
                    labels = c("1"="Decrease in Risk",
                              "2"="Increase in Risk", 
                              "3"="Stays above 0.5 Risk",
                              "0" = "Stays below 0.5 Risk",
                              "4" = "No Data"))+
  # binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
  #              palette=function(x) c("#276419","#4D9221","#7FBC41","#B8E186","#E6F5D0",
  #                                    "#FDE0EF","#F1B6DA","#DE77AE","#C51B7D","#8E0152"),
  #              breaks=c(-.8, -.6, -.4, -.2, 0, 0.2, .4, 0.6, 0.8)) +
  theme (axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank(), 
         panel.background = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), 
         legend.text = element_text(size = 14), legend.title = element_text(size = 14))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  labs(fill="Change in Probability")
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time

# Decrease in Risk
100*nrow(map3[map3$chg_over_under == 1,])/nrow(map3)

# Increase in Risk
100*nrow(map3[map3$chg_over_under == 2,])/nrow(map3)

# Stays above 0.5 Risk
100*nrow(map3[map3$chg_over_under == 3,])/nrow(map3)
        
# Stays above 0.5 Risk
100*nrow(map3[map3$chg_over_under == 0,])/nrow(map3)
        

                        

```

#--
# Error Map SW Catchments
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Error SWDW Probability of Violations Catchments"

predictData = predCat_cur  
#rfr_pred = rfc_sw_p # rfc_gw_p, rfc_sw_p
#rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))
rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_Cat.rds'))
ObsData = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_SW_COMIDS.csv'))
pred_sw = pred_sw_Cat
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()


errmap = merge(pred_sw,ObsData[,c('COMID','Viol_Class')],by='COMID')

errmap$error[errmap$Viol_Class == 1 & errmap$Prediction >= 0.5] = "True Positive"
errmap$error[errmap$Viol_Class == 0 & errmap$Prediction < 0.5] = "True Negative"
errmap$error[errmap$Viol_Class == 1 & errmap$Prediction < 0.5] = "False Negative"
errmap$error[errmap$Viol_Class == 0 & errmap$Prediction >= 0.5] = "False Positive"

levels(factor(errmap$error))

map1 <-merge(errmap,cats_p,by="COMID",all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
#map3 <- map2[order(map2$error),]

# Get point data for plotting
map3<-cbind(map2, st_coordinates(st_centroid(map2$geometry)))

#palette.colors(palette = "Okabe-Ito")
#"#000000" "#E69F00" "#56B4E9" "#009E73" "#F0E442" "#0072B2" "#D55E00" "#CC79A7" "#999999"

mypal =c( "True Positive"="red", "True Negative"="#009E73",
          "False Negative"="#CC79A7", "False Positive"="#F0E442" )


# Change order of categories
morder = c('True Negative','False Positive','False Negative','True Positive')
map3$error <- factor(map3$error, levels = morder)

map3a = map3[map3$error != "True Positive",]
map3b = map3[map3$error == "True Positive",]

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(fill='white', data=states_conus, color='black') +
  geom_point(data=map3a, aes(x=X, y=Y, color=error)) +
  geom_point(data=map3b, aes(x=X, y=Y, color=error)) +
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  scale_color_manual(values = mypal,name="Error Categories",)+
  #scale_color_viridis(option="rocket",name="Viol. Frequency")+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())


100*nrow(errmap[errmap$error=='True Positive',])/nrow(errmap) # 3.857366
100*nrow(errmap[errmap$error=='False Negative',])/nrow(errmap) # 0.2516341
100*nrow(errmap[errmap$error=='False Positive',])/nrow(errmap) # 21.01451

100*nrow(errmap[errmap$error=='False Positive',])/nrow(errmap[errmap$Viol_Class==0,]) # 21.01451



```

```{r}
errmap$error[errmap$Viol_Class == 0 & errmap$Prediction < 0.5] = "True Negative"

errmap$error[errmap$Viol_Class == 0 & errmap$Prediction >= 0.5] = "False Positive"

#palette.colors(palette = "Okabe-Ito")

map3b = map3[map3$error == "True Positive",]

  geom_point(data=map3b, aes(x=X, y=Y, color=error)) +

  scale_color_manual(values = mypal,name="Error Categories",)+

  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text

  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())


100*nrow(errmap[errmap$error=='True Positive',])/nrow(errmap) # 3.857366
100*nrow(errmap[errmap$error=='False Negative',])/nrow(errmap) # 0.2516341
100*nrow(errmap[errmap$error=='False Positive',])/nrow(errmap) # 21.01451

100*nrow(errmap[errmap$error=='False Positive',])/nrow(errmap[errmap$Viol_Class==0,]) # 21.01451
```

# Error Map GW HUC12
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Error GWDW Probability of Violations HUC12"

predictData = predHUC_cur  
#rfr_pred = rfc_sw_p # rfc_gw_p, rfc_sw_p
#rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))
ObsData = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_GW_HUC12.csv'))
pred_gw = pred_gw_HU12
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

# Add leading zeros
ObsData$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(ObsData$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 

errmap = merge(pred_gw,ObsData[,c('HUC12','Viol_Class')],by='HUC12')

errmap$error[errmap$Viol_Class == 1 & errmap$Prediction >= 0.5] = "True Positive"
errmap$error[errmap$Viol_Class == 0 & errmap$Prediction < 0.5] = "True Negative"
errmap$error[errmap$Viol_Class == 1 & errmap$Prediction < 0.5] = "False Negative"
errmap$error[errmap$Viol_Class == 0 & errmap$Prediction >= 0.5] = "False Positive"

levels(factor(errmap$error))

map1 <-merge(errmap,huc12_p,by="HUC12",all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
#map3 <- map2[order(map2$error),]

# Get point data for plotting
map3<-cbind(map2, st_coordinates(st_centroid(map2$geometry)))

#palette.colors(palette = "Okabe-Ito")
#"#000000" "#E69F00" "#56B4E9" "#009E73" "#F0E442" "#0072B2" "#D55E00" "#CC79A7" "#999999"

mypal =c( "True Positive"="red", "True Negative"="#009E73",
          "False Negative"="#CC79A7", "False Positive"="#F0E442" )


# Change order of categories
morder = c('True Negative','False Positive','False Negative','True Positive')
map3$error <- factor(map3$error, levels = morder)

map3a = map3[map3$error != "True Positive",]
map3b = map3[map3$error == "True Positive",]

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(fill='white', data=states_conus, color='black') +
  geom_point(data=map3a, aes(x=X, y=Y, color=error)) +
  geom_point(data=map3b, aes(x=X, y=Y, color=error)) +
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  scale_color_manual(values = mypal,name="Error Categories",)+
  #scale_color_viridis(option="rocket",name="Viol. Frequency")+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())


100*nrow(errmap[errmap$error=='True Positive',])/nrow(errmap) # 3.857366
100*nrow(errmap[errmap$error=='False Negative',])/nrow(errmap) # 0.2516341
100*nrow(errmap[errmap$error=='False Positive',])/nrow(errmap) # 21.01451


```

#-- 
# Systematic Future Check
* Checking which variable is causing most of the decrease in violation risk

# Future-4.5G HUC12 Prediction Dataset GW
```{r}

keeps1 = c('HUC12','n_surplus_kgsqkm') 
keeps2 = c('HUC12','precip9120ws','tmean9120cat','PctForest2019Cat','FertCat','ManureCat','CBNFCat')

predHUC_fut = NDATA_huc12
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,prec_hu12,by='HUC12')
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,temp_hu12,by='HUC12')
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,imprv_hu12,by='HUC12')
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,NNI17[,keeps1],by='HUC12')
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,StreamCat_HU12[,keeps2],by='HUC12')



#predHUC_fut$n_surplus_kgsqkm = predHUC_fut$N_surp_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$n_surplus_kgsqkm = predHUC_fut$N_surp_kgsqkm #or n_surplus_kgsqkm or N_surp_kgsqkm

#predHUC_fut$FertCat = predHUC_fut$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$FertCat = predHUC_fut$FertCat

#predHUC_fut$precip9120ws = predHUC_fut$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS
predHUC_fut$precip9120ws = predHUC_fut$precip9120ws

#predHUC_fut$tmean9120cat = predHUC_fut$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS
predHUC_fut$tmean9120cat = predHUC_fut$tmean9120cat

#predHUC_fut$PopDen2010Cat = predHUC_fut$pop_den_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$PopDen2010Cat = predHUC_fut$PopDen2010Cat

#predHUC_fut$N_TW2012Cat = predHUC_fut$totalN_2050ctl_kgNha
predHUC_fut$N_TW2012Cat = predHUC_fut$totalN_2016_kgNha

#predHUC_fut$ManureCat = predHUC_fut$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$ManureCat = predHUC_fut$ManureCat

#predHUC_fut$PctForest2019Cat = predHUC_fut$Pct_forest_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$PctForest2019Cat = predHUC_fut$PctForest2019Cat

#predHUC_fut$CBNFCat = predHUC_fut$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$CBNFCat = predHUC_fut$CBNFCat

#predHUC_fut$PctCrop2019Cat = predHUC_fut$Pct_ag_land_RCP4.5G
#predHUC_fut$PctImp2016Cat = predHUC_fut$impervious_2050_RCP4.5GISS


#"N_Surp_2017ws" "n_ags_2017ws" 

# Merge on static variables
statkeeps = c('HUC12','ElevCat','AgKffactCat','AgDrain_pctCat','BFICat',
              'Precip_Minus_EVTCat','WaterInputCat','wdrw_LDCat',
              'permcat','runoffcat','RockNCat','Fe2O3Cat','SandCat',
              'NHDslope_Pct_Cat','WtDepCat','Hillslope_PctCat','HydrlCondCat')
predHUC_4.5G = merge(predHUC_fut,StreamCat_HU12[,statkeeps],by='HUC12')



```

# Future-4.5G HUC12 Prediction Dataset
```{r}

keeps1 = c('HUC12','n_surplus_kgsqkm') 
keeps2 = c('HUC12','precip9120ws','tmean9120cat','PctForest2019Cat','FertCat','ManureCat','CBNFCat')

predHUC_fut = NDATA_huc12
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,prec_hu12,by='HUC12')
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,temp_hu12,by='HUC12')
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,imprv_hu12,by='HUC12')
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,NNI17[,keeps1],by='HUC12')
predHUC_fut = merge(predHUC_fut,StreamCat_HU12[,keeps2],by='HUC12')



#predHUC_fut$n_surplus_kgsqkm = predHUC_fut$N_surp_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$n_surplus_kgsqkm = predHUC_fut$N_surp_kgsqkm #or n_surplus_kgsqkm or N_surp_kgsqkm

#predHUC_fut$FertCat = predHUC_fut$n_farm_fert_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$FertCat = predHUC_fut$FertCat

#predHUC_fut$precip9120ws = predHUC_fut$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS
predHUC_fut$precip9120ws = predHUC_fut$precip9120ws

#predHUC_fut$tmean9120cat = predHUC_fut$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS
predHUC_fut$tmean9120cat = predHUC_fut$tmean9120cat

#predHUC_fut$PopDen2010Cat = predHUC_fut$pop_den_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$PopDen2010Cat = predHUC_fut$PopDen2010Cat

#predHUC_fut$N_TW2012Cat = predHUC_fut$totalN_2050ctl_kgNha
predHUC_fut$N_TW2012Cat = predHUC_fut$totalN_2016_kgNha

#predHUC_fut$ManureCat = predHUC_fut$n_manure_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$ManureCat = predHUC_fut$ManureCat

#predHUC_fut$PctForest2019Cat = predHUC_fut$Pct_forest_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$PctForest2019Cat = predHUC_fut$PctForest2019Cat

#predHUC_fut$CBNFCat = predHUC_fut$n_crop_fix_kgsqkm_RCP4.5G
predHUC_fut$CBNFCat = predHUC_fut$CBNFCat

#predHUC_fut$PctCrop2019Cat = predHUC_fut$Pct_ag_land_RCP4.5G
#predHUC_fut$PctImp2016Cat = predHUC_fut$impervious_2050_RCP4.5GISS


#"N_Surp_2017ws" "n_ags_2017ws" 

# Merge on static variables
statkeeps = c('HUC12','ElevCat','AgKffactCat','AgDrain_pctCat','BFICat',
              'Precip_Minus_EVTCat','WaterInputCat','wdrw_LDCat',
              'permcat','runoffcat','RockNCat','Fe2O3Cat','SandCat',
              'NHDslope_Pct_Cat','WtDepCat','Hillslope_PctCat','HydrlCondCat')
predHUC_4.5G = merge(predHUC_fut,StreamCat_HU12[,statkeeps],by='HUC12')



```


# Raster Map 4.5G
```{r}



#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Future Probability of Violations (RCP4.5 GISS)"

predictData = predHUC_4.5G  
#rfr_pred = rfc_sw_p
rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))
#rfr_pred = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_HU12.rds'))


#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

predictData2 = as.data.frame(subset(predictData,select=-c(HUC12)))
dim(predictData2)

setdiff(names(rfr_pred$variable.importance),colnames(predictData)) # gives not matching


predict1 = predict(rfr_pred,data = predictData2)

preds = as.data.frame(predict1$predictions[,2])
names(preds)[1] = "Prediction"

# Merge back on HUC12s
pred_all = cbind(predictData$HUC12 ,preds)
names(pred_all)[1] = 'HUC12'

nrow(pred_all)  # 36252 

nrow(pred_all[pred_all$Prediction > 0.5,])
summary(pred_all$Prediction)

# Merge on Spatial Data

map1 = merge(pred_all,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)

map2 = map1[complete.cases(map1[,c("Prediction")]),] 
map2 <- st_as_sf(map2) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Prediction),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

nrow(map3[map3$Prediction>0.5,])
summary(map3$Prediction)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Prediction"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 3000, dy = 3000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


## Plot Nitrogen Maps
start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot()+
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Prediction))+
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  # scale_color_viridis(option="magma",name="Risk Score" 
  #                     ,limits = c(0, 1)
  #                     )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
               palette=function(x) c("#5E4FA2","#3288BD","#66C2A5","#ABDDA4","#E6F598",
                                     "#FEE08B","#FDAE61","#F46D43","#D53E4F","#9E0142"),
               breaks=c(.1, .2, .3, .4, .5, 0.6, .7, 0.8, 0.9)) +
  theme (axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank(), 
         panel.background = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), 
         legend.text = element_text(size = 14), legend.title = element_text(size = 14))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  labs(fill="Risk Value")
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 33.21989 secs



```


#$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$
# SHAP ANALYSIS
#$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$


# SHAP
* Shapley analysis
* Interpretation (Shape Value units are equal to units of response variable):
** If looking at 1 (increase) category:
***SHAP value of 0.1 for Fertilizer means it increased probably of increasing violations by 10% compared to average
***SHAP value of -0.02 for Fertilizer means it decreased probability of increasing violations by 2%
***SHAP value of -.014 for pop served means it decreased in probability of increasing in violations by 1.4% at that locatoin compared to average 

# *SHAP (PWS locations)
* Interpretation (Shape Value units are equal to units of response variable):
** If looking at 1 (increase) category:
***SHAP value of 0.1 for Fertilizer means it increased probably of increasing violations by 10% compared to average
```{r}

library(fastshap)
library(ranger)

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

fit = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_SW_HU12.rds'))
fit = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/Models/RF_prob_model_Future_DW_NO3_GW_HU12.rds'))


DATA = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_SW_HUC12.csv'))
DATA = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_GW_HUC12.csv'))

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

# Subset to just PWS locations


setdiff(names(fit$variable.importance),colnames(DATA))

pfun <- function(object, newdata) {
  predict(object, data = newdata)$predictions[, 2] # Extracts probability of the second class (Increased=1)
}

# ypred. = predict(rfc_sw_p, data = DATA)#,type='prob')
# ypred.. = ypred.$predictions[, 2] # if using predicted probability model


X <- subset(DATA, select = -c(HUC12,viol_freq,Viol_Class))
#X <- as.data.frame(subset(DATA, select = -HUC12))
#X <- DATA

nrow(X) # 7917 SW HU12, 32575 GW Hu12

# The data point(s) you want to explain (e.g., the first few rows)
observations_to_explain <- head(X, nrow(X))

start_time <- Sys.time()
set.seed(1051) # for reproducibility
shap_values <- fastshap::explain(
  object = fit,
  X = X, # Background data
  pred_wrapper = pfun, # The custom prediction function
  newdata = observations_to_explain, # Data to explain
  nsim = 50, # Number of Monte Carlo simulations (higher for better accuracy)
  adjust = TRUE # Adjust values to sum up to prediction difference
)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 30.18527 mins (14731 rows - SW Catchments)
# Time difference of 16.48838 mins (7912 rows - SW HUC12)
# Time difference of 1.738577 hours (32575 rows - GW HUC12)

options(scipen = 999)

# Save results
#saveRDS(shap_values, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/SHAP_Values_Future_DW_NO3_SW_PWS_COMIDs.rds'))
#saveRDS(shap_values, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/SHAP_Values_Future_DW_NO3_SW_PWS_HUC12.rds'))

saveRDS(shap_values, file = paste0(future_dir ,'Data/SHAP_Values_Future_DW_NO3_GW_PWS_HUC12.rds'))


```


# *SHAP (All HUC12)
* Interpretation (Shape Value units are equal to units of response variable):
** If looking at 1 (increase) category:
***SHAP value of 0.1 for Fertilizer means it increased probably of increasing violations by 10% compared to average
```{r}

library(fastshap)
library(ranger)

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
fit = rfc_PWS_SUSC_p
#DATA = lake_haz_data
#DATA2 = lake_haz_data_comid
DATA =  preddata_mean

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

# Subset to just PWS locations


setdiff(names(fit$variable.importance),colnames(DATA))

pfun <- function(object, newdata) {
  predict(object, data = newdata)$predictions[, 2] # Extracts probability of the second class (Increased=1)
}

#X <- subset(DATA, select = -Cyan_Class)
X <- as.data.frame(subset(DATA, select = -HUC12))

#X <- DATA

# The data point(s) you want to explain (e.g., the first few rows)
observations_to_explain <- head(X, nrow(X))

start_time <- Sys.time()
set.seed(1051) # for reproducibility
shap_values <- fastshap::explain(
  object = fit,
  X = X, # Background data
  pred_wrapper = pfun, # The custom prediction function
  newdata = observations_to_explain, # Data to explain
  nsim = 50, # Number of Monte Carlo simulations (higher for better accuracy)
  adjust = TRUE # Adjust values to sum up to prediction difference
)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time

# Time difference of 24.35505 mins (1614 rows - GW Conc)
# Time difference of 37.59172 mins (2722 rows, 50 sims)
# Time difference of 1.63298 hours (3163 rows, 50 sims)

options(scipen = 999)

# Save results
saveRDS(shap_values, file = paste0(shiny_dir ,'SHAP_Values_Susceptiblity_Lake_PWS.rds'))



```


# SHAP - Vizualize
```{r}

library(shapviz)

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
shap_values = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/SHAP_Values_Future_DW_NO3_SW_PWS_HUC12.rds'))

DATA = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_SW_HUC12.csv'))


#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

observations_to_explain <- subset(DATA, select = -HUC12)


# Visualize

# Create a shapviz object
shv <- shapviz(shap_values, X = observations_to_explain)

# Example visualizations

# Bee plot
sv_importance(shv, kind = "bee")

# Waterfall plot for the first observation
# sv_waterfall(shv, row_id = 1)
# 
# # Force plot (requires the 'ggforce' and 'ggplot2' packages)
# sv_force(shv, row_id = 1)
# 
# # Global feature importance plot
# sv_importance(shv)



```

# *Map-most Pos. influential variables
* Aggregate to select variable categories (N Inputs, PWS, Weather, geologic)
* https://davidmathlogic.com/colorblind/#%23D81B60-%231E88E5-%23FFC107-%23004D40
https://journal.r-project.org/articles/RJ-2023-071/* 
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
# All HUC12s with PWSIDs
shap_values = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/SHAP_Values_Future_DW_NO3_SW_PWS_HUC12.rds'))
shap_values = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/SHAP_Values_Future_DW_NO3_GW_PWS_HUC12.rds'))

DATA = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_SW_HUC12.csv'))
DATA = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_GW_HUC12.csv'))

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

DATA$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(DATA$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) # add zero in front of any

maxmap = as.data.frame(shap_values)

# Subset out just neg SHAP values
# Get max value per row
maxmap$max_value = apply(maxmap, 1, max)

# Find max shapley value in each row
maxmap$max_shap<-colnames(maxmap)[apply(maxmap,1,which.max)]

# Merge on HUC12 and response variable
maxmap<-cbind(dplyr::select(DATA, c(HUC12)),maxmap)

# Remove any Rows that are negative
maxmap = maxmap[maxmap$max_value >0,]

levels(factor(maxmap$max_shap)) 

# Aggregate max shaps to broader categories
maxmap <- maxmap %>%
  mutate(max_shap2 = case_when(
    max_shap=="AgKffactWs" | max_shap=="AgKffactCat" | max_shap=="AgDrain_pctCat" | max_shap== "PctCrop2019Cat" ~ "Agricultural Land Use",
    max_shap=="n_surplus_kgsqkm" | max_shap=="N_TW2012Cat" | max_shap=="N_Surp_2017ws"  | 
      max_shap=="FertCat" | max_shap=="n_ag_surplus_kgsqkm"~ "N Inputs",
    max_shap=="BFICat"  | max_shap=="runoffcat"~ "Hydrology",
    max_shap=="Precip_Minus_EVTCat" ~ "Precip. Surplus",
    max_shap=="RockNCat" ~ "Rock N",
    max_shap=="PctForest2019Cat" ~ "% Forest",
    max_shap=="PopDen2010Cat" | max_shap=="ElevCat" | max_shap=="PctImp2016Cat"| max_shap=="WtDepCat"~ "Other",
    max_shap=="Fe2O3Cat" | max_shap=="NHDslope_Pct_Cat" | max_shap=="Hillslope_PctCat" | max_shap=="SandCat" | 
      max_shap=="permcat" | max_shap=="HydrlCondCat"~ "Soil/Geology",
    max_shap=="WaterInputCat"| max_shap=="precip9120ws" | max_shap=="wdrw_LDCat" ~ "Water Inputs",
    max_shap=="tmean9120cat" ~ "Temperature"))


maxmap$max_shap2[is.na(maxmap$max_shap2)] <- "Other"

# Merge shapefiles with dataframe
maxmap<-merge(maxmap,huc12_p,by="HUC12",all.x=T)
maxmap = st_as_sf(maxmap)

#maxmap<- st_transform(maxmap, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

# Get point data for plotting
maxmap<-cbind(maxmap, st_coordinates(st_centroid(maxmap$geometry)))
 

mypal =c( "Hydrology"="#56B4E9", 
          "Precip. Surplus"="#332288",
         "Soil/Geology"="#D55E00", 
         "Agricultural Land Use"="#F0E442", 
         "% Forest" = "#009E73",
         "Temperature"="#CC79A7",
         "Rock N"="orange",
         "Water Inputs"="blue",
         "N Inputs"="red",
         "Other"="#999999")


# Get % for each variable class
100*nrow(maxmap[maxmap$max_shap2=='Hydrology', ])/nrow(maxmap)
100*nrow(maxmap[maxmap$max_shap2=='Precip. Surplus', ])/nrow(maxmap)
100*nrow(maxmap[maxmap$max_shap2=='Soil/Geology', ])/nrow(maxmap)
100*nrow(maxmap[maxmap$max_shap2=='Agricultural Land Use', ])/nrow(maxmap)
100*nrow(maxmap[maxmap$max_shap2=='N Inputs', ])/nrow(maxmap)
100*nrow(maxmap[maxmap$max_shap2=='Rock N', ])/nrow(maxmap)
100*nrow(maxmap[maxmap$max_shap2=='Temperature', ])/nrow(maxmap)
100*nrow(maxmap[maxmap$max_shap2=='Water Inputs', ])/nrow(maxmap)
100*nrow(maxmap[maxmap$max_shap2=='Other', ])/nrow(maxmap)


# Plot map of aggregated max shapley values
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(fill='white', data=states_conus, color='black') +
  geom_point(data=maxmap, aes(x=X, y=Y, color=max_shap2),size=.5) +
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  theme(axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), panel.background = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_blank(), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  scale_color_manual(values = mypal)+
    theme(legend.position="none")

# For legend
maxmap$max_shap2 <-
  factor(maxmap$max_shap2, 
         levels = c("Hydrology","Precip. Surplus", "N Inputs",'Rock N',
                    "Agricultural Land Use","Soil/Geology","% Forest",
                    "Temperature","Water Inputs","Other"))



ggplot() +
  geom_sf(fill='white', data=states_conus, color='black') +
  geom_point(data=maxmap, aes(x=X, y=Y, color=max_shap2), size=4) +
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  theme(axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), panel.background = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_blank(), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = mypal)
  #scale_color_manual(values=c("PWS Operation"="#117733", "Weather"="#88CCEE", "Soil/Geologic Characteristics"="#882255", "Hydrology"="#332288", "Agricultural Land Use"="#DDCC77", "Nitrogen Inputs"="#CC6677","Other"="grey"),name="Most Positively Influential Variable")



```

# *Map-most Neg. influential variables
* Aggregate to select variable categories (N Inputs, PWS, Weather, geologic)
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
# All HUC12s with PWSIDs
shap_values = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/SHAP_Values_Future_DW_NO3_SW_PWS_HUC12.rds'))
shap_values = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/SHAP_Values_Future_DW_NO3_GW_PWS_HUC12.rds'))

DATA = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_SW_HUC12.csv'))
DATA = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_GW_HUC12.csv'))

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
DATA$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(DATA$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) # add zero in front of any


minmap = as.data.frame(shap_values)

# Subset out just neg SHAP values
# Get min value per row
minmap$min_value = apply(minmap, 1, min)

# Find max shapley value in each row
minmap$min_shap<-colnames(minmap)[apply(minmap,1,which.min)]


# Merge on HUC12 and response variable
minmap<-cbind(dplyr::select(DATA, c(HUC12)),minmap)

# Remove any Rows that are positive
minmap = minmap[minmap$min_value <0,]

levels(factor(minmap$min_shap)) 

minmap <- minmap %>%
  mutate(min_shap2 = case_when(
    min_shap=="AgKffactWs" | min_shap=="AgKffactCat" | min_shap=="AgDrain_pctCat" | min_shap== "PctCrop2019Cat" ~ "Agricultural Land Use",
    min_shap=="n_surplus_kgsqkm" | min_shap=="N_TW2012Cat" | min_shap=="N_Surp_2017ws" | 
      min_shap=="FertCat" | min_shap=="n_ag_surplus_kgsqkm"~ "N Inputs",
    min_shap=="RunoffWs" | min_shap=="BFICat" | min_shap=="runoffcat"~ "Hydrology",
    min_shap=="Precip_Minus_EVTCat" ~ "Precip. Surplus",
    min_shap=="RockNCat" ~ "Rock N",
    min_shap=="PctForest2019Cat" ~ "% Forest",
    min_shap=="PopDen2010Cat" | min_shap=="ElevCat" | min_shap=="PctImp2016Cat"~ "Other",
    min_shap=="Fe2O3Cat" | min_shap=="NHDslope_Pct_Cat" | min_shap=="Hillslope_PctCat" | 
      min_shap=="SandCat" | min_shap=="permcat"~ "Soil/Geology",
    min_shap=="WaterInputCat"|min_shap=="wdrw_LDCat" | min_shap=="precip9120ws" ~ "Water Inputs",
    min_shap=="tmean9120cat" ~ "Temperature"))


minmap$min_shap2[is.na(minmap$min_shap2)] <- "Other"

# Merge shapefiles with dataframe
minmap<-merge(minmap,huc12_p,by="HUC12",all.x=T)
minmap = st_as_sf(minmap)

minmap<- st_transform(minmap, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

# Get point data for plotting
minmap<-cbind(minmap, st_coordinates(st_centroid(minmap$geometry)))

mypal =c( "Hydrology"="#56B4E9", 
          "Precip. Surplus"="#332288",
         "Soil/Geology"="#D55E00", 
         "Agricultural Land Use"="#F0E442", 
         "% Forest" = "#009E73",
         "Temperature"="#CC79A7",
         "Rock N"="orange",
         "Water Inputs"="blue",
         "N Inputs"="red",
         "Other"="#999999")


# Get % for each variable class
100*nrow(minmap[minmap$min_shap2=='Hydrology', ])/nrow(minmap)
100*nrow(minmap[minmap$min_shap2=='Precip. Surplus', ])/nrow(maxmap)
100*nrow(minmap[minmap$min_shap2=='Soil/Geology', ])/nrow(minmap)
100*nrow(minmap[minmap$min_shap2=='Agricultural Land Use', ])/nrow(minmap)
100*nrow(minmap[minmap$min_shap2=='N Inputs', ])/nrow(minmap)
100*nrow(minmap[minmap$min_shap2=='Rock N', ])/nrow(maxmap)
100*nrow(minmap[minmap$min_shap2=='Temperature', ])/nrow(minmap)
100*nrow(minmap[minmap$min_shap2=='Water Inputs', ])/nrow(minmap)
100*nrow(minmap[minmap$min_shap2=='Other', ])/nrow(minmap)

# Plot map of aggregated max shapley values
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(fill='white', data=states_conus, color='black') +
  geom_point(data=minmap, aes(x=X, y=Y, color=min_shap2),size=.5) +
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  theme(axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), panel.background = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_blank(), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  scale_color_manual(values=mypal)+
    theme(legend.position="none")

# For legend
# ggplot() +
#   geom_sf(fill='white', data=states_conus, color='black') +
#   geom_point(data=minmap, aes(x=X, y=Y, color=min_shap2), size=4) +
#   geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
#   theme(axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), panel.background = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_blank(), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
#   scale_color_manual(values=c("PWS Operation"="#117733", "Weather"="#88CCEE", "Soil/Geologic Characteristics"="#882255", "Hydrology"="#332288", "Agricultural Land Use"="#DDCC77", "Nitrogen Inputs"="#CC6677","Other"="grey"),name="Most Positively Influential Variable")


# ggplot() +
#   geom_point(data = mapdf, size=2,
#              aes(X,Y,colour=max_shap))+
#   geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
#   #scale_color_viridis(option="turbo",name="SHAP Value")+# options: viridis, magma, plasma, turbo
#   theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
#   theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
#   theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
#   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
#   labs(x="",y="")+
#   ggtitle(paste0('SHAP Values for ',paste0(variable),'\n ',TITLE))


```

# SHAP Scatter Plots
```{r}
library(gridExtra)

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

shap_values = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/SHAP_Values_Future_DW_NO3_SW_PWS_HUC12.rds'))
shap_values = readRDS(paste0(future_dir ,'Data/SHAP_Values_Future_DW_NO3_GW_PWS_HUC12.rds'))

DATA2 = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_SW_HUC12.csv'))
DATA2 = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_GW_HUC12.csv'))

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()


## Mapping and X-Y plots
# Assign new column based on largest shap value
shap_df<-as.data.frame(shap_values)

 
## Function to plot shap vs. input values
xyplot <- function(column, plottitle){
  ggplot() +
    geom_point(aes(x=DATA2[[column]],y=shap_df[[column]])) +
    #xlab("Variable Value") + 
    xlab(plottitle) + 
    ylab("SHAP Value") + 
    theme(axis.text=element_text(size=8),
        axis.title=element_text(size=11,face="bold")) +
    #ggtitle(plottitle) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size=11,face = "bold"))
}
 
## Plots for top three variables
t1 = xyplot("tmean9120cat","Temperature")
t2 = xyplot("precip9120ws","Precipitation")
t3 = xyplot("SandCat","% Sand in Soil")
t4 = xyplot("BFICat","Baseflow Index")
t5 = xyplot("WtDepCat","Water Table Depth")
t6 = xyplot("AgKffactCat","Ag. K Factor")
t7 = xyplot("ElevCat","Elevation")
t8 = xyplot("Precip_Minus_EVTCat","Precip. Surplus")
t9 = xyplot("PctForest2019Cat","% Forest")
t10 = xyplot("WaterInputCat","Irrigation/Precip.")
t11 = xyplot("PopDen2010Cat","Population Density")

m1 = xyplot("Fe2O3Cat","% Soil Iron Oxide")
m2 = xyplot("permcat","Soil Permiability")
m3 = xyplot("HydrlCondCat","Hydro. Conductivity")
m4 = xyplot("AgDrain_pctCat","% Ag. Drainage")
m5 = xyplot("PctCrop2019Cat","% Cropland")
m6 = xyplot("FertCat","Fertilizer Application Rate")
m7 = xyplot("n_surplus_kgsqkm","Overall N Surplus")
m8 = xyplot("n_ag_surplus_kgsqkm","Agricultural N Surplus")
m9 = xyplot("RockNCat","Rock N")
m10 = xyplot("N_TW2010Cat","TN Deposition")

m11 = xyplot("PctImp2016Cat","% Impervious")
m12 = xyplot("Fe2O3Cat","% Fe2O3")
m13 = xyplot("N_Surp_2017ws","N Surplus")
m14 = xyplot("runoffcat","Runoff")



# SW 
grid.arrange(xyplot("Precip_Minus_EVTCat","Precip. Surplus"),
             xyplot("permcat","Soil Permiability"),
             xyplot("AgKffactCat","Ag. K Factor"),
             xyplot("PopDen2010Cat","Population Density"),
             xyplot("PctForest2019Cat","% Forest"),
             xyplot("precip9120ws","Precipitation"),
             xyplot("RockNCat","Rock N"),
             xyplot("Fe2O3Cat","% Fe2O3"),
             xyplot("tmean9120cat","Temperature"),
             xyplot("BFICat","Baseflow Index"),
             xyplot("ManureCat","Manure Inputs"),
             xyplot("ElevCat","Elevation"),
             xyplot("WaterInputCat","Irrigation/Precip."),
             xyplot("CBNFCat","CBNF"),
             xyplot("NHDslope_Pct_Cat","NHD Slope %"),
             xyplot("AgDrain_pctCat","% Ag. Drainage"),
             xyplot("n_surplus_kgsqkm","N Surplus"),
             xyplot("N_TW2012Cat","TN Deposition"),
             xyplot("wdrw_LDCat","Water Withdrawals"),
             xyplot("FertCat","Fertilizer N Inputs"),
             nrow=4,ncol=5)
             
# GW
grid.arrange(xyplot("precip9120ws","Precipitation"),
             xyplot("tmean9120cat","Temperature"),
             xyplot("PctForest2019Cat","% Forest"),
             xyplot("BFICat","Baseflow Index"),
             xyplot("PopDen2010Cat","Population Density"),
             xyplot("permcat","Soil Permiability"),
             xyplot("Hillslope_PctCat","% Hillslope"),
             xyplot("Precip_Minus_EVTCat","Precip. Surplus"),
             xyplot("n_surplus_kgsqkm","N Surplus"),
             xyplot("WaterInputCat","Irrigation/Precip."),
             xyplot("RockNCat","Rock N"),
             xyplot("ElevCat","Elevation"),
             xyplot("wdrw_LDCat","Water Withdrawals"),
             xyplot("WtDepCat","Water Table Depth"),
             xyplot("N_TW2012Cat","TN Deposition"),
             xyplot("AgDrain_pctCat","% Ag. Drainage"),
             xyplot("Fe2O3Cat","% Fe2O3"),
             xyplot("AgKffactCat","Ag. K Factor"),
             xyplot("HydrlCondCat","Hydrologic Conductivity"),
             xyplot("FertCat","Fertilizer N Inputs"),
             nrow=4,ncol=5)

grid.arrange(t8,m2,t7,t6,t3,t10,m9,m11,
             t4,t2,m12,m13,t11,t1,m14,m4,nrow=2,ncol=8)
# grid.arrange(m2,t7,t3,t6,t10,m9,m11,t4,
#              t2,m12,m13,t11,t1,t8,m6,t10,
#              t11,m7,p3,p4,p5,p7,p6,p8,nrow=3,ncol=8)

# GW Conc.
grid.arrange(t3,p1,m10,p2,t1,t2,m9,t7,
             t5,t6,t4,t8,m7,m5,p3,m6,
             m8,m3,t10,p4,p5,p7,p6,p8,nrow=3,ncol=8)
# GW Viol.
grid.arrange(m9,m6,t1,m8,t11,t5,m10,t7,
             t6,p1,t9,m2,m1,t2,m7,t10,
             t4,p3,p2,p4,p5,p6,p7,p8,nrow=3,ncol=8)
```

# Testing
```{r}

test = LU_nni_hu12[,c("HUC12","Change_ag_land_pct_RCP4.5G","Change_crop_land_pct_RCP4.5G",
                      "change_ratio_ag_RCP4.5G","change_ratio_crop_RCP4.5G",
                      'area_07.cropland_landuse_RCP4.5GISS','area_07.cropland_landuse_2010')]


```



#---------------------

# Map SW Observed Violations HUC12
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Observed SWDW Violations at HUC12"

MapData = rf_sw2  # rf_sw2, rf_gw2
MapData$Variable = MapData$viol_freq
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 <-merge(MapData,huc12_p,by="HUC12",all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]

# Get point data for plotting
map3<-cbind(map3, st_coordinates(st_centroid(map3$geometry)))

map3$Viol_Class2 = ifelse(map3$Viol_Class == 1,"Violation","No Violation")  
#mypal =c( "0"="#56B4E9", "1"="red" )
mypal =c( "No Violation"="#56B4E9", "Violation"="red" )

start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(fill='white', data=states_conus, color='black') +
  geom_point(data=map3, aes(x=X, y=Y, color=Viol_Class2)) +
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  scale_color_manual(values = mypal,name="Nitrate Violations",)+
  #scale_color_viridis(option="rocket",name="Viol. Frequency")+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time



```

# Map GW Observed Violations HUC12
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Observed GWDW Violations at HUC12"

MapData = rf_gw2  # rf_sw2, rf_gw2
MapData$Variable = MapData$viol_freq
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 <-merge(MapData,huc12_p,by="HUC12",all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]

# Get point data for plotting
map3<-cbind(map3, st_coordinates(st_centroid(map3$geometry)))

map3$Viol_Class2 = ifelse(map3$Viol_Class == 1,"Violation","No Violation")  
#mypal =c( "0"="#56B4E9", "1"="red" )
mypal =c( "No Violation"="#56B4E9", "Violation"="red" )

start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(fill='white', data=states_conus, color='black') +
  geom_point(data=map3, aes(x=X, y=Y, color=Viol_Class2)) +
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  scale_color_manual(values = mypal,name="Nitrate Violations",)+
  #scale_color_viridis(option="rocket",name="Viol. Frequency")+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time



```

# Map SW Observed Violations Catchment
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Observed SWDW Violations at NHD Catchment"

MapData = read.csv(paste0(future_dir,'Data/Dataset_RF_Model_SW_COMIDS.csv'))

MapData$Variable = MapData$viol_freq
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 <-merge(MapData,cats_p,by="COMID",all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]

# Get point data for plotting
map3<-cbind(map3, st_coordinates(st_centroid(map3$geometry)))

map3$Viol_Class2 = ifelse(map3$Viol_Class == 1,"Violation","No Violation")  
#mypal =c( "0"="#56B4E9", "1"="red" )
mypal =c( "No Violation"="#56B4E9", "Violation"="red" )

start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(fill='white', data=states_conus, color='black') +
  geom_point(data=map3, aes(x=X, y=Y, color=Viol_Class2)) +
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  scale_color_manual(values = mypal,name="Nitrate Violations",)+
  #scale_color_viridis(option="rocket",name="Viol. Frequency")+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time



```

# Map Current N Surplus (NNI)
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Current N Surplus (NNI17)"

MapData = NNI17  
MapData$Variable = MapData$n_surplus_kgsqkm
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


## Plot Nitrogen Maps
start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot()+
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  # scale_color_viridis(option="magma",name=""
  #                     #,limits = c(0, 1)
  #                     )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
               palette=function(x) c("#5E4FA2","#3288BD","#66C2A5","#ABDDA4","#E6F598",
                                     "#FEE08B","#FDAE61","#F46D43","#D53E4F","#9E0142"),
               breaks=c(-10000, 0, 1000, 2000, 3000, 5000, 30000, 60000)) +
  theme (axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank(), 
         panel.background = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), 
         legend.text = element_text(size = 14), legend.title = element_text(size = 14))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  labs(fill="kg/sqkm")
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 33.21989 secs





```

```{r}
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)

  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(fill='transparent', data = states_conus, color='black') +
  # scale_color_viridis(option="magma",name=""

  #                     )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  binned_scale(aesthetics = "fill",
               palette=function(x) c("#5E4FA2","#3288BD","#66C2A5","#ABDDA4","#E6F598",
```

```{r}
         panel.background = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), 
         legend.text = element_text(size = 14), legend.title = element_text(size = 14))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  labs(fill="kg/sqkm")
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 33.21989 secs





```


# Map Current Fertilizer StreamCat
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Current Fertilizer (StreamCat 2019)"

MapData = StreamCat_HU12  
MapData$Variable = MapData$FertWs
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  scale_fill_viridis(option="cividis",name="kg N/ha", na.value = "white"
                      #limits = c(0, 1)
                      )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time



```

```{r}
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  scale_fill_viridis(option="cividis",name="kg N/ha", na.value = "white"
                      #limits = c(0, 1)
                      )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time



```

```{r}
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time



```

# Map Chg % Ag Land
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Change in % Ag Land (RCP4.5 GISS)"

MapData = LU_nni_hu12  
MapData$Variable = MapData$Change_ag_land_pct_RCP4.5G 
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  #scale_fill_viridis(option="cividis",name="Change in %")+
  scale_fill_viridis_b(option="cividis",name="Change in %", na.value = "white"
                     breaks = c(-50,-10,-5, -1, 0,0.1))+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time





```

# Map Current Temperature
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Current Temperature"

MapData = StreamCat_HU12  
MapData$Variable = MapData$tmean9120cat
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  scale_fill_viridis(option="magma",name="Temp C", 
                      #limits = c(0, 1)
                      )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time




```

# Map Current Precipitation
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Current Precipitation (mm) 1990-2020"

MapData = StreamCat_HU12  
MapData$Variable = MapData$precip9120cat
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  scale_fill_viridis(option="viridis",name="Precip. (mm)", 
                      #limits = c(0, 1)
                      )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time


```

# Map Future Precipitation
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()

# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)

  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  scale_fill_viridis(option="viridis",name="Precip. (mm)",

                      )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
```

# Map Chg Precipitation
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Change in Precipitation (RCP4.5 GISS)"

MapData = prec_hu12  
MapData$Variable = MapData$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  #scale_fill_viridis(option="viridis",name="% Change")+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  scale_fill_viridis_b(option="plasma",name="Change %",
                     breaks = c(-10,0,10,20,40,60))+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time

```


# Map Current Precipitation Surplus StreamCat

```{r}
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Current Precip - PET (StreamCat 2019)"

MapData = StreamCat_HU12  
MapData$Variable = MapData$Precip_Minus_EVTWs
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  scale_fill_viridis_b(option="mako",name="Change in %", 
                       breaks = c(-100, -50,-20,-5, 0,5,50,100,200,300))+
  #scale_fill_viridis(option="mako",name="% ")+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
```

```{r}
map_title = "Change % Wetlands (RCP4.5 GISS)"

MapData = LU_nni_hu12  
MapData$Variable = MapData$Change_wetlands_pct_RCP4.5G

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  scale_fill_viridis_b(option="mako",name="Change in %", 
                       breaks = c(-10, -1,-0.5,-0.1, 0,0.1,0.5,1, 5,10))+
  #scale_fill_viridis(option="mako",name="% ")+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time


```

# Map Current Pop Density1
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Current Pop Density (StreamCat)"

MapData = StreamCat_HU12  
MapData$Variable = MapData$PopDen2010Cat
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  scale_fill_viridis_b(option="mako",name="Pop/sqkm", 
                       breaks = c(0, 1, 3, 5,10, 50, 100,500),
                       n.breaks = 9
                      )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time


```

```{r}
                       #n.breaks = 9
                      )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time

```

# Map Current N Dep (StreamCat)
```{r}

#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
map_title = "Current Total N Deposition (StreamCat)"

MapData = StreamCat_HU12  
MapData$Variable = MapData$N_TW2012Ws
#()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()()
summary(MapData$Variable)


# Remove rows where value is NA or Inf
MapData$Variable[is.infinite(MapData$Variable)] = NA
MapData = MapData[complete.cases(MapData[,c("Variable")]),] 
#test = MapData[,c('HUC12','N_Surp_2017ws','N_surp_RCP4.5G')]


# Merge on Spatial Data
map1 = merge(MapData,huc12_s[,c('HUC12','geometry')],by.x='HUC12',by.y='HUC12',all.x=T)
map2 <- st_as_sf(map1) # added this because the above didn't retain geometry
map3 <- map2[order(map2$Variable),]
#map3 <- st_transform(map3, CRS("+init=epsg:5070"))

summary(map3$Variable)

# Format rasters
start_time <- Sys.time()
map4<-st_rasterize(map3[,"Variable"],
                     st_as_stars(st_bbox(states_boundary),
                                 dx = 10000, dy = 10000, values=NA_real_), na.rm=T)
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 8.113112 secs (Desktop at 1000m)


start_time <- Sys.time()
ggplot() +
  geom_stars(data=map4, aes(fill=Variable))+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')+
  scale_fill_viridis(option="rocket",name="kg N/ha", 
                      #limits = c(0, 1)
                      )+ # options: viridis, magma, plasma
  theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.text = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(axis.ticks = element_blank())+ # remove axis text
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))+
  ggtitle(map_title)+
  
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),     # Remove background
    panel.grid = element_blank(),     # Remove gridlines
    axis.text = element_blank(),     # Remove Axis ticks/text/titles
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank())
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time




```

# Catchments Shapefile
```{r}
library(sf)
library(raster)
# Load NHD Catchment Shapefile
start_time <- Sys.time()
fgd = "D:/ArcGIS/NHDplusV2/Seamless/NHDPlusNationalData/NHDPlusV21_National_Seamless.gdb"
cats_all <- sf::st_read(dsn = fgd, layer = "Catchment")
end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 2.612937 mins

# start_time <- Sys.time()
# cats_all <- st_transform(cats_all, CRS("+init=epsg:26978"))
# end_time <- Sys.time(); end_time - start_time
# Time difference of 5.582124 mins

# Save Dataframe of Catchments




```

# HUC12 Shapefile
```{r}
library(raster)
library(sf)
# Get HUC12 Data
fgdb <- 'D:/ArcGIS/SDWIS_Model/Maps/HUC12/NHDPlusV2_WBDSnapshot_EnviroAtlas_CONUS.gdb'
huc12_s <- sf::st_read(dsn = fgdb, layer = "NHDPlusV2_WBDSnapshot_EnviroAtlas_CONUS")

# Add leading zeros
huc12_s$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(huc12_s$HUC_12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 

huc12_s <- st_transform(huc12_s, CRS("+init=epsg:26978"))


#Convert shape to geometry
names(huc12_s)[which(colnames(huc12_s)=="Shape")] = "geometry"
huc12_s = st_as_sf(huc12_s)
st_geometry(huc12_s) <- "geometry"
projection(huc12_s)


```

# HUC8 Shapefile
```{r}
c_dir = "C:/Users/MPennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/ArcGIS/Boundaries/HUC/HUC8_CONUS/"

#Get HUC8
huc8_s = st_read(paste0(c_dir,'HUC8_US.shp'))
length(unique(huc8_s$HUC8)) # 2139

# Change projection
huc8_s <- st_transform(huc8_s, CRS("+init=epsg:26978"))

# Add on leading zeros
huc8_s$HUC8 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(huc8_s$HUC8)), width = 8, format = "d",flag = "0")  



```

```{r}
cat_df = read.csv("D:/ArcGIS/StreamCat/Cat_COMID_all.csv")
```

#-----------------------------------
# National Sums Precip
```{r}

qa_dir = "C:/Users/mpennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/Projects/Contracts/StRAP4_contracts/Climate_DW/QAPP/"

qacheck = read.csv(paste0(qa_dir,"QA_checklist_20240910.csv"))

# Merge on HUC12 Area


HUC12_AREA = read.csv(paste0(data_dir,"HUC12_AREASQKM.csv"))
# Add leading zeros
HUC12_AREA$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(HUC12_AREA$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0) 

sum_12_p = merge(prec_hu12,HUC12_AREA,by='HUC12')

sum_12_p$total_precip_2010_mm = sum_12_p$precip_2010_mm * sum_12_p$AREASQKM

sum(sum_12_p$precip_2010_mm)

# Remove -99999
prec_hu12 = prec_hu12 %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))
prec_Cat = prec_Cat %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))

# Calculate Volume of Rain
prec_hu12. = merge(prec_hu12,huc12_df,by='HUC12')
prec_Cat. = merge(prec_Cat,cat_df,by='COMID')

prec_hu12.$precip_2010_m3 = 
  prec_hu12.$precip_2010_mm * prec_hu12.$AREASQKM_hu12 * .001 * 10^6 # getting units to m
prec_hu12.$precip_2050_m3_RCP8.5Hadgem = 
  prec_hu12.$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem * prec_hu12.$AREASQKM_hu12 * .001 * 10^6 

prec_Cat.$precip_2010_m3 = 
  prec_Cat.$precip_2010_mm * prec_Cat.$AreaSqKM * .001 * 10^6 # getting units to m
prec_Cat.$precip_2050_m3_RCP8.5Hadgem = 
  prec_Cat.$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem * prec_Cat.$AreaSqKM * .001 * 10^6 

# Units
summary(prec_hu12.$precip_2010_m3)
summary(prec_Cat.$precip_2010_m3)

#-------------------------------------------
# Calc % diff HUC12 vs. Catchment
#-------------------------------------------
sum(prec_hu12.$precip_2010_m3)
sum(prec_Cat.$precip_2010_m3)

100*abs((sum(prec_hu12.$precip_2010_m3)-sum(prec_Cat.$precip_2010_m3))/
       sum(prec_Cat.$precip_2010_m3)) # 1.701532

100*abs((sum(prec_hu12.$precip_2050_m3_RCP8.5Hadgem)-
           sum(prec_Cat.$precip_2050_m3_RCP8.5Hadgem))/
          sum(prec_Cat.$precip_2050_m3_RCP8.5Hadgem)) # 1.802461


```

# National Sums vs. Source
```{r}

library(readxl)

qa_dir = "C:/Users/mpennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/Projects/Contracts/StRAP4_contracts/Climate_DW/QAPP/"

qacheck = read_xlsx(paste0(qa_dir,"QA_checklist_20240910.xlsx"),sheet='QA_calcs',skip=0)
qacheck = as.data.frame(qacheck)


# Total in source

# (need to convert # mm to m & km2 to m2)
precip_2010_source = conus_area_sqkm * 
  as.numeric(qacheck[qacheck$DATASET == "PRISM average annual total precipitation in 2010 (2001-2020)" & qacheck$...6 == 'HUC12 polygons',]$...35[2]) * .001 * 10^6 

# Land Use (units = area m2?)

100*abs((sum(prec_hu12.$precip_2010_m3)-precip_2010_source)/precip_2010_source) # 3.999273


```

# Compare Summary info

```{r}
nrow(prec_hu12) # 87700 draft; 83073 final 
nrow(temp_hu12) # 87700 draft; 83073 final 
nrow(prec_Cat) # 2647454 draft; 2647454
nrow(temp_Cat) # 2647454 draft; 2647454

summary(prec_hu12$Change.in.average.annual.total.precipitation.......RCP4.5GISS)
summary(prec_Cat$Change.in.average.annual.total.precipitation.......RCP4.5GISS)

summary(temp_hu12$Change.in.average.annual.mean.temperature...C....RCP4.5GISS)
summary(temp_Cat$Change.in.average.annual.mean.temperature...C....RCP4.5GISS)

summary(prec_hu12$X2050.average.annual.total.precipitation...RCP4.5GISS)
summary(prec_Cat$X2050.average.annual.total.precipitation...RCP4.5GISS)

summary(temp_hu12$X2050.average.annual.mean.temperature...C....RCP4.5Hadgem)
summary(temp_Cat$X2050.average.annual.mean.temperature...C....RCP4.5Hadgem)


```

```{r}
nrow(prec_hu12) # 87700 draft; 83073 final

nrow(temp_Cat) # 2647454 draft; 2647454

summary(prec_Cat$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS)

summary(temp_hu12$C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS)
summary(temp_Cat$C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS)

summary(prec_Cat$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem)

summary(temp_Cat$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem)
```
