# Final 
* Check that the % Change values can be cacluated from the 2010 and 2050 values

# Check % change precip hu12
```{r}

summary(prec_hu12$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS)

summary(prec_hu12$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS)


temp = prec_hu12 
temp = temp %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))

# prec_hu12$test_change_precip_rcp4.5giss = prec_hu12$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS - 
#   prec_hu12$precip_2010_mm

temp$test_pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS = 
  100*(temp$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS - 
         temp$precip_2010_mm) / temp$precip_2010_mm
temp$test_pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS = 
  100*(temp$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS - 
         temp$precip_2010_mm) / temp$precip_2010_mm

temp$test_pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem = 
  100*(temp$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem - 
         temp$precip_2010_mm) / temp$precip_2010_mm
temp$test_pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem  = 
  100*(temp$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem - 
         temp$precip_2010_mm) / temp$precip_2010_mm

head(temp$test_pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS)
head(temp$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS)

temp$diff_prc4.5G = temp$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS - 
  temp$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS
temp$diff_prc8.5G = temp$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS - 
  temp$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS
temp$diff_prc4.5H = temp$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem - 
  temp$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem
temp$diff_prc8.5H = temp$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem - 
  temp$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem


summary(temp$diff_prc4.5G)
summary(temp$diff_prc8.5G)
summary(temp$diff_prc4.5H)
summary(temp$diff_prc8.5H)

head(temp$diff_prc4.5G)

```

# Check % change precip Cat
```{r}


temp = prec_Cat
temp = temp %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))

# prec_hu12$test_change_precip_rcp4.5giss = prec_hu12$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS - 
#   prec_hu12$precip_2010_mm

temp$test_pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS = 
  100*(temp$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS - 
         temp$precip_2010_mm) / temp$precip_2010_mm
temp$test_pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS = 
  100*(temp$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS - 
         temp$precip_2010_mm) / temp$precip_2010_mm

temp$test_pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem = 
  100*(temp$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem - 
         temp$precip_2010_mm) / temp$precip_2010_mm
temp$test_pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem  = 
  100*(temp$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem - 
         temp$precip_2010_mm) / temp$precip_2010_mm

head(temp$test_pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS)
head(temp$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS)

temp$diff_prc4.5G = temp$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS - 
  temp$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS
temp$diff_prc8.5G = temp$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS - 
  temp$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS
temp$diff_prc4.5H = temp$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem - 
  temp$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem
temp$diff_prc8.5H = temp$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem - 
  temp$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem


summary(temp$diff_prc4.5G)
summary(temp$diff_prc8.5G)
summary(temp$diff_prc4.5H)
summary(temp$diff_prc8.5H)

head(temp$diff_prc4.5G)

```

# Check % change temperature hu12
```{r}

temp = temp_hu12 
temp = temp %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))

temp$test_change_degC_RCP4.5GISS = temp$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS - temp$temp_2010_C
temp$test_change_degC_RCP8.5GISS = temp$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS - temp$temp_2010_C
temp$test_change_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem = temp$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem - temp$temp_2010_C
temp$test_change_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem = temp$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem - temp$temp_2010_C

head(temp$test_change_degC_RCP4.5GISS)
head(temp$C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS)

temp$diff_prc4.5G = temp$test_change_degC_RCP4.5GISS - 
  temp$C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS
temp$diff_prc8.5G = temp$test_change_degC_RCP8.5GISS - 
  temp$C_change_temp_RCP8.5GISS
temp$diff_prc4.5H = temp$test_change_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem - 
  temp$C_change_temp_RCP4.5Hadgem
temp$diff_prc8.5H = temp$test_change_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem - 
  temp$C_change_temp_RCP8.5Hadgem


summary(temp$diff_prc4.5G)
summary(temp$diff_prc8.5G)
summary(temp$diff_prc4.5H)
summary(temp$diff_prc8.5H)

head(temp$diff_prc4.5G)

```

#-----------------------

# SCATTER PLOTS: Compare HUC12 vs. Cat

# Converter COMID HUC12
* Based on spatial join done using EnvorAtlas3.Rmd file
* See below where I copied the code from EnviroAtlas3
```{r}

Cat_HUC12 = read.csv("D:/EnviroAtlas/Cat_HUC12_st_join_area.csv")
Cat_HUC12$intersect_area_m2 = Cat_HUC12$intersect_area

# Add leading zeros
Cat_HUC12$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(Cat_HUC12$HUC_12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0)  
#Cat_HUC12$HUC12z = paste0("z",Cat_HUC12$HUC12)

Cat_HUC12 = subset(Cat_HUC12, select= -c(intersect_area,HUC_12))
Cat_HUC12 = unique(Cat_HUC12)
dim(Cat_HUC12)


```

# Precip 
* merge the RTI HUC12 data with up-scaled catchment data
```{r}

# remove -99999 values
summary(prec_Cat$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS)

prec_Cat2 = prec_Cat %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))
prec_hu12_ = prec_hu12 %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))

summary(prec_Cat2$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS)

# Upscale Cat to HUC12
prec_Cat_HU12 = merge(prec_Cat2,Cat_HUC12,by='COMID')
length(unique(prec_Cat_HU12$COMID)) # 2621470
length(unique(prec_Cat_HU12$HUC12)) # 82749

summary(prec_Cat_HU12$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS)
summary(prec_Cat_HU12$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS)

any(prec_Cat_HU12 = -99999)

# remove -99999 values
prec_Cat_HU12 = prec_Cat_HU12 %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))
any(prec_Cat_HU12 = -99999)

# rearrange column order
prec_Cat_HU12 = prec_Cat_HU12 %>% 
  select(COMID,HUC12,intersect_area_m2,everything())
options(scipen = 50)

prec_Cat_to_HU12 = prec_Cat_HU12 %>% dplyr::group_by(HUC12) %>%
  summarize(precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            
            pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T))
            

summary(prec_Cat_HU12$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS)
summary(prec_Cat_HU12$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS)
summary(prec_Cat_HU12$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem)
summary(prec_Cat_HU12$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem)
summary(prec_Cat_to_HU12$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS2)
summary(prec_Cat_to_HU12$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS2)
summary(prec_Cat_to_HU12$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem2)
summary(prec_Cat_to_HU12$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem2)

# Generate Scatter Plot (merge the RTI HUC12 data with up-scaled catchment data)
scatter = merge(prec_hu12_,prec_Cat_to_HU12,by='HUC12') 

summary(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS)
summary(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS)
summary(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem)
summary(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem)
summary(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS2)
summary(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS2)
summary(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem2)
summary(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem2)



plot(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS~scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
plot(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS~scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
plot(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem~scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
plot(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem~scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem2)
abline(1,1,col='red')

plot(scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS~scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
plot(scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS~scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
plot(scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem~scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
plot(scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem~scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem2)
abline(1,1,col='red')



# Calculate R-squared
m_4.5giss = lm(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS~scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS2)
m_8.5giss = lm(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS~scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS2)
m_4.5had = lm(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem~scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem2)
m_8.5had = lm(scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem~scatter$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem2)

mc_4.5giss = lm(scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS~scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS2)
mc_8.5giss = lm(scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS~scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS2)
mc_4.5had = lm(scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem~scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem2)
mc_8.5had = lm(scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem~scatter$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem2)

summary(m_4.5giss)$adj.r.squared
summary(m_8.5giss)$adj.r.squared
summary(m_4.5had)$adj.r.squared
summary(m_8.5had)$adj.r.squared

summary(mc_4.5giss)$adj.r.squared
summary(mc_8.5giss)$adj.r.squared
summary(mc_4.5had)$adj.r.squared
summary(mc_8.5had)$adj.r.squared


```

# Temp 
* merge the RTI HUC12 data with up-scaled catchment data
```{r}

# remove -99999 values
summary(temp_Cat$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS)

temp_Cat2 = temp_Cat %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))
temp_hu12_ = temp_hu12 %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))

summary(temp_Cat2$C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS)

# Upscale Cat to HUC12
temp_Cat_HU12 = merge(temp_Cat2,Cat_HUC12,by='COMID')
length(unique(temp_Cat_HU12$COMID)) # 2621470
length(unique(temp_Cat_HU12$HUC12)) # 82749

summary(temp_Cat_HU12$C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS)
summary(temp_Cat_HU12$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS)

any(temp_Cat_HU12 = -99999)

# remove -99999 values
temp_Cat_HU12 = temp_Cat_HU12 %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))
any(temp_Cat_HU12 = -99999)

# rearrange column order
temp_Cat_HU12 = temp_Cat_HU12 %>% 
  select(COMID,HUC12,intersect_area_m2,everything())
options(scipen = 50)

temp_Cat_to_HU12 = temp_Cat_HU12 %>% dplyr::group_by(HUC12) %>%
  summarize(temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            
            C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            C_change_temp_RCP8.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=C_change_temp_RCP8.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            C_change_temp_RCP4.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=C_change_temp_RCP4.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T),
            C_change_temp_RCP8.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=C_change_temp_RCP8.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_m2, na.rm=T))
            

summary(temp_Cat_HU12$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS)
summary(temp_Cat_HU12$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS)
summary(temp_Cat_HU12$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem)
summary(temp_Cat_HU12$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem)
summary(temp_Cat_to_HU12$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS2)
summary(temp_Cat_to_HU12$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS2)
summary(temp_Cat_to_HU12$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem2)
summary(temp_Cat_to_HU12$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem2)

# Generate Scatter Plot (merge the RTI HUC12 data with up-scaled catchment data)
scatter2 = merge(temp_hu12_,temp_Cat_to_HU12,by='HUC12') 

summary(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS)
summary(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS)
summary(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem)
summary(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem)
summary(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS2)
summary(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS2)
summary(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem2)
summary(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem2)

plot(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS~scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
plot(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS~scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
plot(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem~scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
plot(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem~scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem2)
abline(1,1,col='red')

plot(scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS~scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
plot(scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP8.5GISS~scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP8.5GISS2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
plot(scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP4.5Hadgem~scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP4.5Hadgem2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
plot(scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP8.5Hadgem~scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP8.5Hadgem2)
abline(1,1,col='red')
dev.off()

# Calculate R-squared
m2_4.5giss = lm(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS~scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS2)
m2_8.5giss = lm(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS~scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS2)
m2_4.5had = lm(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem~scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem2)
m2_8.5had = lm(scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem~scatter2$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem2)

mc2_4.5giss = lm(scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS~scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS2)
mc2_8.5giss = lm(scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP8.5GISS~scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP8.5GISS2)
mc2_4.5had = lm(scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP4.5Hadgem~scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP4.5Hadgem2)
mc2_8.5had = lm(scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP8.5Hadgem~scatter2$C_change_temp_RCP8.5Hadgem2)

summary(m2_4.5giss)$adj.r.squared
summary(m2_8.5giss)$adj.r.squared
summary(m2_4.5had)$adj.r.squared
summary(m2_8.5had)$adj.r.squared

summary(mc2_4.5giss)$adj.r.squared
summary(mc2_8.5giss)$adj.r.squared
summary(mc2_4.5had)$adj.r.squared
summary(mc2_8.5had)$adj.r.squared


```

# Check % change calcs - prec hu12
```{r}

summary(prec_hu12$X2050.average.annual.total.precipitation...RCP4.5GISS)
summary(prec_hu12$X2050.average.annual.total.precipitation...RCP4.5GISS)

summary(prec_hu12$X..coverage...Change.in.average.annual.total.precipitation.......RCP8.5Hadgem)

summary(prec_hu12$Change.in.average.annual.total.precipitation.......RCP8.5GISS)


prec_hu12$change_precip_rcp4.5giss = prec_hu12$X2050.average.annual.total.precipitation...RCP4.5GISS - 
  prec_hu12$X2010.average.total.annual.precipitation..mm.

prec_hu12$perc_change_precip_rcp4.5giss = 100*prec_hu12$change_precip_rcp4.5giss / 
  prec_hu12$X2010.average.total.annual.precipitation..mm.

head(prec_hu12$change_precip_rcp4.5giss)
head(prec_hu12$Change.in.average.annual.total.precipitation.......RCP4.5GISS)
head(prec_hu12$perc_change_precip_rcp4.5giss)

prec_hu12$diff_prc = prec_hu12$perc_change_precip_rcp4.5giss - 
  prec_hu12$Change.in.average.annual.total.precipitation.......RCP4.5GISS

summary(prec_hu12$diff_prc)


```

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# MAPPING

# Prep Data
```{r}

# Keeping only if % converage > X%

map_prec_hu12 = prec_hu12
map_temp_hu12 = temp_hu12

nrow(prec_hu12[prec_hu12$pct_cov.precip_2010_mm < 50,]) # 213
nrow(map_temp_hu12[map_temp_hu12$pct_cov.temp_2010_C < 50,]) # 213

# Filters out rows where pct coverage (columns matching "pct_cov") >=50
test = prec_hu12
test = test %>% filter(if_all(matches("pct_cov."), ~ . >= 50))


map_prec_hu12 = map_prec_hu12[map_prec_hu12$pct_cov.precip_2010_mm > 50,]
map_temp_hu12 = map_temp_hu12[map_temp_hu12$pct_cov.temp_2010_C > 50,]

map_prec_hu12 = map_prec_hu12[map_prec_hu12$pct_cov.pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS > 50,]
map_prec_hu12 = map_prec_hu12[map_prec_hu12$pct_cov.pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS > 50,]
map_prec_hu12 = map_prec_hu12[map_prec_hu12$pct_cov.pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem > 50,]
map_prec_hu12 = map_prec_hu12[map_prec_hu12$pct_cov.pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem > 50,]

map_temp_hu12 = map_temp_hu12[map_temp_hu12$pct_cov.C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS > 50,]
map_temp_hu12 = map_temp_hu12[map_temp_hu12$pct_cov.C_change_temp_RCP8.5GISS > 50,]
map_temp_hu12 = map_temp_hu12[map_temp_hu12$pct_cov.C_change_temp_RCP4.5Hadgem > 50,]
map_temp_hu12 = map_temp_hu12[map_temp_hu12$pct_cov.C_change_temp_RCP8.5Hadgem > 50,]

nrow(prec_hu12) # 83073
nrow(map_prec_hu12) # 82218
nrow(test) # 82218

nrow(temp_hu12)
nrow(map_temp_hu12) # 82218

# Remove rows with no data
map_prec_hu12 = map_prec_hu12 %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))
map_temp_hu12 = map_temp_hu12 %>% filter_all(all_vars(. != -99999))

nrow(map_precip_hu12) # 82222
nrow(map_temp_hu12) # 82218


```


# Precip boxplots
```{r}
library(reshape2)

# Range
summary(map_precip_hu12$precip_2010_mm)
summary(map_precip_hu12$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS)
summary(map_precip_hu12$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS)
summary(map_precip_hu12$precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem)
summary(map_precip_hu12$precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem)


# melt variables
precip_hu12_value = subset(map_precip_hu12,select=c(HUC12,precip_2010_mm,
                                                    precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS,
                                                    precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS,
                                                    precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem,
                                                    precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem))
precip_hu12_chg = subset(map_precip_hu12,select=c(HUC12,pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS,
                                                    pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS,
                                                    pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem,
                                                    pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem))
precip_hu12_value2 = melt(precip_hu12_value, id='HUC12') # converts all unique columns / row values to single row.  
precip_hu12_chg2 = melt(precip_hu12_chg, id='HUC12') # converts all unique columns / row values to single row.  

# Box plots

ggplot(precip_hu12_value2, aes(y=value,x=as.factor(variable), fill=as.factor(variable)))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  #scale_y_log10()+
  ggtitle( "Avg Annual Precip (mm) by HUC12") +
  labs(x="",y="Precip (mm)")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+#puts title in center
  #theme(legend.position="none")+
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  #theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) # add axis lines

ggplot(precip_hu12_chg2, aes(y=value,x=as.factor(variable), fill=as.factor(variable)))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  #scale_y_log10()+
  ggtitle( "% Change in Precip (mm) 2010-2050 by HUC12") +
  labs(x="",y="% Change in Precip (mm)")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+#puts title in center
  #theme(legend.position="none")+
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  #theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) # add axis lines









```

# temp boxplots
```{r}
library(reshape2)

# Range
summary(map_temp_hu12$temp_2010_C)
summary(map_temp_hu12$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS)
summary(map_temp_hu12$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS)
summary(map_temp_hu12$temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem)
summary(map_temp_hu12$temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem)


# melt variables
temp_hu12_value = subset(map_temp_hu12,select=c(HUC12,temp_2010_C,
                                                    temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS,
                                                    temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS,
                                                    temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem,
                                                    temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem))
temp_hu12_chg = subset(map_temp_hu12,select=c(HUC12,C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS,
                                                    C_change_temp_RCP8.5GISS,
                                                    C_change_temp_RCP4.5Hadgem,
                                                    C_change_temp_RCP8.5Hadgem))
temp_hu12_value2 = melt(temp_hu12_value, id='HUC12') # converts all unique columns / row values to single row.  
temp_hu12_chg2 = melt(temp_hu12_chg, id='HUC12') # converts all unique columns / row values to single row.  

# Box plots

ggplot(temp_hu12_value2, aes(y=value,x=as.factor(variable), fill=as.factor(variable)))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  #scale_y_log10()+
  ggtitle( "Avg Annual Temp (C) per HUC12") +
  labs(x="",y="Temp (C)")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+#puts title in center
  #theme(legend.position="none")+
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  #theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) # add axis lines

ggplot(temp_hu12_chg2, aes(y=value,x=as.factor(variable), fill=as.factor(variable)))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  #scale_y_log10()+
  ggtitle( "% Change in Temp (C) 2010-2050 per HUC12") +
  labs(x="",y="% Change in Precip (mm)")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+#puts title in center
  #theme(legend.position="none")+
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
  #theme(panel.background = element_blank())+ # remove grey background
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = "black")) # add axis lines





```

# Covert HUC12 to HUC8
```{r}

# Converter
dir_data = "C:/Users/MPennino/OneDrive - Environmental Protection Agency (EPA)/Data/"
huc12_8 = read.csv(paste0(dir_data,"HUC8_HUC12_st_join_area.csv"))

# Add leading zeros
huc12_8$HUC12 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(huc12_8$HUC12)), width = 12, format = "f",flag = "0",digits = 0)  

huc12_8$HUC8 = formatC(as.numeric(as.character(huc12_8$HUC8)), width = 8, format = "d",flag = "0")  

prec_hu12_hu8 = merge(map_prec_hu12,huc12_8,by='HUC12')
temp_hu12_hu8 = merge(map_temp_hu12,huc12_8,by='HUC12')


length(unique(prec_hu12_hu8$HUC8)) # 2117
length(unique(prec_hu12_hu8$HUC12)) # 82218

length(unique(temp_hu12_hu8$HUC8)) # 2117
length(unique(temp_hu12_hu8$HUC12)) # 82218

# rearrange column order
prec_hu12_hu8 = prec_hu12_hu8 %>% select(HUC8,HUC12,intersect_area_km2,everything())
temp_hu12_hu8 = temp_hu12_hu8 %>% select(HUC8,HUC12,intersect_area_km2,everything())

options(scipen = 50)



map_prec_hu8 = prec_hu12_hu8 %>% dplyr::group_by(HUC8) %>%
  summarize(precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            
            pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=pct_change_precip_RCP8.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=pct_change_precip_RCP4.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T))
#--------------------------------------------

map_temp_hu8 = temp_hu12_hu8 %>% dplyr::group_by(HUC8) %>%
  summarize(temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=temp_2050_degC_RCP4.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=temp_2050_degC_RCP8.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            
            C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=C_change_temp_RCP4.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            C_change_temp_RCP8.5GISS2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=C_change_temp_RCP8.5GISS, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            C_change_temp_RCP4.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=C_change_temp_RCP4.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T),
            C_change_temp_RCP8.5Hadgem2 = 
              weighted.mean(x=C_change_temp_RCP8.5Hadgem, 
                            w=intersect_area_km2, na.rm=T)) %>% data.frame()


```

# HU8 Map of precip data
```{r}


prec_hu8_s = merge(map_prec_hu8,huc8_s,by='HUC8')

length(unique(map_prec_hu8$HUC8)) # 2117
length(unique(huc8_s$HUC8)) # 2139
length(unique(prec_hu8_s$HUC8)) # 2117

class(prec_hu8_s)

prec_hu8_s = st_as_sf(prec_hu8_s)

class(prec_hu8_s)


projection(prec_hu8_s)
projection(states_conus)

# Only need if working with Draft dataset
# prec_hu8_s$change_prec_RCP4.5GISS =
#   prec_hu8_s$Change.in.average.annual.total.precipitation.......RCP4.5GISS

#   prec_hu8_s$Change.in.average.annual.total.precipitation.......RCP8.5Hadgem


summary(prec_hu8_s$pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS)
summary(prec_hu8_s$pct_change_precip_RCP8.5Hadgem)

#map_cols <- get_brewer_pal("Dark2", length(levels(factor(cty_top2$Contaminant))))


ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = prec_hu8_s, aes(fill = precip_2050_mm_RCP4.5GISS2), color = NA) +
    #scale_fill_manual(values=map_cols)+
    scale_fill_continuous(low= 'yellow',high="blue")+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = prec_hu8_s, aes(fill = pct_change_precip_RCP4.5GISS2), color = NA) +
    #scale_fill_manual(values=map_cols)+
    scale_fill_continuous(low= 'blue',high="red")+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = prec_hu8_s, aes(fill = precip_2050_mm_RCP8.5Hadgem2), color = NA) +
    scale_fill_continuous(low= 'yellow',high="blue")+
  geom_sf(data=states_conus,fill=NA,color='black')

    #scale_fill_manual(values=map_cols)+
```

```{r}
prec_hu12_s = st_as_sf(prec_hu12_s)
```

#<><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><>
# Surplus Precipitation
#<><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><>

# PET Calculation
*SPEI Package
* https://www.rdocumentation.org/packages/SPEI/versions/1.7/topics/Potential%20evapotranspiration
* Consider incorporating wind speed or other package like: https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/Evapotranspiration/index.html
```{r}

library(SPEI)

# Get the coordinates from geometry
st_coordinates()

huc12_coords = huc12_s 
#huc12_coords<-cbind(huc12_coords, st_coordinates(st_centroid(huc12_coords$geometry)))

huc12_coords2 = huc12_coords %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c('UTM_X','UTM_Y'), crs = 32616) %>%
  st_transform(crs = 4326) %>%
  { bind_cols(st_drop_geometry(.), st_coordinates(.)) } %>% 
  rename(lon = X, lat = Y)


summary(huc12_coords$X)
summary(huc12_coords$Y)

huc12_coords = as.data.frame(st_drop_geometry(huc12_coords))

names(huc12_coords)[which(colnames(huc12_coords)=="X")] = "LAT"
names(huc12_coords)[which(colnames(huc12_coords)=="Y")] = "LON"


pet = merge(temp_hu12,huc12_coords[,c('HUC12','LAT','LON')],by='HUC12')
str(pet$LAT)
str(pet$LON)

pet$PET = thornthwaite(Tave=pet$temp_2010_C, lat = pet$LAT)




```

#-----------------------
# Generate PET monthly rasters (Marc Weber code NLA17 E-I)
```{r}

# First generate median temp rasters

options(prism.path = "E:/GitProjects/Lake-Projects/PRISM")
prism_archive_ls()
get_prism_monthlys(type="tmin", year = 2016, mon = 10:12, keepZip=F)
get_prism_monthlys(type="tmin", year = 2017, mon = 1:10, keepZip=F)

get_prism_monthlys(type="tmax", year = 2016, mon = 10:12, keepZip=F)
get_prism_monthlys(type="tmax", year = 2017, mon = 1:10, keepZip=F)

tmin_list = prism_archive_ls()[grep('tmin', prism_archive_ls())]

tmax_list = prism_archive_ls()[grep('tmax', prism_archive_ls())]

for (k in 1:length(tmin_list)){
  tmin <- raster(pd_to_file(prism_archive_ls()[k+52]))
  tmax <- raster(pd_to_file(prism_archive_ls()[k+26]))
  tmed = calc(stack(tmin, tmax),median)
  writeRaster(tmed, paste0(pathdir,'PRISM_tmed_',strsplit(tmin_list[k],'_')[[1]][5],'.tif'))
}



```

# Run monthly PET calculations
```{r}

# First generate median temp rasters

year = '2016'
months = c('10','11','12')
month_names = c('oct','nov','dec')
year = '2017'
months = c('01','02','03','04','05','06','07','08','09','10')
month_names = c('jan','feb','mar','apr','may','jun','jul','aug','sep','oct','nov','dec')

pathdir = 'E:/GitProjects/Lake-Projects/daylength'
for (k in 1:length(months)){
  tmed = raster(paste0(pathdir,'/PRISM_tmed_',year,months[k],'.tif'))
  daylen = raster(paste0(pathdir,'/D_12hr_',month_names[k],'.tif'))
  tmed <- projectRaster(tmed, crs=projection(daylen))
  wvd1 = exp(0.062 * tmed)
  wvd2 = (4.95 * wvd1) / 100
  # 30-day months
  if (k %in% c(4,6,9,11)){
    pet = 13.97 * 30 * daylen^2 * wvd2
  }
  if (k %in% c(1,3,5,7,8,10,12)){
    pet = 13.97 * 31 * daylen^2 * wvd2
  }
  if (k == 2){
    pet = 13.97 * 28 * daylen^2 * wvd2
  }
  writeRaster(pet, paste0(pathdir,'/PET_',year,months[k],'.tif'))
}


```

# Get monthly lake site results for PET
```{r}

athdir = 'E:/GitProjects/Lake-Projects/daylength'
variables=list.files(pathdir)
pet_list = variables[grep('PET', variables)]

for (k in 1:length(pet_list)){
  pet = raster(paste0(pathdir,'/',pet_list[k]))
  projection(pet) == st_crs(sites_sf)
  sites_sf = st_transform(sites_sf, projection(pet))
  id <- strsplit(pet_list[k], "\\.")[[1]][1]
  sites[[paste0(id,'_PT')]] <- raster::extract(pet, sites_sf, fun=mean, na.rm=T, small=T)
  }


```
#-----------------

# Runoff (Marc Weber code NLA17 E-I)
```{r}

#Runoff
#Data from ClimateEngine using TerraClimate-Monthly Dataset

pathdir = 'E:/GitProjects/Lake-Projects/Runoff'
variables=list.files(pathdir)
run_list = variables[grep('\\.tif', variables)]
run_list = run_list[!grepl('\\.dbf$',run_list) & ! grepl('\\.xml$',run_list) & ! grepl('\\.cpg$',run_list) & ! grepl('mean',run_list)]

for (k in 1:length(run_list)){
  run <- raster(paste0(pathdir,'/',run_list[k]))
  projection(run) == st_crs(sites_sf)
  run <- projectRaster(run, crs=st_crs(sites_sf)$proj4string)
  id <- toupper(strsplit(run_list[k], "\\.")[[1]][1])
  sites[[paste0(id,'_PT')]] <- raster::extract(run, sites_sf, fun=mean, na.rm=T, small=T)
  }

```
